Friend,

This is our LAST CHANCE to fix this country.

As we inch closer to the election, everyone must do their part. That all starts with holding onto the progress we've already made. WE MUST HOLD THE HOUSE IN 2024

To do that, I desperately need your help. The Democrats have marked me as one of their top targets in the upcoming election. They've always been after me, but this year is different. With the fate of the country on the line, the Left is going to mobilize an almost INFINITE pool of resources. **[I need your help to fight back...](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=e7baccce8c89474bad542b791a35a56b&_e=i-F9Z1IPpiOrXER_yeNRHXPDRUa1SJA56kI9r1bFRVHCqPOqhyKyufJV_fuHp_DreHR8mBB8i4S--BI3cnwnuIR3IO7MLqJZI9cgx-2gj3tcr-tfjeUaV1TGlpb69DUotrB7Pduczkpdt3xmw4qQXw7nS7doQAQPjGS2sn3fQBRuO_p0WnIBqbWmwF-HXbkFJMyVmbiEKMBW2nxYNBbD2RNwX1mm_bhQZ39GE3bsYvESIuw0vdjuVMhmNtgz5XLKqrGKUWW6rp2Uz6r0J8JeownBe8AciB69hGPOEd9l9qyoombfFOcntjR1H66glgWTOGynjVr4QMqEa9J1mRQCUA%3D%3D)**

Grassroots donations have always been the backbone of my campaign.

In 2020, when I won my election despite almost ALL of the polling saying I'd lose, the people of Iowa stood up and let their voices be heard. We let the country know that Iowa isn't done fighting yet. Thanks to every dollar and penny donated to this campaign, we got the job DONE and stayed competitive with our opponents.

In 2022, we pulled it off again. Thanks to EVERYONE who supported my campaign, we widened the margins and won a HUGE victory. Helping the GOP FINALLY take control of the House of Representatives.

**NONE OF THIS would have been possible without the grassroots support of Iowans and Americans hoping for change.**

name: Barbara Boxer
subject: We have the receipts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77046652/449197717/-792092484?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20240114_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGE4MTAxMi03MGIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5pTBQE-pN3Pq_rZcyQ438M691E6OleBZN9HaUF7pqIE=) Peter,

There aren't many Republicans in Congress with records quite as extreme as Ken Calvert's.

Democracy:
No on certifying President Biden's victory in 2020

LGBTQ issues:
No on the Matthew Shepard & James Byrd Hate Crimes Prevention Act
No on recognizing gay marriage nationally, and sought to ban it in California
He publicly outed a former Democratic opponent

Women’s rights:
No on the right to Contraception Act
No on the Violence Against Women Act
No on the Equal Rights Amendment
No on the Fair Pay Act

Sensible gun laws:
No on assault weapons ban
No on expanding background checks
No on the Protecting Our Kids Act
Yes to expand conceal and carry laws
Yes to protect firearms manufacturers from lawsuits

The environment:
No on the Inflation Reduction Act which made historic investments in clean energy
No on protecting people from toxic incinerators
No on recovering America’s wildlife
No on investing in transportation and water infrastructure
No on cracking down on oil company price gouging

**I've said this before, and I still mean it: Lives are at stake in the coming 2024 elections. LGBTQ+ rights are at stake. Our democracy**

body:
We’re closer than ever to defeating the MAGA GOP majority
| **Did you see the _good news_ ➡ Democrats are closer than ever to flipping the House!** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59803?t=6&akid=12470%2E878179%2EC-ePw4) | [**HELP HOUSE DEMOCRATS KEEP UP THEIR MOMENTUM: CHIP IN $7 NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59804?t=7&akid=12470%2E878179%2EC-ePw4)
---
**1#:** The MAGA GOP holds a five-seat majority, _that’s a teeny tiny margin by historical standards._

**2#:** 18 Republicans sit in districts carried by Biden, while only 5 Democrats sit in districts carried by Trump in 2020.

**3#:** By all standards, Democrats sit at an advantage so if we fail to flip the House it will be because of one thing **➡ Democratic supporters' inaction.**
---
It would be devastating if Democrats like you let the GOP hold onto the House just because _you didn’t feel like getting involved early on._

[**➡ Can we count on you to take the next step and commit to donating $7 so we can meet our daily fundraising goal of $5,500 and ensure House Democrats FLIP the House next year?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59803?t=8&akid=12470%2E878179%2EC-ePw4)

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: three updates for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Three quick updates for you today, Peter:
1. **Multiple polls have confirmed that Lucas and Hawley are in a _statistical tie._** This comes after a slew of reports showed Hawley’s approval rating underwater with Missouri voters. _Morning Consult_ even found that Hawley has the worst approval rating of any GOP U.S. Senator running this year.
2. **National insiders are hyper-aware of Hawley’s vulnerability.** They started throwing desperate attacks at Lucas on the day he got into this race — and now, they’re set to spend millions of dollars to prop up Hawley’s campaign.
3. **Our first fundraising deadline of 2024 is on Monday and we’re still about 14% short of our $150,000 goal.** When we stay on track with these goals, we’re able to confidently make early investments into critical aspects of our campaign — like getting ads in front of voters and organizing Missourians all across the state.

**[So Peter, will you rush a donation of absolutely any amount to help us hit our $150,000 goal before our deadline on Monday? clean_body: Three quick updates for you today, Peter: 1. Multiple polls have confirmed that Lucas and Hawley are in a statistical tie. This comes after a slew of reports showed Hawley’s approval rating underwater with Missouri voters. Morning Consult even found that Hawley has the worst approval rating of any GOP U.S. Senator running this year. 2. National insiders are hyper-aware of Hawley’s vulnerability. They started throwing desperate attacks at Lucas on the day he got into this race — and now, they’re set to spend millions of dollars to prop up Hawley’s campaign. 3. Our first fundraising deadline of 2024 is on Monday and we’re still about 14% short of our $150,000 goal. When we stay on track with these goals, we’re able to confidently make early investments into critical aspects of our campaign — like getting ads in front of voters and organizing Missourians all across the state. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you, Team Lucas | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Team Cornel West 2024
subject: Love in Public For Gaza
body:
We need Love Warriors of all kinds to fight for Justice, here and abroad

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240113march_on_washington&n=1)
---
My Dear and Precious Siblings, I just got off the stage and the from the streets of Washington, D.C. with tens of thousands of people of conscience to show this nation, the world, and the agents of the derelict duopoly what love looks like in public for the precious people of Gaza still being subjected to a barbaric genocide and a brutal occupation. Oh my siblings, it was a thing to witness and an honor to take part in with people of all ages, gender identities, races, ethnicities, and religions - it truly was a profound glimpse of the dream Brother Martin Luther King prophesized and offered to the world in this same city more than 50 years ago - it was indeed what a principled movement looked like. I know that while Gaza is what brought people out today it was also something so much more. The suffering of the Palestinian people has become a global symbol of what my dear sister Angela Davis meant when she said that freedom is a constant struggle. We know that while we struggle for Gaza we are also struggling for poor and working class people right here in the USA, we are struggling to topple a circumference of organized greed that has politicians in the pockets of the oligarchy and cartels of Super PACs who will do anything to continue the status quo and even try to have you believe that _we_ are on the wrong side of history, that _we_ are driven by hatred, and that you can only choose between de jure fascism or de facto fascism.
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=KFozupC4hMau3PknCEub8j4Sq89uWKnfyI33ptPHyZEz-1pM9kM3p-uEiS-0l6Jc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240113march_on_washington&n=2 "Click Here to Join Our Moment in a Movement And Join Our Love

Warrior Initiative to Get Our Campaign On the Ballot in All 50

States") [Click Here to Join Our Moment in a Movement And Join Our Love Warrior Initiative to Get Our Campaign On the Ballot in All 50 States](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=KFozupC4hMau3PknCEub8j4Sq89uWKnfyI33ptPHyZEz-1pM9kM3p-uEiS-0l6Jc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240113march_on_washington&n=2)
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=KFozupC4hMau3PknCEub8j4Sq89uWKnfyI33ptPHyZEz-1pM9kM3p-uEiS-0l6Jc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240113march_on_washington&n=3)
---
But as I reminded everyone today, as Brother Martin stated, “no lie can last forever, and truth across the world will rise again.” That’s exactly what our campaign is about and I need your help to carry the Truth, Justice, and Love we brought to the streets of Washington today across the country so we can bring it all back to D.C. when we win this election together, for and with each other. So I humbly ask you to join our Love Warrior program and help us get on the ballot. Not for me- but for we, for Gaza, Palestine, and where all forms of oppression runs roughshod. I promise that you can count on me to never stop telling the truth about Palestine, and I hope I can count on you to help me do just that in all 50 States. [**Click here to join our people powered movement.**](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=KFozupC4hMau3PknCEub8tzRPClsxuvHZ64V3qAo85yRClcMKJBIYqNZnJb8FEE1&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240113march_on_washington&n=4) With Love Supreme, Dr. Cornel West **[PS. Click Here to Watch Today’s Amazing Gathering](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k7l7f-wGB3uvJndEPnxEfJH9Pyw4413N-9N4tTRnha-z&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240113march_on_washington&n=5)**
---
Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240113march_on_washington&n=6)
---

body:

deadline

Hi Derek – It’s
Adam with a quick campaign update: Our first mid-month fundraising
deadline of the year is just a few days away.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240113_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1005&akid=5061%2E5257348%2Ek1hJIp ]And with just over 3 weeks until the start of early voting in
California, it’s go time. We need to double down on our efforts to reach
more voters before they cast their ballots. Can you help our efforts and
contribute
$5?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240113_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1006&akid=5061%2E5257348%2Ek1hJIp ]DONATE
$5

It has been a privilege to represent the people of California in this
fight. Since launching this campaign for U.S. Senate, I've traveled across
our state, talking directly with people to understand their aspirations
for the next U.S. Senator.

We’re fighting for affordable housing, fostering an inclusive economy,
addressing climate change, protecting reproductive freedom, and so much
more.

We are sharing a positive message about the need for truth, for justice,
and for decency in our society and our politics.

And we’re running this campaign with integrity — not taking a dime from
corporate PACs.

This campaign is powered by (and for) hard-working people — because we
need to build an economy that works for everyone.

Now, as the people of California start receiving their ballots, I’m
relying on your help so we can reach as many voters as possible before
March 5.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240113_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1007&akid=5061%2E5257348%2Ek1hJIp ]So, Derek, will you rush in
$5 to
help us reach folks in every corner of California's 58 counties before our
mid-month deadline?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

body:
| | | Friend,
---
I just got out of a meeting with my fellow House Republican leaders, and the situation is DIRE.

The Democrats are TERRIFIED of us keeping our majority, so they're calling on billionaires like George Soros to pour tens of millions of dollars into key swing states and districts so they can take back power. Will you step up?

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

I stand firmly beside President Trump - I need each and every one of you to do the same. | Thank you, Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. | [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20636%2E4449941%2ElIkAeT)
---
**DON’T SCROLL AWAY**
**DON’T CLICK OFF THE PAGE**
**👇READ PRESIDENT BIDEN’S WARNING ABOUT _CITIZENS UNITED_!👇** | [ ]() | [Listen, we’re launching an urgent campaign to end _Citizens United_. But we need $4,200 by midnight tomorrow to get it off the ground! Please, chip in $7 now »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35932?t=7&akid=20636%2E4449941%2ElIkAeT)
---
**Look, we NEED you to remember these 3 things:**
**#1:** Corporations are not people and shouldn’t sway our elections.

**#2:** Without fair and free elections, our democracy is DOOMED!

**#3:** Democratic heroes like Joe Biden, Rep. Raskin, and Sen. Warren are calling on loyal Democrats like YOU to take action.
[**If you’re all in like we are, chip in $7 before midnight tomorrow to help us fund our work to END the influence of the _Citizens United_ ruling and the corruption it created »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35932?t=8&akid=20636%2E4449941%2ElIkAeT)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35933?t=9&akid=20636%2E4449941%2ElIkAeT)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35934?t=10&akid=20636%2E4449941%2ElIkAeT)

Let’s do this!

– Fight for Reform

Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible.
fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=20636%2E4449941%2ElIkAeT). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=20636%2E4449941%2ElIkAeT).**

[Click here](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails/?t=4&akid=20636%2E4449941%2ElIkAeT) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=14&akid=20636%2E4449941%2ElIkAeT). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Fight for Reform »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26914?t=5&akid=20636%2E4449941%2ElIkAeT)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26915?t=6&akid=20636%2E4449941%2ElIkAeT)

clean_body: The real star of America!| | | | | Patriot, Crooked Joe recently charged Hollywood celebrities nearly $1 million to meet him. But to me, YOU are the real star of our country. So, while Crooked Joe asks for $1 million to meet him, I’m asking you to contribute just $1 to be automatically entered to meet me at Mar-a-Lago. That’s right – I want YOUto join me at Mar-a-Lago as my VIP GUESTfor this once-in-a-lifetime MAGA reception on February 16! I’ll fly you and a guest of your choice out to the event for FREE. I’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy drinks and hors d'oeuvres on me, you’ll get a hat signed by me, and to top it all off, you’ll even get to take a special photo with yours truly so that you can remember this amazing night forever! # One Week Down, Ten to Go for
2024 Short Session
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDYsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXNlbmF0ZWRlbW9jcmF0cy5vcmcvczQ2LyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAxMTQuODg1MTU2OTEifQ.eJ76HKCnzmso87lRcPRbB6vKPQS9Uiyr9QXhTlFkO1s/s/2950175210/br/235070830478-l)
---
My friends, the Indiana General Assembly is back in full swing for 2024. It was a rapid-fire week of floor sessions, committee hearings, meetings with my fellow lawmakers and policy stakeholders, and interviews with the media. It’s an honor to work hard for you all each day.
| |
* * *
---
## Follow My Legislation
| | This year I've authored legislation to tackle some of the most difficult issues facing Indianapolis and Hoosiers across the state, including access to voting, addressing gun violence, pedestrian safety, your DNA privacy, and childcare. You can review all my legislation and track it through Session at [iga.in.gov](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDcsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2xlZ2lzbGF0b3JzL2xlZ2lzbGF0b3JfYW5kcmVhX2h1bmxleV8xIiwiYnVsbGV0aW5faWQiOiIyMDI0MDExNC44ODUxNTY5MSJ9.9gdDgsW2QCgzGjDvqp8IO5WJitXXBp_fYUaKp-jtRu8/s/2950175210/br/235070830478-l).
---|---|---
* * *
---
## Stay Tuned for Friday Dispatches
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDgsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3Lmluc3RhZ3JhbS5jb20vc2VuYXRvcmh1bmxleS8iLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMTE0Ljg4NTE1NjkxIn0.hocPMYqNCDmF27k6M7Tvo_ZjKc_Kvl7cZtYyyFMALRU/s/2950175210/br/235070830478-l) Every week during Session I publish a video dispatch to update the public on legislative business and the issues I'm keeping an eye on. You can find yesterday's [right here on my Instagram](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDksInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3Lmluc3RhZ3JhbS5jb20vcC9DMkJkQjYtTHBCSS8iLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMTE0Ljg4NTE1NjkxIn0.aWpNrXj--C2Em4Ky88v_0U_DKp5RGkJWIodYiKF1wmU/s/2950175210/br/235070830478-l). Watch that space for updates as they happen.
---
## I _Still_ Want to Hear from You!
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTAsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXNlbmF0ZWRlbW9jcmF0cy5vcmcvczQ2LyNzdXJ2ZXkiLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMTE0Ljg4NTE1NjkxIn0.SwgOfFT3CLknVJ1Kc7hVk0KhoX_akaXXKjcNd6DN-yE/s/2950175210/br/235070830478-l)
---
Session has now begun, but I hope you'll still [take a moment to complete my survey](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTEsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXNlbmF0ZWRlbW9jcmF0cy5vcmcvczQ2LyNzdXJ2ZXkiLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMTE0Ljg4NTE1NjkxIn0.sElLGGNJiUwX-Snd5ylX_yLyge1uI5Xnbmlbkuj4mEk/s/2950175210/br/235070830478-l) if you haven't yet and share what you think about the issues facing Indiana. Your feedback will help inform my decisions about bills and amendments that come up for votes -- and the work I do year-round when the Senate is not in session. Thank you!
* * *
---
## STORIES SHAPING OUR STATE
[Statehouse Democrats team up to kick off Joint, Bicameral Agenda](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTIsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXNlbmF0ZWRlbW9jcmF0cy5vcmcvc3RhdGVob3VzZS1kZW1vY3JhdHMtdGVhbS11cC10by1raWNrLW9mZi1qb2ludC1iaWNhbWVyYWwtYWdlbmRhLyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAxMTQuODg1MTU2OTEifQ.zzCl-_wTb0j_92u5JaydHVBJnjf05oF-2q80HpLR_k0/s/2950175210/br/235070830478-l)
My Senate colleagues and our counterparts in the House of Representatives held a first-of-its-kind press conference this week to talk about the priorities we share across both our chambers. I spoke about the need to be proactive, not punitive, in our approach to solving our gradeschool literacy crisis.
[Indiana teacher salaries are on the rise — but averages still fall short of governor’s goal](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTMsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDEvMDgvaW5kaWFuYS10ZWFjaGVyLXNhbGFyaWVzLWFyZS1vbi10aGUtcmlzZS1idXQtYXZlcmFnZXMtc3RpbGwtZmFsbC1zaG9ydC1vZi1nb3Zlcm5vcnMtZ29hbC8iLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMTE0Ljg4NTE1NjkxIn0.OgcaO1aP5tFG0aG-Z8TZeK_hUtGKN_G25DrBxwWcwkU/s/2950175210/br/235070830478-l)
We have worked hard at the Statehouse to encourage school districts to raise teacher pay, and that work is finally beginning to pay off. However, the Governor and I are in agreement that the progress has not come far or fast enough. Hoosier kids deserve the best teachers, and without competitive salaries our schools will continue to fall short.
[Indiana's Energy Assistance Program helps Hoosiers with utility costs](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTQsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXB1YmxpY21lZGlhLm9yZy9uZXdzL2luZGlhbmFzLWVuZXJneS1hc3Npc3RhbmNlLXByb2dyYW0taGVscHMtaG9vc2llcnMtd2l0aC11dGlsaXR5LWNvc3RzLnBocCIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAxMTQuODg1MTU2OTEifQ.vm33ai-BzaAmA3QnQhk-HjbmWo7b2N3UVRrhZ4iEDDE/s/2950175210/br/235070830478-l)
The price tag on basic utilities has been rising, and with an Indiana winter well underway, many are staying indoors and turning up the heat. If you're struggling to keep up with energy bills, check out this state program that may help lower your costs.

clean_body: | | | | | "Twitter" "Twitter" "Facebook"mailto:s46@iga.in.gov "Email" "Visit Me Online" | One Week Down, Ten to Go for 2024 Short Session My friends, the Indiana General Assembly is back in full swing for 2024. It was a rapid-fire week of floor sessions, committee hearings, meetings with my fellow lawmakers and policy stakeholders, and interviews with the media. It’s an honor to work hard for you all each day. | | Follow My Legislation | | This year I've authored legislation to tackle some of the most difficult issues facing Indianapolis and Hoosiers across the state, including access to voting, addressing gun violence, pedestrian safety, your DNA privacy, and childcare. You can review all my legislation and track it through Session at . ---|---|--- Stay Tuned for Friday Dispatches Every week during Session I publish a video dispatch to update the public on legislative business and the issues I'm keeping an eye on. You can find yesterday's . Watch that space for updates as they happen. I Still Want to Hear from You! Session has now begun, but I hope you'll still if you haven't yet and share what you think about the issues facing Indiana. Your feedback will help inform my decisions about bills and amendments that come up for votes -- and the work I do year-round when the Senate is not in session. Thank you! STORIES SHAPING OUR STATE My Senate colleagues and our counterparts in the House of Representatives held a first-of-its-kind press conference this week to talk about the priorities we share across both our chambers. I spoke about the need to be proactive, not punitive, in our approach to solving our gradeschool literacy crisis. We have worked hard at the Statehouse to encourage school districts to raise teacher pay, and that work is finally beginning to pay off. However, the Governor and I are in agreement that the progress has not come far or fast enough. Hoosier kids deserve the best teachers, and without competitive salaries our schools will continue to fall short. The price tag on basic utilities has been rising, and with an Indiana winter well underway, many are staying indoors and turning up the heat. If you're struggling to keep up with energy bills, check out this state program that may help lower your costs. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my state government resource guide, "Hunley Community Resource Guide". | | | | Created and distributed by the Indiana Senate Democratic Communications Office Shenetha.Shepherd@iga.in.gov Kyle.Casteel@iga.in.gov Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov ---|---|--- SUBSCRIBER SERVICES: | | |

name: Trump Train News
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zusqv8uak0qcnnrmsu7ai6l59g4uumvsuie494j8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9h61oj6clh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf2gd7bsht8jnl6fb3v30hj9c237fclo7k2g8j3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9h61oj6clh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5qgl2vioa0gk01jssk8dgtngqgmg7f98phropd8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9h61oj6clh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1bj9q5brhgfoe6i69m324m15vk2l9qohg113npo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9h61oj6clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9h61p37cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn5g1f1a856na6m7s2lqj4km8tf6utdalsjedvm0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9h61oj6clh2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo2dgpdvidb4viu1afevr22eqch58b09gldid6a8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9h61oj6clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Briefing
subject: Central Bank: “Final stage” beginning now
body:
The end is near...

| **Central Bank: “Final stage” beginning now** [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zihhpc90c6us50liemnh01f8gnk7g7p4cer44058_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9h61oj2c5h2bs) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would’ve been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent – And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in the months ahead, with the rollout of the FedNow system. body:
*|MC:SUBJECT|*
Take Retirement Quiz

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcqv1p40t2286fgg9r6uefbv5vmjs27dl7081f98_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o31cph2bs)
---
|
## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu7j0duv25215gco1e60srq3kl9n1ccehg351oio_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o31cph2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4uokj9dk7luqlj17iun4e1j8irg8i6ohdgrs4co_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o31cph2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znvnqdh2e481m90e04oo0ar8dq8lmc2oua2o13so_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o31cph2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfpvcnevnem00re7k19cl6ccvqhkvioej424ko7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o31cph2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0td2accri65r70vttofvd05fja7tsbpcgn3a468_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o31cph2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Try this no-cost tool to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---
| [Get Started](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvnv9pl1pl106ufmkbl3vpb8v86md66dhemqsp88_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o31cph2bs "Get Started")
---
|
---

This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Dear Friend,

For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope in a world where so many have yet to hear the gospel. Right now, around the globe, 3,500 missionaries share the transforming gospel message of Jesus. They do this because individuals like you provide the support they need.

We are called by Scripture to play our part in bringing His teachings to all nations, tribes, people, and languages. As we live out this mission in our everyday lives, it's crucial we also show support for our missionaries with financial support and encouragement.

Will you encourage global missionaries today by committing to support their work? By signing this declaration, you're stating:

**" I am committed to helping solve the world's greatest problem -- spiritual lostness -- by supporting global missionaries, which ensures that the International Mission Board can send and sustain a growing missionary presence among unengaged and unreached people groups."**

Your validation of this commitment not only empowers our missionary teams but also gives support for global missionaries and their worldwide reach with the love of Christ.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zin4n319d00tuff2a9ppjpldrgfos9ti5m7p6klg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o36cph2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zherjponrujl2gacuo5ne3qjr585ippan43t2668_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o36cph2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjnbmkl1hrb2gq8qsg0huchov8jvu0r39l4kb71g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o36cph2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| 1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjv9n7j10p2hnhrlt6blfhe7gt4efmkb4ghjjj40_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj2c3i6ep7246h22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o36cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmbsh96h47um4r22t9qmjge2gi2cd1pv2qol4mn0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o36cph2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgho9l5tc7d1jcitatuu8u993b91g8igt0s2tvig_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j60o36cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Your America
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38021%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Uive7WTvDfnKN%2f9SAjiYtA&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38022%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0QO443fSITrCT2yETT%2f2tg&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38023%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=baUhYUXybB4eu%2bGR5D6ktA&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38024%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IeUViBfIv2JXmGxkn676oA&sysid=1)
---

---

body:

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhf4kkk0tmtakod140b9ubcaaft4dd7uq99an2do_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs)

## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z79j4i31lothjoufs0sjohafua40ifd0fdg9tbvo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z87dun675toq7f3bm0f8brutsnfg1kpd7q64nbs8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmb8mq0ple3t5kv675m3hod30jiqmrk38m9mgotg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z63i36kij5pdnh2n2hcuqmhfdjpgr8vkpddcnsm8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjiufop900k9ou1kjs210kib4okdib90r0a2itjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Discover how economics impacts our lives
body:
In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zogeavq8imfdi02hlvnfpo5i2os579oebl0l3k3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziff23lh718sv1n9vtmuquqancaflr995ni2fnk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8prf3sn6beqvfagdd47m0483luegcha8o0u3vqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo48d9dnk6rrfqni4de7ei3t5nrjqf92agfi2qqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zucl4qdjd3k74vqkjfoa39gsaf274i74dum3d4b0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0vmri18nbhum4q7lla6qc4a1a64ogncqej7s628_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt1qvhikks2bivqirqur24351hhtm2v95svqtqbg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2q1qvviq9ptjpjq8bv84maj2tqajopbt6vnvd1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j68o74cth2bs)

name: Your America
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38030%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ishwib8acSeVQnfGqzFUhw&sysid=1) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38031%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6%2f5FLXwpetrY3cbHDkf6HQ&sysid=1)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38031%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6%2f5FLXwpetrY3cbHDkf6HQ&sysid=1)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk9ovbpn00faed4e4ugkcshpkvstg9gdbirrp8l0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j6cor5cth2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...

But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgbpcpfqfg8u9pip4ig9kc0q1hv2jir6chmr5a6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j6cor5cth2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. body:
*|MC:SUBJECT|*
Take Retirement Quiz

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn6nqiegfu0ro1k8a6dasl47muroaebcacbjh740_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j6eoj5c5h2bs)

## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu4kc87fiio1slkpdn5n3run59qa36b6vq4s9is8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j6eoj5c5h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6qtu7t9ln8kc2omc114fn618k00bf4g8bbh3lk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j6eoj5c5h2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zct9e42o67f2u4m17hte4qdv3467kpkt10clpg80_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j6eoj5c5h2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2bqsdc3nbhactnfk0p59l825v1vak039eg3t1i8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j6eoj5c5h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcnsqvm3t5j0q0r5sgbbgdjsiq3u1l2p66gn0tlg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j6eoj5c5h2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Try this no-cost tool to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---
| [Get Started](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfltg5c1oirv66t62qdimd3u4i0bg7rc2oefjcn0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j6eoj5c5h2bs "Get Started")
---
|
---
| | | Unless otherwise indicated, information is as of 5/4/2023. SmartAsset has no obligation to update any content in this article. This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:
1. ["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020)](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn3mspdcmjdu9b10o7j68u8bbk7pvvmep0lc2438_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j6eoj5c5h2bs). The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z31eiso74vpmml0gknp1jl0r0o3nt0sf45jr6o5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9j6eoj5c5h2bs).

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Caucus Room Member Communication
body:
No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-adtuuhk-trhiujldw-j/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-adtuuhk-trhiujldw-r/) **Caucus Room Members** **Status Update and Next Steps** Total Groups Formed: 2I have been pretty disappointed by the Members' response to my challenge to go and form groups on Caucus Room for conservative action. But what I think isn't what's important. The Caucus Room Members have sent a resounding message: Caucus Room, either the idea or the platform (or both) are not a valuable tool to them. For Caucus Room to continue, at least 400 groups are required. Since we are not even at 1% of that number after the first week, I don't foresee reaching that goal anytime soon, if ever.So, unless there is a massive surge in Member interest in forming groups this next week, I will know for certain that Caucus Room is no longer needed.I wish you the best in 2024!John CoorsManager, Caucus Room LLCjohnc@caucusroom.com

[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-adtuuhk-trhiujldw-y/) | CaucusRoom, LLCPO Box 745214Arvada, CO 80006 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-adtuuhk-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-t) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-u-adtuuhk-trhiujldw-i/)
---

name: Your America
subject: Central Bank: “Final stage” beginning now
body:
The end is near...

| **Central Bank: “Final stage” beginning now** [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38048%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C%2bIawDtkFkIHSduzU4VvBg&sysid=1) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would’ve been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent - And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in the months ahead, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system - and to help you prepare - Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. It’s controversial, but Nomi’s interview is a must-watch for anyone with more than $2,500 in an American bank or retirement fund. **[Click here to find out what you need to do to prepare for this historic transformation.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38049%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Kw6JnnjF8KUbO4r%2fnmSxVA&sysid=1)**
