name: Hillsdale College via Restore our Nation
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HGn0cTG6YRm6yeHo4X1VsQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhlymP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMTE0VwNzcGNCCmWi9a2jZRy-WatSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HGn0cTG6YRm6yeHo4X1VsQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhlymP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMTE0VwNzcGNCCmWi9a2jZRy-WatSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HGn0cTG6YRm6yeHo4X1VsQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhlymP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMTE0VwNzcGNCCmWi9a2jZRy-WatSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Restore Our Nation

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Inslee's State of the State
body:
The 2024 legislative session is underway! And, as we continue highlighting the latest news coming out of Olympia, we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest last week from your own backyard. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62687195:sVYWFViNK:m:1:2610672541:972A6975EDAA8336239F6A7084E0B850:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends, The 2024 legislative session is underway! And, as we continue highlighting the latest news coming out of Olympia, we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest last week from your own backyard. Read on... **This week 's need-to-see video...** In place of a Newsmaker interview this week, we bring you Republican State Senator Nikki Torres' response to the gaslighting remarks delivered by Governor Jay Inslee in (thankfully) his last State of the State speech. While Inslee's address was a lesson in creative storytelling, Senator Torres brought a refreshing dose of reality to the table, and her perspective deserves more attention than the ink wasted on the governor's many questionable statements.. Take a moment to watch Sen. Torres' no-nonsense response [**here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62687196:sVYWFViNK:m:1:2610672541:972A6975EDAA8336239F6A7084E0B850:r "https://src.wastateleg.org/blog/audio-video-state-senator-nikki-torres-gives-republican-perspective-2024-legislative-session/"). **This week 's top story...** In a recent Crosscut/Elway poll, only 37% of respondents picked Democrat Bob Ferguson for our state's next governor. That leaves a whopping two-thirds of voters looking for other options. On the flip side, Republican Dave Reichert is pulling in 31% from the GOP base, showing that the race is still wide open and candidates have some ground to cover before November. Even though Attorney General Bob Ferguson has been dancing around Gov. Inslee's seat for 12 years, it looks like he won't be waltzing into office just yet. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62687197:sVYWFViNK:m:1:2610672541:972A6975EDAA8336239F6A7084E0B850:r)**.** ** ** **In case you missed it ...** The Far Left's recent political pep rally in downtown Seattle, blocking Interstate 5 for five hours, aimed to press Democrat politicians, like Governor Jay Inslee, to publicly support Hamas terrorists. The Seattle Times editorialists, after three days of mulling over their response, advocated for a response involving "law enforcement coordination and a clear message" against those disrupting public spaces for political influence. Questions remain however about Governor Inslee and the Washington State Patrol's commitment to dealing with such illegal disruptions, especially as the protestors, a loud part of the Democrat voting base, took control of the freeway for most of a Saturday afternoon with minimal intervention from law enforcement.** **[**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62687198:sVYWFViNK:m:1:2610672541:972A6975EDAA8336239F6A7084E0B850:r)**.** ** ** **Your bit of inspiration for the week ...** Enjoy the beauty of Mt. Rainier at dawn, as photographed by former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler. **** | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62687199:sVYWFViNK:m:1:2610672541:972A6975EDAA8336239F6A7084E0B850:r)
---
****
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14392755&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osVYWFViNK).
---

## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9c2agtkgsni3gd59es4h4eus6kfbf5lmdtdjo40_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9gm2ob2c1h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")

---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zviqcegkfdd5fu3uqpug4ohk25nc7ugmdl83tdj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9gm2ob2c1h2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl3j60cb84oe99fjvdveub7ud48j0phaq5oh35mo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9gm2ob2c1h2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaamitrqio4b52ro2nqj6649km5bqsc8chl518to_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9gm2ob2c1h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6dsnls16tktmlrfoe6otigcfj2s0usk12m16htg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9gm2ob2c1h2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Try this no-cost tool to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---
| [Get Started](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdkum9l27nnq17n9f7i5qsa86qqru399a0t8b63g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9gm2ob2c1h2bs "Get Started")

|

SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a1f402a66ea45c1b72a8361104bf636&_e=CwxckUMqZh2__UPQByLV8uk4SNLQukx2DKQDpUygsPnUQ3MFb4qiBXSxRmfNuf8YALOpyKdengCmLC_7UzmsiQWeBZRrU4-u3QAo2qUvBrNh4unloD0tE7tl_x4JK_mQMALiDxpTtp5U7xGS8fwmtEhp2EqKqCTrsI4Zr4H00sqjFxtukqTsyAzTL1G_6f4g8vwiCKxUiLwsgpDZqKT7gKr4RaYzXFHBRBiGjLEM4pQ93yt6J28CiVnxCDCLDxjANwOGg4Xt7aJ7hJVxA0Fzkkh7SBvVBQeACv3XadzDyOgN0JSDcjLKKWtAh5-8HO0p) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a1f402a66ea45c1b72a8361104bf636&_e=CwxckUMqZh2__UPQByLV8uk4SNLQukx2DKQDpUygsPnUQ3MFb4qiBXSxRmfNuf8YALOpyKdengCmLC_7UzmsiQWeBZRrU4-u3QAo2qUvBrNh4unloD0tE7tl_x4JK_mQMALiDxpTtp5U7xGS8fwmtHXLY1LnZkutceJ1yD6ZoT9_Qjw6Jrf5v63zT-_Y_ifxezOqCwXzq0CC2zoqnQN90Glud0kPK7bn_zFEWuFAxSLOtpuGiWUPKNTAoGmIjrBYTbvoXaZ_NmXhFB6yfYbaskUCpEbkcrv5a1x1NhMhrjGwGSv0Ucw-mxz5NkvmF7jn) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a1f402a66ea45c1b72a8361104bf636&_e=CwxckUMqZh2__UPQByLV8uk4SNLQukx2DKQDpUygsPnUQ3MFb4qiBXSxRmfNuf8YALOpyKdengCmLC_7UzmsiQWeBZRrU4-u3QAo2qUvBrNh4unloD0tE7tl_x4JK_mQMALiDxpTtp5U7xGS8fwmtDCdBcejW7SJdVsU8y42vqgdf2A0OQAfVHDtJi47uuCeqfT4zwLkdRiDxtLODJ1_ftWxVDzkIfHP4xNTkmvXngiSAr851AbVQGz3f4oPoWNnbz8Y6xfRMnLxn5A5GwNnd5LwoSSF4Y5tSV3V_S5vq4Ajq_OEwbA356ZjOC3VdqWE). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a1f402a66ea45c1b72a8361104bf636&_e=CwxckUMqZh2__UPQByLV8uk4SNLQukx2DKQDpUygsPnUQ3MFb4qiBXSxRmfNuf8YALOpyKdengCmLC_7UzmsiQWeBZRrU4-u3QAo2qUvBrNh4unloD0tE7tl_x4JK_mQMALiDxpTtp5U7xGS8fwmtAWYcnMenzXHHVITqI92cBUgiTP9g6_TjHMF-89L74p6amr8ThFKndDx3ms9Sd8x9RoO_XFJ87xiIPgRVD5Wvv6SslIp3pX8B2uz5jN_EsclNRVlTTZdki83DbcKUbzSrDDhOuRDoB9KlNNyojtZkqzZrmKkap1XdElWm8qVT4h9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: It’s not about politics.
body:
It's about results.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xb2e0XrS1N2Cerfmoetabg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhmq2P4RoAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9wb3N0LWRlYmF0ZS0yNC1kZWJhdGUtdHY_-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---

Friend,
**It's not about politics. It's about policy and results.**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xb2e0XrS1N2Cerfmoetabg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhmq2P4RoAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9wb3N0LWRlYmF0ZS0yNC1kZWJhdGUtdHY_-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---

Since day one, I've been underestimated in this race.

But, that didn't stop me. Instead I said, _**" Underestimate me... that'll be fun."**_

Friend, I know it's _the people_ who decide this race.

It's why I have been pounding the pavement for the last 11 months, not just in one state, but across the country.

I've done over 150 town halls. I talk to every person, answer every question, and shake every hand.

I listen to voters, offer real solutions, and NEVER waver in my fight for America's future.

We spend our money wisely. We focus on building relationships with people on the ground and gaining their trust.

**And it 's paying off.**

It's why you're seeing us rise in the polls, whether it's Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, or nationally. And it's why you've seen this become a two-person race between me and Donald Trump.

We are rising to the top and we're rising for a reason.

Voters are resonating with my message and my vision for our future.

I'm in this race because we have a country to save.

We've got to stop the reckless spending and strengthen our economy.

We've got to secure our border once and for all.

We've got to make our country strong and proud again!

This is not about politics. It's about policy and results.

**[Will you join me in the fight for our future RIGHT NOW?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xb2e0XrS1N2Cerfmoetabg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhmq2P4RoAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9wb3N0LWRlYmF0ZS0yNC1kZWJhdGUtdHY_-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Will you join me in the fight for our future RIGHT NOW?")**

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xb2e0XrS1N2Cerfmoetabg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhmq2P4RoAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9wb3N0LWRlYmF0ZS0yNC1kZWJhdGUtdHY_-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---

We only have **1 DAY** left before the first votes take place, and I need you by my side.

**YOU** can help fuel my campaign.

**YOU** can help amplify my message.

**YOU** can help fund our get out the vote efforts.

**YOU** can help us **WIN.**

**[Even $5 or more makes a difference. Will you chip in today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xb2e0XrS1N2Cerfmoetabg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhmq2P4RoAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9wb3N0LWRlYmF0ZS0yNC1kZWJhdGUtdHY_-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Even $5 or more makes a difference. Will you chip in today?")**

We can't waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line.

I'm counting on you ahead of the Iowa caucuses.

**[Please step up with a generous donation today and let's WIN this!](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xb2e0XrS1N2Cerfmoetabg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhmq2P4RoAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9wb3N0LWRlYmF0ZS0yNC1kZWJhdGUtdHY_-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Please step up with a generous donation today and let’s WIN this!")**

My very best,

Nikki Haley

| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Qp7Z73NL9d4tRO7GOQOY7g~~/AARclAA~~ "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Qp7Z73NL9d4tRO7GOQOY7g~~/AARclAA~~ "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KOeHIqcMQE05ho5gTTY9Ww~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhmq2P4RoAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KOeHIqcMQE05ho5gTTY9Ww~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhmq2P4RoAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb396f9b959f4c78aa06f6f52a15c57f&_e=iA1k0U7gO4lwJ7gxtmb5Bu3obEv_i01D9mbb1aG01Oga-nHTEQ63Z9Bq514eIjflnokofZ9nxHiMsWcwQRVO-9T6F3xceLOCn_eeonrW1d-fZU75SpC5WFvI-NYWuCQpnprIchQfuVegKhfQijmjUmjamDzy6Q3HQalRJjC65H7sTfJBiqTIqhAPMNX8qqG5g7skW5O94HwvDuShLadWajil6IW_GVFPedjoqUKj0OlaQ1DjqSeWm35uFNB6iH4sKrHoHyYqisZ_78dpk1BJhCMb6zKdNW2rH-1zHqsuGnIix4JTHM1C5XVoFgLp5WoCIJHF0KyuxFpCEykKD7n3pQCfpasiJEQoN80Gosqqv4pp8R7evl0gW1HnnsxzgJeA-6KCtQCK0UKfNP4l9LINrd2UK0Ew9itRAOJw34zcsivHEvZ0WvXAx48mAm6zjdCS2x1MAkHo3bmQOP1eEYx_EJang_-DUbGvSen0mALMD7M%3D)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That's why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb396f9b959f4c78aa06f6f52a15c57f&_e=iA1k0U7gO4lwJ7gxtmb5BgANYvupzSpaC1LUadvdif6_8AVJ2ZgXLuL4ErOko41GH3ZQRBo5CsyoGYSaxeVeSvmz6jv2WZRfIBNdupDbvfnm9afGB7sud-cKAj8C4_-jl1C9vdo5NlarY2QTGzEHw-V0-Lr9UIsSQHA9vIjJPloNP8HZFQcbXWgJXzw84-O4U6UuaQ-6fcRm7ZhYeeKp6wqG2SNJ0t0DEja-IZK4E-krDgh3Ep8Hm4szG0xYaX-vyHTLCAcfmZK6eK5_AsY3yhchokbjpHzAeQFOD5Dv-g7H_08E_LiXQwKKYs5Wev73dtLPpZWjwpdP9g7yx3EYc6YKNDfK3gxZIrnLFFB1Jx1jfprfJJD47itgP5KMocKG7cgq_cb9GgWd4IEx1flFc-hMla3NtPyC_3XXfgVmdBL2DJ1dQiOBfWGp4Fu402PzTDV33mJxrxpIJlevCtyyGg%3D%3D) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist:
%recipient.md5_hash%
| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=92847436c4a34567be2149b65a0f6260&_e=nqLaW4_1VmusC-4CNIPyoITKc5c6NM_NTx_LiEi5H-ciIt-7vtC2q78-3-szDYPxgpeG_gONOJoXHtK_u0Lv2alJz6Mm_mLw_NT30NWQK2UUbp7aQwcEJmrHfYgeEJZaF3HFQtYxMVAiipE7d-_soDRgIwiKOTtXZtqnXCc4zZbbRFcnwzYZYLnSuzRI6uC-1Rt50n4rV3txLmWW7J-SGJZ3b851R3_SVfn4A9Uf2OIMH6NQuInISSAH5vhQxAphNon9HzBX5kF8mshYElAi0n3JnYuk-J_ixSLgseIJVqmJKBc-DoaKQShYiog2Br_SJDuOxNSmSOh89KUedjy6BeMXf2awwZOtFh8dJsolMtsY7LBgp_nMvWo6H7ciwjkwMJFQx8TW4afVTtC6hXstxXgHZP9E6zIFlizXw7pC11SAJi3x0b6So-LucsK6-39hIUHvjxKpJTJdZkwKilfb7w%3D%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=92847436c4a34567be2149b65a0f6260&_e=nqLaW4_1VmusC-4CNIPyoITKc5c6NM_NTx_LiEi5H-ciIt-7vtC2q78-3-szDYPxgpeG_gONOJoXHtK_u0Lv2alJz6Mm_mLw_NT30NWQK2UUbp7aQwcEJmrHfYgeEJZaF3HFQtYxMVAiipE7d-_soDRgIwiKOTtXZtqnXCc4zZbbRFcnwzYZYLnSuzRI6uC-1Rt50n4rV3txLmWW7J-SGJZ3b851R3_SVfn4A9Uf2OIMH6NQuInISSAH5vhQxAphNon9HzBX5kF8mshYElAi0n3JnYuk-J_ixSLgseIJVqmJKBc-DoaKQShYiog2Br_SUhe3YM68ekeZIOAm_RdbJHo3LIGxu1nTADq5yjadwb2Dat2sX9Jj9fsIrTbkvyoO2WZS60Tfv9v0I6OiBErNUTrt6k6nEkrejzpazPtnBAliLOOnwtbMMWRPHdPWCNzl-9EnPFA05RN9nj4D5YICFw%3D%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8372744251c9413f9503d1918555818d&_e=gyNJtaHBZxB6F2UiuKi-9KQg1cn3k-4cBzeWtBzw2CIk_WNTqs_MW7bxnh11iRpNer--mCkIklDaB0zjSwU7rtp2JsrIpEoTVz_MEWPGORwLL7_bxrX5brOHsaCs5GsJLTH2lGntNyePkKFW1JOsENyvrL8xJfKidIux_C5cZm8QXR-ADU4C1SUiWQ-27jazvB6YKug6XtT2HznfTGFYJ36NCFHHlA4IKZ1yZUVI4XphRlzic5c5cD8MS9CAbggDbfXn8a4tBI5VFgWo9viL76wlYsE6jF6tAQMWF_mqpHWXDNhNzId6Y1_20kd7VM8Xoq2KuEmlR_8n4xOai5-8aT-_9v-QeJjzhTcROYXf5uxq9ooeyPW-nrx1vDYp97ygBL_k0sKGbdoqYFZekOzZwE0U2N8zSNnURKDymOMlWUAkn9fDkh6T3yP3x4JFFI01)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8372744251c9413f9503d1918555818d&_e=gyNJtaHBZxB6F2UiuKi-9KQg1cn3k-4cBzeWtBzw2CIk_WNTqs_MW7bxnh11iRpNer--mCkIklDaB0zjSwU7rtp2JsrIpEoTVz_MEWPGORwLL7_bxrX5brOHsaCs5GsJLTH2lGntNyePkKFW1JOsENyvrL8xJfKidIux_C5cZm8QXR-ADU4C1SUiWQ-27jazvB6YKug6XtT2HznfTGFYJ36NCFHHlA4IKZ1yZUVI4XphRlzic5c5cD8MS9CAbggDbfXn8a4tBI5VFgWo9viL7-MUsVTz0LRZRzunjFjOiggldlpK6lJUxhE9pMJC-TP-zGzDX0ZDTadPeWnVnEpbEgziBKvhsfzQPF6szG1BYEkndWssI4LHSWsETaFo8RV4_Gkf_jXU4h9zk2NuW90BQC2B4yqvXANKww9--DVtwz-EF7vTeGZvB5DBAwrrz9Ls)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8372744251c9413f9503d1918555818d&_e=gyNJtaHBZxB6F2UiuKi-9KQg1cn3k-4cBzeWtBzw2CIk_WNTqs_MW7bxnh11iRpNer--mCkIklDaB0zjSwU7rtp2JsrIpEoTVz_MEWPGORwLL7_bxrX5brOHsaCs5GsJLTH2lGntNyePkKFW1JOsENyvrL8xJfKidIux_C5cZm8QXR-ADU4C1SUiWQ-27jazvB6YKug6XtT2HznfTGFYJ36NCFHHlA4IKZ1yZUVI4XphRlzic5c5cD8MS9CAbggDbfXn8a4tBI5VFgWo9viL7zhFTgF2crM6jIxUAZ-qB1WCJ3qdILYIrgyeL4QfzFSRZMwa0xWSiTy5PBXRvtHTNm4LWdpamtTN1NrLEl5UH1mi9Bi4_bj56DSWpI98KRQaLF7z6g1vTjXKFFJ-LvFmpNqiclDz9g-kKzKNaJNRA7Gc37FPAJiOUDD7RtkMnfB6)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, __ | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fc6b8a12c5d42719dbfb534ec4206c4&_e=gQXxYMIwv7wYq-VEwFWPA0NLm4ckT-0QkdeJ53urBmvIttLDfBe7J1yoRizl3uTiuTCdg6xo55eAf3kJyZIkmAQla9ovQ-mz6LNAEAorhlRiYnCNP7cEMS58QlCJJQDgt79Y_LtKEmgQvy5eP6XvDdOC-PtVjiyqHJnM4wSXC6BymKW0hbhoEz-tJZEZuBShHAP7UGVQCSzwG08i9rkWdCzcMIadwY7p50c8sTBmq7I1wwUfnyKE7E-Cbn6DxVkB-0LwbhrzVkohRDXPKWbUFeRdo31hacUb81LvjRkd8gF9DrHvkbAQkga8Uv9GzUn0vsvoVMCQBXtAaNGzGCfWCmJFHqoidJnV6DQTDklPvcIDTm7JkE037cveLPNl0Wu_MSiOg-b3DZVF5kGGB3nEJQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fc6b8a12c5d42719dbfb534ec4206c4&_e=gQXxYMIwv7wYq-VEwFWPA0NLm4ckT-0QkdeJ53urBmvIttLDfBe7J1yoRizl3uTiuTCdg6xo55eAf3kJyZIkmAQla9ovQ-mz6LNAEAorhlRiYnCNP7cEMS58QlCJJQDgt79Y_LtKEmgQvy5eP6XvDdOC-PtVjiyqHJnM4wSXC6BymKW0hbhoEz-tJZEZuBShHAP7UGVQCSzwG08i9rkWdCzcMIadwY7p50c8sTBmq7KWWUI3BP4kWIS6_FHvBjGigYc-eweP7vgNLCG6HBkgWdEy4wrj7QjoKR0PkU8zii8OhYfvFv8adHRbSOKyGtRvmq_5FV_PzRGE8HE5ByDhENGjSnhAqI8SFKXruh_uLo1yiFUlEIZJMo5vhzoyGhkaizMXfNJyR0Plt5bSGeE4QA%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fc6b8a12c5d42719dbfb534ec4206c4&_e=gQXxYMIwv7wYq-VEwFWPA0NLm4ckT-0QkdeJ53urBmvIttLDfBe7J1yoRizl3uTiuTCdg6xo55eAf3kJyZIkmAQla9ovQ-mz6LNAEAorhlRiYnCNP7cEMS58QlCJJQDgt79Y_LtKEmgQvy5eP6XvDdOC-PtVjiyqHJnM4wSXC6BymKW0hbhoEz-tJZEZuBShHAP7UGVQCSzwG08i9rkWdCzcMIadwY7p50c8sTBmq7JgEU3v3rR7uYCuzaWOWWbvo1AEX60b_v3Hs5HT6RO7UDyfKnpsKuom0EPj7jiulohdDwXxbDZia5lUJb4j_bDJ18jBZ3pdBmF-rDnTExn8EGPUOwnZ2BIGtetwA1pgppt43PeONdK0JqCNcSMUjBcdG1fzsZROuFIdDPB4fZDT2w%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: Central Bank: “Final stage” beginning now
body:
The end is near...

| **Central Bank: “Final stage” beginning now** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmpjb0i1ibs50clk37e3283cbe3htdfdl01iff8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9gm1p33cth2bs) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would’ve been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent – And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in the months ahead, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system – and to help you prepare – Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. It’s controversial, but Nomi’s interview is a must-watch for anyone with more than $2,500 in an American bank or retirement fund. **[Click here to find out what you need to do to prepare for this historic transformation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcjrl4qlsb8qscilql1lnimim39o8o4sev4da4j8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c9gm1p33cth2bs)**

body:
I've left another message for you, friend. Will you listen when you have a moment?
---
| | | | | | | | | _Hey Friend,_ _I left you a message I'd like you to hear before tomorrow:_
---
| | [Listen Now](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9e638560794b83db523af3c3afcc80ce9116dbf2c756956ac044125c6dcf6a76f2daa886832442cf69889b6d42ed7983c8d3ec5bae91879c)
---
_In this message, I lay out who I am, what I stand for, and why I need your help._**_Now is the time._**__**_____[_Listen to my message here._](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9e638560794b83db523af3c3afcc80ce9116dbf2c756956ac044125c6dcf6a76f2daa886832442cf69889b6d42ed7983c8d3ec5bae91879c)_____**
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9e638560794b83db523af3c3afcc80ce9116dbf2c756956ac044125c6dcf6a76f2daa886832442cf69889b6d42ed7983c8d3ec5bae91879c)
---

Ron DeSantis

---
| | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9e638560794b83db523af3c3afcc80ce9116dbf2c756956ac044125c6dcf6a76f2daa886832442cf69889b6d42ed7983c8d3ec5bae91879c)
---
| |
**🚨 ATTENTION 🚨** Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click **[here.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9e638560794b83dbbb0056be36cee007c2771be25c4b00f281a66bb4eca102666d1ec476e5b1321960c8ca756d205a8b3faa6ed516298a58 "here.")**

---

**Volunteer!**
We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!
---
| | [Sign up here!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9e638560794b83db4000737531f9eef6cb69875f50a0f19ff39d947afe592797ec6a23749a5766f2485c0680139d74b2429e7f6b6bf03096)
---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9e638560794b83db523af3c3afcc80ce9116dbf2c756956ac044125c6dcf6a76f2daa886832442cf69889b6d42ed7983c8d3ec5bae91879c)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9e638560794b83db523af3c3afcc80ce9116dbf2c756956ac044125c6dcf6a76f2daa886832442cf69889b6d42ed7983c8d3ec5bae91879c)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a833e5b7d664be6b9cbca4bcc7cd8b7&_e=mTqfWQ_MGheYHslVvN_MfoCIxeumiSMXbGbcaXJU1kBRTreyPPtggcR21h9eIPmw7TabGSW_JZf2DDZ7DsL0CZy50CIeehJUSdM6lhWvg9ULvTmJ0RrkOFp7scI0N09hKWZF7Ux-ssp6vcXF36QikNSa3DF4cL5EUduqO02odoS2aqSyoBT6EDXwUbWNVoZK_Bddw2hvp72LW4KYqejQ_wYuFEz3QPgUg08ummoW_HgFK7BUza2nzDYYkWPGmErKITf0eRJtBTlacqNSedv2AtSMioBWkl-soPmKRWpaIodPpa0bQH54srgpMzTFq1nU1MrxSG6CyGc4tqMQM-8GdSG6CvM7E_tDOlh1ffLeXUHzh6mhcWh2FxO5cN7fwGu6x3KPT49_2Vm9Wf9pQoVB0g%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a833e5b7d664be6b9cbca4bcc7cd8b7&_e=mTqfWQ_MGheYHslVvN_MfoCIxeumiSMXbGbcaXJU1kBRTreyPPtggcR21h9eIPmw7TabGSW_JZf2DDZ7DsL0CZy50CIeehJUSdM6lhWvg9ULvTmJ0RrkOFp7scI0N09hKWZF7Ux-ssp6vcXF36QikNSa3DF4cL5EUduqO02odoS2aqSyoBT6EDXwUbWNVoZK_Bddw2hvp72LW4KYqejQ_wYuFEz3QPgUg08ummoW_Hj3BDoHzi2gHOpLayLgLitlhiIJU7E2VOi_Cmo-alZSmx5R3WLW_21duUltJqsBR--0mxXm-YoeJ4IabWs2bu06cyV2uLCuBOs9nm4FSwJncKb_R-WumvyB4GTfbeZIZGxSSmYh36qKmoY6GZz_vsX4f31AxixEg-LgsejoACBD2Q%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a833e5b7d664be6b9cbca4bcc7cd8b7&_e=mTqfWQ_MGheYHslVvN_MfoCIxeumiSMXbGbcaXJU1kBRTreyPPtggcR21h9eIPmw7TabGSW_JZf2DDZ7DsL0CZy50CIeehJUSdM6lhWvg9ULvTmJ0RrkOFp7scI0N09hKWZF7Ux-ssp6vcXF36QikNSa3DF4cL5EUduqO02odoS2aqSyoBT6EDXwUbWNVoZK_Bddw2hvp72LW4KYqejQ_wYuFEz3QPgUg08ummoW_HiDVg6wq4dNOiulWgJjhjOkLbMCttZ731jB6HvZBrtVaUsKc9s9CvOc9z_T1FK3ZFr0T1uaKpai_2uhV_Sxrq1llAE0imrDBSh42mR8x6-3mnr8RxTDjcf5WhFVR71a5I4l8nIwHKPii0aoux-djMcS1kznreAM3GMbu1M_8XMbhg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/O9yoCboWuuaOah0UZVwM4g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhnjkP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUwMTAxMjRfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjQwMTE0VwNzcGNCCmWiAsqjZQG-sZ9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/O9yoCboWuuaOah0UZVwM4g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhnjkP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUwMTAxMjRfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjQwMTE0VwNzcGNCCmWiAsqjZQG-sZ9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/O9yoCboWuuaOah0UZVwM4g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhnjkP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUwMTAxMjRfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjQwMTE0VwNzcGNCCmWiAsqjZQG-sZ9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/O9yoCboWuuaOah0UZVwM4g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhnjkP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUwMTAxMjRfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjQwMTE0VwNzcGNCCmWiAsqjZQG-sZ9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: It's about results. | | | | | | Friend, It's not about politics. It's about policy and results. | Since day one, I've been underestimated in this race. But, that didn't stop me. Instead I said, " Underestimate me... that'll be fun." Friend, I know it's the people who decide this race. It's why I have been pounding the pavement for the last 11 months, not just in one state, but across the country. I've done over 150 town halls. I talk to every person, answer every question, and shake every hand. I listen to voters, offer real solutions, and NEVER waver in my fight for America's future. We spend our money wisely. We focus on building relationships with people on the ground and gaining their trust. And it 's paying off. It's why you're seeing us rise in the polls, whether it's Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, or nationally. And it's why you've seen this become a two-person race between me and Donald Trump. We are rising to the top and we're rising for a reason. Voters are resonating with my message and my vision for our future. I'm in this race because we have a country to save. We've got to stop the reckless spending and strengthen our economy. We've got to secure our border once and for all. We've got to make our country strong and proud again! This is not about politics. It's about policy and results. "Will you join me in the fight for our future RIGHT NOW?" | | We only have 1 DAY left before the first votes take place, and I need you by my side. YOU can help fuel my campaign. YOU can help amplify my message. YOU can help fund our get out the vote efforts. YOU can help us WIN. "Even $5 or more makes a difference. Will you chip in today?" We can't waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line. I'm counting on you ahead of the Iowa caucuses. "Please step up with a generous donation today and let’s WIN this!" | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: Emily Hall
subject: Encourage IMB missionaries today
body:
For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dabe0b8caf0c4bb6959da0a41fa9c19d&_e=IQjqi11bH-13mFy3R7Or1pAVCNUzYtO3a6x6Ffa6mlxms8874-n5jISQg5DguQGXvTA_KyTrJQbBDIZNFa64hjzT3ZXpwdoRHufKhIbIwubV4JKlnvBKXaNcKRyzdvbDMri6IK4NPEbzDC16TjdwJjnl_YplN8NHaJMW0V4A3UZmwnMxqN-pGdTkqeo8TNY6-PWb5YYRQGczUZG9RbiTtwF370Zq-XUwIDpMlqeEOucSEfBl7sKpddXM4YQVBTPe8l7OQ2dsvJQOe8PnGVDyZCI0LaGfspKlWjHdcWbi3wIA0_HXLBAoB8rIo-cAhLZboV9Hq9HeAYqIyeC1R_wEnoAeO2360Xxr_gupXG5ycXspKFco5-u7ESyfqZnRbrlxmrCMjXwvflrIV1yc2Z2xng%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,

For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope in a world where so many have yet to hear the gospel. Right now, around the globe, 3,500 missionaries share the transforming gospel message of Jesus. They do this because individuals like you provide the support they need.

We are called by Scripture to play our part in bringing His teachings to all nations, tribes, people, and languages. As we live out this mission in our everyday lives, it's crucial we also show support for our missionaries with financial support and encouragement.

Will you encourage global missionaries today by committing to support their work? By signing this declaration, you're stating:

**" I am committed to helping solve the world's greatest problem -- spiritual lostness -- by supporting global missionaries, which ensures that the International Mission Board can send and sustain a growing missionary presence among unengaged and unreached people groups."**

Your validation of this commitment not only empowers our missionary teams but also gives support for global missionaries and their worldwide reach with the love of Christ.

[**Pledge your support today by signing our declaration.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dabe0b8caf0c4bb6959da0a41fa9c19d&_e=IQjqi11bH-13mFy3R7Or1pAVCNUzYtO3a6x6Ffa6mlxms8874-n5jISQg5DguQGXvTA_KyTrJQbBDIZNFa64hjzT3ZXpwdoRHufKhIbIwubV4JKlnvBKXaNcKRyzdvbDMri6IK4NPEbzDC16TjdwJjnl_YplN8NHaJMW0V4A3UZmwnMxqN-pGdTkqeo8TNY6-PWb5YYRQGczUZG9RbiTtwF370Zq-XUwIDpMlqeEOucV5NgznjJ_UjcmaBwIggn3hFKZwPRvDUf9_XwwLtPLhUWPSkg-QKR4HGX_RVvrZF3mznczlo-7gC8M4oi2Ozl-IlWeCMjg0Q51Tky1Tr-NXXsYj971eD2OoSW_9H-Li5lh5dx1pObKhOYqKbsU2b8_QcqmrlmSlP3Co4aewGxbBg%3D%3D)

Together, let's bring the gospel message of Jesus to those who have yet to hear it.

In His service,
Emily Hall
Prayer Content Specialist
IMB Prayer Office
---

---

International Mission Board | 3806 Monument Ave. Richmond, VA 23230 | (804) 353-0515
