The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e76801ad46ac45799d2a4c6f71422aff&_e=ASocF3-Fc3cA2OfmYBwpqU7uiVB_7BlRuj7NH8rbxPG2kPumozzJ96T84O1JxVX_tPjuzqm37LgEdfg7pII2wppktQTFp93Txx78sDHRTzlaRRN9HjZlY9dwnLCP9Hqin9O2stAvtEmG5MXS7Zwyw1Yv6fCM-mwDebXVHy73tIakNNBRviR7cDHtuJmdEDhaQAx2NpIEDU-GS5wQ1lx8uImdP-XxiKmPL3jZCOZ-9ESgiXSfKyfxJ12wyFsFdTIPe3nr3oKe6od-ruaxgLCRclZQ5GjopUQjKUdIiFHmYGwiMs-22rJPp9cwpZ2u8M_pwKNU8f6m_S1C8DnhWeOE3rL_3pKvaX_RiS_yxB30TBBAI8JdITEhGIr68_iWOrVVUuynVbe0H0UHpJAHU4X4eA%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e76801ad46ac45799d2a4c6f71422aff&_e=ASocF3-Fc3cA2OfmYBwpqU7uiVB_7BlRuj7NH8rbxPG2kPumozzJ96T84O1JxVX_tPjuzqm37LgEdfg7pII2wppktQTFp93Txx78sDHRTzlaRRN9HjZlY9dwnLCP9Hqin9O2stAvtEmG5MXS7Zwyw1Yv6fCM-mwDebXVHy73tIakNNBRviR7cDHtuJmdEDhaQAx2NpIEDU-GS5wQ1lx8uImdP-XxiKmPL3jZCOZ-9ESouHnXeeHlqKTscQPpRWqTtG7XQ_NPo1GkcuRHqQ4GIVVWgwNsuv0sq4nni3oZ4TQdWL318YEZuMpqbtvDowL8ac4vUTGjwXkvD5impdHBhRyiMI1YVtfQ4smEBuV3JxTn7B6PS9FvN0N7Q8Tf3Wdb_VyP3LU97i2QjUEjA4XC3g%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e76801ad46ac45799d2a4c6f71422aff&_e=ASocF3-Fc3cA2OfmYBwpqU7uiVB_7BlRuj7NH8rbxPG2kPumozzJ96T84O1JxVX_tPjuzqm37LgEdfg7pII2wppktQTFp93Txx78sDHRTzlaRRN9HjZlY9dwnLCP9Hqin9O2stAvtEmG5MXS7Zwyw1Yv6fCM-mwDebXVHy73tIakNNBRviR7cDHtuJmdEDhaQAx2NpIEDU-GS5wQ1lx8uImdP-XxiKmPL3jZCOZ-9ESn6UlZKSC7vbLKr2CJ3Od4JTCuPJZO3ZmGSrEl_5JoFlnCWgQjtCVPDTTvuxXN9-1-FUyDHlxgTGmb9z-_f-hPNAq5rN95PwqJlQqL-kLU-LzSZavU7AZ_GLm9xtPMwvqizrcf8ravtyMJtjg_ByFx9kSdYvGfFil2segoN2rnCg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abfd16a019e04d658bd3859e6adc2a2e&_e=y08qfSUINzpcFOVGtFwHokh4BGOa0_Nu9LZgFcWVa1eP8VSes6Si5TSx4j3Aj1qdcpKPYPBp0LybghpPPdL3GOMu0rOkXj_1Dz4iD6TwEGMHZnh4xhf5pfnd5S47Qyhp1dNTL-tJsK6vwXoFeFHdL1fotptjw8eQhIDw_VPYzjOJgJO70-adlJKsmFcAkLxgN1rdyb5eeK8ldcDBPrnxijc7VYOihpp-CE7qQcGVrPGRpixSyTf9YZ8OoDgwazjkE3BDH9gztwBhNKwoMgOEEJwygBBOsNBGY4hXaQqEPfVNBOx6Ez1WAimb0L_9IyFMzqiFb3ZGeQrhs7h6RanlrgqkPIPofRFlbDfwrC__krDCBTMonwonOCWWZ1wsPTEC1x4c_PZ21jPfqdw8UsqA4UthqYwg9wheXZoHN_IBCDnzMsjEvt2_yY1c5CEFMQim)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abfd16a019e04d658bd3859e6adc2a2e&_e=y08qfSUINzpcFOVGtFwHokh4BGOa0_Nu9LZgFcWVa1eP8VSes6Si5TSx4j3Aj1qdcpKPYPBp0LybghpPPdL3GOMu0rOkXj_1Dz4iD6TwEGMHZnh4xhf5pfnd5S47Qyhp1dNTL-tJsK6vwXoFeFHdL1fotptjw8eQhIDw_VPYzjOJgJO70-adlJKsmFcAkLxgN1rdyb5eeK8ldcDBPrnxijc7VYOihpp-CE7qQcGVrPGRpixSyTf9YZ8OoDgwazjkE3BDH9gztwBhNKwoMgOEEBdoG8RGSR-5V9kS5rNLW3JjrBhsWTZMqNWah4OvVKDHkDrxpkdmBWzGSxlBMCuDQMIcSr4G18HRUdQ4TJyH8OuKvhPl-Orf3XB96nCC1z9LGK8ylD36hRKL4AhyowTRuoNVjS-NhnpiRzTYMIyMoFqSCBEcpeMPnh8nXLXNRXND)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abfd16a019e04d658bd3859e6adc2a2e&_e=y08qfSUINzpcFOVGtFwHokh4BGOa0_Nu9LZgFcWVa1eP8VSes6Si5TSx4j3Aj1qdcpKPYPBp0LybghpPPdL3GOMu0rOkXj_1Dz4iD6TwEGMHZnh4xhf5pfnd5S47Qyhp1dNTL-tJsK6vwXoFeFHdL1fotptjw8eQhIDw_VPYzjOJgJO70-adlJKsmFcAkLxgN1rdyb5eeK8ldcDBPrnxijc7VYOihpp-CE7qQcGVrPGRpixSyTf9YZ8OoDgwazjkE3BDH9gztwBhNKwoMgOEEAakYvuCU0VZfnOvAvXIxAyCsq6Qnrilu7x-JN88GN6OedU_4NOaYSNS8GqUhBBw-L1lMNr1mJLUxpfoNgAuXCfDTN13Tcz40MBdQ2QvXTloi9BmcK1ZDrTdZM8gZqDDNObwrXlNULMElPgKu55bwJdCuzV7e7CgWfqoDAD3Lgcy)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Defend the Constitution

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Full Mag News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9517197316c54ed79b36d8049402765d&_e=8inqKklxsnhy36faAOxPmwN-EQ3vNFUvZBosjbOiqY0vIFvE6D6LwpCdfEturhZJpFK9DF3Strc4wVQIMvk4UCBxP4upvhzAwrOqu6RU34b4NyLoPFqEkLvclXx2kksGF3bYmIeyDVLmpx52XxadTxYRDS8vZjjApblW5Ka-5_rrhXRzIuQwayHogC2QrEObE6fNMadDmAuIQuk_RsSG1Cr_QfhQm79T7NgYW3Z0tjYFu8qAWdqc8rk2N84-2C5OFifuMJMu2noqNNVbiqWn_DZ47yZNRn0QrFkDSZ3kwjinmebf1XxHuv_c-GqUCD2U4pTErq3UWgWL3DpfhNF33ZpGcTLcXrl5Mz4to2m6seK6vkKyzcFYvFpBOqNIqykbwDNLWpolkbvaESatndLxkQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9517197316c54ed79b36d8049402765d&_e=8inqKklxsnhy36faAOxPmwN-EQ3vNFUvZBosjbOiqY0vIFvE6D6LwpCdfEturhZJpFK9DF3Strc4wVQIMvk4UCBxP4upvhzAwrOqu6RU34b4NyLoPFqEkLvclXx2kksGF3bYmIeyDVLmpx52XxadTxYRDS8vZjjApblW5Ka-5_rrhXRzIuQwayHogC2QrEObE6fNMadDmAuIQuk_RsSG1Cr_QfhQm79T7NgYW3Z0tjYA936Fjv8wGlvVkNu48NvbkzjNZvKgyPUNKAxYVZvDz_Wn5i9uAKYi6GWwc3UYSXtjQ34qsajivdt7GMwFZi8m5ltYpVyNH7gBuZVY3-hzg2ZfycR4TrjlnFslJam3JPI7BTAO-VcUsNtfmxy_B8kFh2LVdQ8mpjzmORFZVXsX5Q%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9517197316c54ed79b36d8049402765d&_e=8inqKklxsnhy36faAOxPmwN-EQ3vNFUvZBosjbOiqY0vIFvE6D6LwpCdfEturhZJpFK9DF3Strc4wVQIMvk4UCBxP4upvhzAwrOqu6RU34b4NyLoPFqEkLvclXx2kksGF3bYmIeyDVLmpx52XxadTxYRDS8vZjjApblW5Ka-5_rrhXRzIuQwayHogC2QrEObE6fNMadDmAuIQuk_RsSG1Cr_QfhQm79T7NgYW3Z0tjaB6yXP8t1CQ_hIjhlgrcXaxwnwVRUFSZyrErKR3-D98m8bwJoTIGnP2_YauRUJtVVeIi2locHnLUr_xQA7LFSErJhJ0YKzO8GM05aVLXbjukRE-YABxRQfHBPGpbMe3ApkweRFGFmcX-GOKJGHYXuW6R96e8XigQ9eU6dYQ9uGVg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Full Mag News

name: Emily Hall
subject: Encourage IMB missionaries today
body:
For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04e95eb9933d47cf8c776d1372f8c619&_e=RBR6og3WXD8DJvQthN1mFEN6F1_x-egDyv-O5yi6l62BcPkzHHgkwsg0pGv5D0TDan0PQaCICvBdlKnM_aUV08M4q46-4AR_X1EzCz6Lsp72srTKeIWclQfOPPhDmCFiToDteK8MoGaltCflAb6S2rBH3oh84X5xFceglbqfwGr_JGq-TkStgrsGhz0UbwG6F8MzCbAeOnj50vkSdvT-JAMgjOHF59MEdghYvZ5bTAg_hJEfKFHfuOmoawWSjHCNUKr1Alt_oVDWe-hHz4qwDDXjuCTdAB_u-8heKnf27k7HZGr2h3nAVYxKk9YduUTqacxFINY50QBHLVYgVCCIhCupUwwvFuktlPbVUQl2LBRU1wpsSCthC6mR4Kow3QbKSCs4Li_1ScpITZAOOJ1sZw%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,

For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope in a world where so many have yet to hear the gospel. Right now, around the globe, 3,500 missionaries share the transforming gospel message of Jesus. They do this because individuals like you provide the support they need.

We are called by Scripture to play our part in bringing His teachings to all nations, tribes, people, and languages. As we live out this mission in our everyday lives, it's crucial we also show support for our missionaries with financial support and encouragement.

Will you encourage global missionaries today by committing to support their work? By signing this declaration, you're stating:

**" I am committed to helping solve the world's greatest problem -- spiritual lostness -- by supporting global missionaries, which ensures that the International Mission Board can send and sustain a growing missionary presence among unengaged and unreached people groups."**

Your validation of this commitment not only empowers our missionary teams but also gives support for global missionaries and their worldwide reach with the love of Christ.

[**Pledge your support today by signing our declaration.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04e95eb9933d47cf8c776d1372f8c619&_e=RBR6og3WXD8DJvQthN1mFEN6F1_x-egDyv-O5yi6l62BcPkzHHgkwsg0pGv5D0TDan0PQaCICvBdlKnM_aUV08M4q46-4AR_X1EzCz6Lsp72srTKeIWclQfOPPhDmCFiToDteK8MoGaltCflAb6S2rBH3oh84X5xFceglbqfwGr_JGq-TkStgrsGhz0UbwG6F8MzCbAeOnj50vkSdvT-JAMgjOHF59MEdghYvZ5bTAhDKpJqBgQoDvOiQIVKd8DBJ-_lSClTobAi_iYri1qjYUXnDuKeIrOACed8nPkZyZy1sxVqSX6FozZJ2Nk2Hwp9ibTnALt8SHuSSIfGcfXupoLh2SXrWWeeTmk8QdlpjPydXZbUVjYv8XcjzyWAokWGGWbyh4lPP6FuNsNYPY9lGg%3D%3D)

Together, let's bring the gospel message of Jesus to those who have yet to hear it.

In His service,
Emily Hall
Prayer Content Specialist
IMB Prayer Office

clean_body: For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope | | | Dear Friend, For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope in a world where so many have yet to hear the gospel. Right now, around the globe, 3,500 missionaries share the transforming gospel message of Jesus. They do this because individuals like you provide the support they need. We are called by Scripture to play our part in bringing His teachings to all nations, tribes, people, and languages. As we live out this mission in our everyday lives, it's crucial we also show support for our missionaries with financial support and encouragement. Will you encourage global missionaries today by committing to support their work? By signing this declaration, you're stating: " I am committed to helping solve the world's greatest problem -- spiritual lostness -- by supporting global missionaries, which ensures that the International Mission Board can send and sustain a growing missionary presence among unengaged and unreached people groups." Your validation of this commitment not only empowers our missionary teams but also gives support for global missionaries and their worldwide reach with the love of Christ. Together, let's bring the gospel message of Jesus to those who have yet to hear it. In His service, Emily Hall Prayer Content Specialist IMB Prayer Office | | International Mission Board | 3806 Monument Ave. Richmond, VA 23230 | (804) 353-0515 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38a23a634b1046d581b1bb3ed62310a2&_e=--jaSa5ctGt6IxiEwl8u4KyaTw45K4XJHdidlISnnswa6xxx4FeLmaZtKGv58Zqoydc-srWwX9L2p1wYq_4lRPhD5p0mydZsDj2nFXNNkx7g98HLqevfOy9OibdC1iG7ptdTytNzCst0EYEBtEWEknPn6iSey36TJCvQ7unTuw-kWh9e6aA6S14_GX6cEdONKVb8S13adt3uiDk2KLttRqxDMXFa4K_He-rZZHVe7C6039_UsuzXl_-4GiVEWEhP3r-1-_TAosvbvU27mkBXQNfXXLRb6P6TmK4OB1ycPbftC4MuF7pEgwW2gdb37hXwdm_W4EnKYM6NM4WdbY9JXW4pFfWjclueT7qq_fVyWd_CFEnxPcRYv_p4y8sOH7oGtz1-UUEmCk_jbLNRzF-iiiM3GTHkHNj7rBAzwpkq2W4%3D)**.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38a23a634b1046d581b1bb3ed62310a2&_e=--jaSa5ctGt6IxiEwl8u4KyaTw45K4XJHdidlISnnswa6xxx4FeLmaZtKGv58Zqoydc-srWwX9L2p1wYq_4lRPhD5p0mydZsDj2nFXNNkx7g98HLqevfOy9OibdC1iG7ptdTytNzCst0EYEBtEWEknPn6iSey36TJCvQ7unTuw-kWh9e6aA6S14_GX6cEdONKVb8S13adt3uiDk2KLttRqxDMXFa4K_He-rZZHVe7C6039_UsuzXl_-4GiVEWEhPYK9wAuxZNNbiKKQmyymuojaxP0npb0y0FRA8mbiQtCSZDzHHsEpT6nlwSpLJ5ur0BAzX54cApxwj7ku2PvaW7FqOLN7BLTiDe-P2c2rLqb4w0-PyLQjILgQNByz4BAWLX7jJvLXLXh6EoqPNViY1hjpBAY1VR2esSSy6PtVbFKY%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38a23a634b1046d581b1bb3ed62310a2&_e=--jaSa5ctGt6IxiEwl8u4KyaTw45K4XJHdidlISnnswa6xxx4FeLmaZtKGv58Zqoydc-srWwX9L2p1wYq_4lRPhD5p0mydZsDj2nFXNNkx7g98HLqevfOy9OibdC1iG7ptdTytNzCst0EYEBtEWEknPn6iSey36TJCvQ7unTuw-kWh9e6aA6S14_GX6cEdONKVb8S13adt3uiDk2KLttRqxDMXFa4K_He-rZZHVe7C6039_UsuzXl_-4GiVEWEhPzW5eLB1TUHHpO1xV3d64MyyCnENm2YgmR-YQHubUMfPfdOqwWeIAWCKe16u8smbnLEBZF8H6wDueqwtR-ih72-nZRCsElWhWOJGDYfVFhEvvklJhkXm-PGFYP-IbU8s4UJZJVNQUaS21LTvcVeRpxr6JYsGh_-WoeRSKXbVCKJg%3D)**

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38a23a634b1046d581b1bb3ed62310a2&_e=--jaSa5ctGt6IxiEwl8u4KyaTw45K4XJHdidlISnnswa6xxx4FeLmaZtKGv58Zqoydc-srWwX9L2p1wYq_4lRPhD5p0mydZsDj2nFXNNkx7g98HLqevfOy9OibdC1iG7ptdTytNzCst0EYEBtEWEknPn6iSey36TJCvQ7unTuw-kWh9e6aA6S14_GX6cEdONKVb8S13adt3uiDk2KLttRqxDMXFa4K_He-rZZHVe7C6039_UsuzXl_-4GiVEWEhPYY40D3sKMRnV7kcLgUMq0MC7MTy1O8fTrU3E68V-nk61BhPt5Yd6TIauTwTMN6F3rDJ5RkAHCj4TOL0vZjqBwkEQQtBvAaHhDhHoX-cQj3-Lz2_dTgQ2meiGj4SPoWhmEiUiewSLYG_X8oUuR2W8bVtWIOzZDdJKLA9zgYshP-I%3D)

SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38a23a634b1046d581b1bb3ed62310a2&_e=--jaSa5ctGt6IxiEwl8u4KyaTw45K4XJHdidlISnnswa6xxx4FeLmaZtKGv58Zqoydc-srWwX9L2p1wYq_4lRPhD5p0mydZsDj2nFXNNkx7g98HLqevfOy9OibdC1iG7ptdTytNzCst0EYEBtEWEknPn6iSey36TJCvQ7unTuw-kWh9e6aA6S14_GX6cEdONKVb8S13adt3uiDk2KLttRqxDMXFa4K_He-rZZHVe7C6039_UsuzXl_-4GiVEWEhPvtMYHoVZdotYIcIf2alqT1pK5u3Y12EN9TvtVUiANtcuAaYAAYwXHzc1wfLD1gZWYgKZXRrUhOKlWlaucM6LCSiG4MseEZyI6YGOe_UHSKffpiBsxVmFr0GbjmYW7HYv1TWTeZe3G3l0pyjF75HqqpJNGY8IFjs-VIZJIvTZCJ0%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38a23a634b1046d581b1bb3ed62310a2&_e=--jaSa5ctGt6IxiEwl8u4KyaTw45K4XJHdidlISnnswa6xxx4FeLmaZtKGv58Zqoydc-srWwX9L2p1wYq_4lRPhD5p0mydZsDj2nFXNNkx7g98HLqevfOy9OibdC1iG7ptdTytNzCst0EYEBtEWEknPn6iSey36TJCvQ7unTuw-kWh9e6aA6S14_GX6cEdONKVb8S13adt3uiDk2KLttRqxDMXFa4K_He-rZZHVe7C6039_UsuzXl_-4GiVEWEhPZ2CfGDC0MY71xMIkanO2J45w4gv3Ci6NdRljiJaoErXoK6sK4Ev-kvJBY5pQlUh0dN1P4YQsutqJ8VFSUbnfmbaUCm93IQrwIK2MNQqEM0-JozOPWm_fWJEig1SLne4YN1NlyiAzuMDtX8682A6rY8jK4TNRo_9J8WtPj-Qoacs%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38a23a634b1046d581b1bb3ed62310a2&_e=--jaSa5ctGt6IxiEwl8u4KyaTw45K4XJHdidlISnnswa6xxx4FeLmaZtKGv58Zqoydc-srWwX9L2p1wYq_4lRPhD5p0mydZsDj2nFXNNkx7g98HLqevfOy9OibdC1iG7ptdTytNzCst0EYEBtEWEknPn6iSey36TJCvQ7unTuw-kWh9e6aA6S14_GX6cEdONKVb8S13adt3uiDk2KLttRqxDMXFa4K_He-rZZHVe7C6039_UsuzXl_-4GiVEWEhP3RVwFUQkExVzh7WEtS5ZLFyFt2csTiOgs6Xc6lT6X4KXALLgsm7_ROVzfuwliwkvhTw5V2J0pSPjaEEkF8iazczQh-OblwIiuS5vC_aqSTsrbiA55JCq37DAsc1inQMA4JaNAAAt5QZqx1OaaERyS9PoNgH_hwrIp7sCsWT2HgY%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38a23a634b1046d581b1bb3ed62310a2&_e=--jaSa5ctGt6IxiEwl8u4KyaTw45K4XJHdidlISnnswa6xxx4FeLmaZtKGv58Zqoydc-srWwX9L2p1wYq_4lRPhD5p0mydZsDj2nFXNNkx7g98HLqevfOy9OibdC1iG7ptdTytNzCst0EYEBtEWEknPn6iSey36TJCvQ7unTuw-kWh9e6aA6S14_GX6cEdONKVb8S13adt3uiDk2KLttRqxDMXFa4K_He-rZZHVe7C6039_UsuzXl_-4GiVEWEhPuOg9oKsUCb4GaR-H6oJAR4pDvC7o2zDLYxui6Ak83THtWm9q928ASisJetaEMrV3eiTEOMNV4lb06WMdxvO6-J0KS1gOLb_PwRH7lXQuatsK2W0qJBBmjiEMvcw2HpygoyZ95Iam_zgbbfh57Rz3wdOkSGHkIoHAVlcxT3tMcco%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38a23a634b1046d581b1bb3ed62310a2&_e=--jaSa5ctGt6IxiEwl8u4KyaTw45K4XJHdidlISnnswa6xxx4FeLmaZtKGv58Zqoydc-srWwX9L2p1wYq_4lRPhD5p0mydZsDj2nFXNNkx7g98HLqevfOy9OibdC1iG7ptdTytNzCst0EYEBtEWEknPn6iSey36TJCvQ7unTuw-kWh9e6aA6S14_GX6cEdONKVb8S13adt3uiDk2KLttRqxDMXFa4K_He-rZZHVe7C6039_UsuzXl_-4GiVEWEhPmeUoQnJbXsNFGfUL7oWEEPGy5JYzpuFaTSm4-C_eDBFmZ8y2MABvLH1Uk1iKiGxAhnQGndcwybcSP1wpfiL2KMua2wOAKADjLtfL_pxwb5frLTrPYl2xeEyFRyITEgnC86hlDluV9r4CGHZY5uChzsPvTvSPpFawBOvTfEBd_B4%3D)

WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

clean_body: Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. | | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Dear Peter,
Running for President requires determination and grit.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has it in spades.
And he doesn't want to keep it to himself, _he wants all Americans to thrive and live healthier, happier, and longer_.
**In fact, he has spent a lifetime doing just that.**
RFK Jr.'s activism around toxic pollution led him to lobby successfully for the removal of mercury from most childhood vaccinations in the United States.
He went on to advocate for the restoration of standard product liability and placebo testing requirements for vaccine manufacturers.
The pharmaceutical mega-corporations are by far the most heavily fined and criminally prosecuted companies in America, yet also some of the most powerful.
His nonprofit, Children’s Health Defense, has long been a key crusader against the corruption of this industry and its influence in government.
| | **As President, RFK Jr. will fight for a healthier, less drug-dependent America.**
---
RFK Jr. knows we can all do better.
But it’s going to take a President who has a history of standing up for those who have no one doing so.
_It's going to take a President who has the strength, determination, and resolve_ to challenge the corrupt and failed Health Institutions — the WHO, HHS, NIH, CDC, and the FDA.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=grit_1_14_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
---
They must be held accountable for their actions, and their inactions, and subject to fundamental reform.
RFK Jr. has spent a lifetime seeking justice and health freedom for all Americans, and he will continue to do so as your President.
**Please let Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. hear from you** [**with a gift of $24 a month for 2024; or $11, $35, $50, $120 or more today.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=grit_1_14_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3)
America needs a President who has shown the resilience to fight for a healthier, stronger America — and one who will keep the health agencies in Washington and around the globe accountable.
Team Kennedy

body:
Read More... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/27bf9b4d77d0/victoryinjesus-5432998?e=9dd54a4530)
---
|

| [ ](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=9a457db0dd&e=9dd54a4530)
---
Watch Channel 5 News reporting on the Armor of God Vigil held at Chimneyrock Elementary School on January 10, 2024 in Cordova, Tennessee.
| Peter

For years, the liberal Left has been successful in dividing us. At the Armor of God Prayer Vigil held at Chimneyrock Elementary School on Wednesday, January 10, 2024, there were more than 100 people who braved the cold weather and showed up to pray. There were pastors and ministers. There were people from all religious denominations. There were Protestants, Catholics, Muslims, etc., Blacks, Whites, Hispanics, etc., united for this call. There were adults, teenagers and children. I'm sure there were also Republicans and Democrats. God sent Gideon prayer warriors and we stood united.

An assistant principal and a school board member came out and thanked us for being there. They were Christians. They stated that they were stuck between a rock and a hard place by obeying the law, when it conflicted with their conscience.

The media stated that the children had a good time at the Satanic Club meeting. We all know that satan entices, lies, and deceives, but when reality sets in, people are ensnared in his trap of evil.

We were told by administration that there were only 6 children in attendance at the Satanic Club meeting, out of a population of hundreds of children in the school. Please pray for those children.

I respect my fellow Republicans who asked me to cancel the Armor of God Prayer Vigil at Chimneyrock Elementary School. It pained me to ignore their demands, but, by then, the plans were already in motion. I prayed to ask God to fight this battle, HE expected me to be obedient and to walk by Faith. Therefore, after much prayer, we faced the enemy on the grounds the enemy wanted to occupy. It was important for us to gather at the school to take back the grounds for God, and to protect our children.

Our work is not over. We need legislation to protect our children. Legislation which will allow our school administrators to say, "no" when evil comes after our children. I'm willing to sponsor that legislation which will restore the school's ability to say "no" to evil and "yes" to good, when protecting our children.

Peter, be a vital part of your children's futures. If you send me to DC as your Congressman, I pledge to encourage and support legislation that will take the handcuffs off our teacher's wrists and give them the leverage they need to protect our vulnerable kids.

I will pull my petition to run for Congress in February. In order for my name to be on the ballot, the Party requires a payment of $2,500. [Please help me raise the $2,500 by donating $25, $50, $75, or $100 or whatever you can today.](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=fe1028f6fb&e=9dd54a4530)

God bless Memphis and God bless America!

Please donate TODAY at [https://secure.anedot.com/bergmann/donate](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=629637bedf&e=9dd54a4530)

**~~Charlotte**

clean_body: Read More... | | | | | | | Watch Channel 5 News reporting on the Armor of God Vigil held at Chimneyrock Elementary School on January 10, 2024 in Cordova, Tennessee. | Peter For years, the liberal Left has been successful in dividing us. At the Armor of God Prayer Vigil held at Chimneyrock Elementary School on Wednesday, January 10, 2024, there were more than 100 people who braved the cold weather and showed up to pray. There were pastors and ministers. There were people from all religious denominations. There were Protestants, Catholics, Muslims, etc., Blacks, Whites, Hispanics, etc., united for this call. There were adults, teenagers and children. I'm sure there were also Republicans and Democrats. God sent Gideon prayer warriors and we stood united. An assistant principal and a school board member came out and thanked us for being there. They were Christians. They stated that they were stuck between a rock and a hard place by obeying the law, when it conflicted with their conscience. The media stated that the children had a good time at the Satanic Club meeting. We all know that satan entices, lies, and deceives, but when reality sets in, people are ensnared in his trap of evil. We were told by administration that there were only 6 children in attendance at the Satanic Club meeting, out of a population of hundreds of children in the school. Please pray for those children. I respect my fellow Republicans who asked me to cancel the Armor of God Prayer Vigil at Chimneyrock Elementary School. It pained me to ignore their demands, but, by then, the plans were already in motion. I prayed to ask God to fight this battle, HE expected me to be obedient and to walk by Faith. Therefore, after much prayer, we faced the enemy on the grounds the enemy wanted to occupy. It was important for us to gather at the school to take back the grounds for God, and to protect our children. Our work is not over. We need legislation to protect our children. Legislation which will allow our school administrators to say, "no" when evil comes after our children. I'm willing to sponsor that legislation which will restore the school's ability to say "no" to evil and "yes" to good, when protecting our children. Peter, be a vital part of your children's futures. If you send me to DC as your Congressman, I pledge to encourage and support legislation that will take the handcuffs off our teacher's wrists and give them the leverage they need to protect our vulnerable kids. I will pull my petition to run for Congress in February. In order for my name to be on the ballot, the Party requires a payment of $2,500. God bless Memphis and God bless America! Please donate TODAY at ~~Charlotte MORE NEWS ARTICLES FROM NATIONAL MEDIA | | NEWS | ---|---|--- | | | ---|--- Action News 5 Charlotte Bergmann , | The Washington Post Charlotte Bergmann organized the protest and told the station the turnout was larger than she expected. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Editors=20at=20Broad=20+=20Liberty?=
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: William Penn Statue Removal? | Chronic Absenteeism in Upper Darby + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | |
### __Broad + Liberty's_ Weekly Reads:_
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=96fa3b59bf&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| _**Then they came for William Penn.**_
---
| Just when you thought the wave of iconoclast mayhem was over, **another statute almost got pulled down**. This time, it was the federal government attempting to vandalize itself as the National Park Service announced plans to remove **the statue of William Penn** from Philadelphia’s Welcome Park before cooler heads prevailed. As **Guy Ciarrocchi** explained, we need to remain vigilant against those who would tear down all evidence of our nation’s history in service of a new, radical agenda. [Read more at _Broad + Liberty_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7c24474979&e=b7b3eddce2).
---
|
---
|
### _Other Top Stories..._
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4b3be02865&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
**Beth Ann Rosica** wrote about the continuing failures in local schools since the 2020-2021 lockdowns, noting the sobering fact that Upper Darby Middle School students [are more likely to be chronically absent from school than proficient in math](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=73bb73d5a1&e=b7b3eddce2). The district puts “equity” at the top of its agenda, but how can students get an equal chance at success in the world if they’re not all being taught to read and perform basic math?
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9b8e29e635&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
**Seth Higgins** wrote this week about county governments, perhaps the least understood system of government in the average Pennsylvanian’s life. [Who in our county seats is responsible for what? ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=05ef61c3f0&e=b7b3eddce2)The answer is not always clear.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=72885ae708&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
National correspondent **Andy Bloom** filled us in on the attempts in Colorado and Maine to unilaterally exclude former President Donald Trump from the ballot. Is the latest legal maneuver, which supporters claim is justified by the Fourteenth Amendment, another example of far-Left Democrats [shredding our republic’s institutions in order to “save democracy”?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7383f9cc71&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
| _**What We’re Reading...**_
---
| Anti-Israel protesters are increasingly resorting to guerilla tactics in American cities, blocking traffic on vital roads, bridges, and train stations in a bizarre attempt to raise awareness for their cause. In _City Journal_ , **Nicole Gelinas** writes that it’s time to [end this lawlessness](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1f1fd2beee&e=b7b3eddce2) and jail those who seek to bring our cities to a standstill.****
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. As a new year and a new election cycle begins, please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject matter, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).
As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_
---
|

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Will you endorse a U.S. Navy SEAL for Senate?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
This is my most critical mission to date, and I am counting on you to enlist in the fight | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=8a68c971a412434d9ce115046be8b16f&_t=nH8OwRXDE_jnxgz-LnvEj6EZI0t3Rxo2m6Tj1GOjMnr6qiADc3rmQ9y_FNnn_l1uZDSMRngqOJHLdEWHvRcVWjgadeHv1Z0kYMy9WD4RB1w%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=8a68c971a412434d9ce115046be8b16f&_t=nH8OwRXDE_jnxgz-LnvEj6EZI0t3Rxo2m6Tj1GOjMnr6qiADc3rmQ9y_FNnn_l1uZDSMRngqOJHLdEWHvRcVWjgadeHv1Z0kYMy9WD4RB1w%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8a68c971a412434d9ce115046be8b16f&_e=-aAPXUVCru4m7nOpondYEELma7kSOXfbifOMb6LTTS-NmAANS44PFEdRkNGp0kJwRl8FCBDJGVIbnrEKbpLr61kPGxb_7E9HkyvHdQr7XopJ0xPYrh0gs5n3xCZufic6ITjbyGFzZpqKU5B1gbSOhbl-PUlJNj9KIGBudUJoEr11rY9Hits5SGVZHyws0UGGO1Lw9qaeTKWj2dR7WPM610UrkfoLkwJ5ney-UtJdaRAud9sQVoYb_DklfLR3qNrAA_bSuCg57-m2H8VNXcSggwoBZIWzXWUJGypwu7cwWVX7KzW14QB0ZPVWnoZL_kl5wuGA9j_sRWxBIXd4pLY5W8b_R1HG-zvlFfjaDvFriEoXSauE7gaurwEX3nlYr_IliQCm3-ncgwfOkjv7w5QrsslUxt1wq7tUhW_Q0tBq0Fg%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8a68c971a412434d9ce115046be8b16f&_e=-aAPXUVCru4m7nOpondYEELma7kSOXfbifOMb6LTTS-NmAANS44PFEdRkNGp0kJwRl8FCBDJGVIbnrEKbpLr61kPGxb_7E9HkyvHdQr7XopJ0xPYrh0gs5n3xCZufic6ITjbyGFzZpqKU5B1gbSOhbl-PUlJNj9KIGBudUJoEr11rY9Hits5SGVZHyws0UGGO1Lw9qaeTKWj2dR7WPM610UrkfoLkwJ5ney-UtJdaRAud9sQVoYb_DklfLR3qNrAxyq-5dILoDqSr1HjEkL_lD5bfEAKr7uo4k3Tc13CnSWOifFM3XHekLzF4X8hGpoPDhrAxBOh6ZcSCXCpTBMyE44xCc-Ga7SMeKygSxsa71CH_NcI58IxAJAfl4pGAKBmkQykk5ln2537QqfWTjNrF-0bwmhD-foEzzre48VVVWQ%3D)**.

Good morning, Peter. I wanted to send top supporters a quick message about what I'm fighting for in the Senate.

**One thing you should know about me is this:** Back when I was a kid, my dad – a World War II veteran and a Purple Heart recipient – got really sick and had to quit his job. Veteran benefits, food stamps and workforce programs helped my family of nine get back on our feet during a difficult few months.

**Looking back on that tough time, I'm so glad our country told my family, "We've got your back," instead of saying, "You're on your own." **Now, I'm fighting every day in the U.S. Senate to make sure working families have that same support – by making the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, guaranteeing paid family leave, making child care affordable and easy to find, protecting reproductive rights and so much more.
I promise to keep fighting for a strong economy that works for _everyone, _but to continue this important work, I need your help to defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. **Politico is already reporting this year's map is "hell" for Democrats, so I need to reach my $50,000 mid-month goal before tomorrow at midnight to keep the Senate blue.**
**If you're ready to join my fight for working families, will you donate $5 today to help me reach my first fundraising deadline of the year?**

Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm-email-2024-q1/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77058807/449246085/-1442338188?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk210-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODIwMmRmOS1lNWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QsUVOt3OVIPlvjNy5U_ITZreB_J6WPbQK53VfNk6MgM=)**
Thanks for your support,

Patty Murray
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=ZYEhE3yMYDbSaAvRuDpakkeiku1wgGxNG%2FFhjHhFzVg780wD0UmKAvrUtlf1eeu49ExHmXz1oivi1dbtUdf2mt2V6upn8Xq5qg5rJZQc2wfCguvaEnSNHN2%2Fnhpv1Wji2KbbE61dMFW9iiXjM5TFMrgtOw6K3oK7ez1Hpwg3uskWaCqfXd%2FI2yF%2Fq%2Fely0bqsKY3Rpqz3cGIfvE%2BypxC6yCrgW%2F64DPBq1cXvCLcdNh3e6pTTQ89jzOOiSmPiOhMGcYpCCYDW2gR6SJUnqRMEPGbjxOWQi%2BvkPRYYNzdsASwMPaLDQj4PSv2wb5%2FVqEZfJkEybTMpiqU4D%2Bo9sL%2FVp5FgEzMUk%2F44xJibpGEaI6Ir8%2BOaLi6A4Yqq8DSPub47rOJqe098bAfcrFycnUq%2FiVOtDyLtUV%2BZYUIhFdQI%2BJ8PC2%2B6jUOhJCglvWBEZ0V) People for Patty Murray

name: Elissa Slotkin for Michigan
subject: Our opponents’ records on Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1024%2E135344%2E8oQ-a8)

Hey team,
Now that we are firmly in the election year, we wanted to give you a rundown on what’s happening on the other side of this race. Right now, there are four credible candidates, all duking it out ahead of the August primary here in Michigan: former Congressman Mike Rogers, former Congressman Peter Meijer, former Detroit Police Chief James Craig, and wealthy businessman Sandy Pensler. **And if there’s one rule of political gravity in Republican primaries these days, it’s that they become a race to the Trumpiest,** and that’s certainly true here in Michigan.
So here’s the rundown on our opponents record on Trump:
**Mike Rogers:** Rogers was a leader of Trump’s Presidential transition team but was abruptly fired. He then spent almost a decade criticizing Donald Trump, even as a paid commentator for CNN. He’s been quoted as saying it’s “time to move on [from Trump],” criticizing his efforts to overturn the 2020 election, and eviscerating Trump’s national security record. He’s referred to Trump as a “gangster”, and for the early part of 2023, explored running against Trump in the GOP primary. Rogers then entered the Senate race, and started reading the political tea leaves: he released a video attacking his former colleagues at the FBI for doing their jobs, and then last week Rogers formally endorsed Trump for President in an op-ed, echoing MAGA language and talking points.
**Peter Meijer:** Meijer called Trump “unfit for office” when he famously voted to impeach Donald Trump in 2021 for his role in the January 6th insurrection and his attempt to overturn the election. As a consequence, he lost his primary election and his seat in Congress. In late 2023, with a Senate bid on the line, Meijer flipped and said he’d support Trump for President – selling out his values in the hopes of winning a Senate seat.
**James Craig:** Craig endorsed Trump way back in September and is positioning himself as the strongest Trump ally in the race. He’s made almost no public appearances in his campaign, but has instead been a regular guest on Steve Bannon’s podcast and other far-right shows as he tries to curry Trump’s favor. He’s quick to criticize Rogers and Meijer for their previous lack of support for Trump.
**Sandy Pensler:** Pensler entered this race with a video that included a heavy dose of far-right messaging that was a clear signal to Trump that he is willing to fall in line. This is in contrast to 2018, when he said Trump spoke at a “fourth-grade level.”
What do all of these opponents have in common? They are all willing to say and do anything to get elected – even if it is obviously hypocritical. At the end of the day, it shows each of their characters.
But while they sprint to the far right to try to win Trump’s endorsement, we’re focused on a different audience—everyday Michigan voters. We’ve got a lot of work to do to make sure all four Republicans are held accountable to their extremist records, and introduce Elissa to all 10 million people in Michigan.
That’s why we’re asking: [**Will you chip in $3 to help us send a reasonable, level-headed leader like Elissa to the Senate and keep Michigan blue in November?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=2&akid=1024%2E135344%2E8oQ-a8)**

clean_body: Hey team, Now that we are firmly in the election year, we wanted to give you a rundown on what’s happening on the other side of this race. Right now, there are four credible candidates, all duking it out ahead of the August primary here in Michigan: former Congressman Mike Rogers, former Congressman Peter Meijer, former Detroit Police Chief James Craig, and wealthy businessman Sandy Pensler. And if there’s one rule of political gravity in Republican primaries these days, it’s that they become a race to the Trumpiest, and that’s certainly true here in Michigan. So here’s the rundown on our opponents record on Trump: Mike Rogers: Rogers was a leader of Trump’s Presidential transition team but was abruptly fired. He then spent almost a decade criticizing Donald Trump, even as a paid commentator for CNN. He’s been quoted as saying it’s “time to move on [from Trump],” criticizing his efforts to overturn the 2020 election, and eviscerating Trump’s national security record. He’s referred to Trump as a “gangster”, and for the early part of 2023, explored running against Trump in the GOP primary. Rogers then entered the Senate race, and started reading the political tea leaves: he released a video attacking his former colleagues at the FBI for doing their jobs, and then last week Rogers formally endorsed Trump for President in an op-ed, echoing MAGA language and talking points. Peter Meijer: Meijer called Trump “unfit for office” when he famously voted to impeach Donald Trump in 2021 for his role in the January 6th insurrection and his attempt to overturn the election. As a consequence, he lost his primary election and his seat in Congress. In late 2023, with a Senate bid on the line, Meijer flipped and said he’d support Trump for President – selling out his values in the hopes of winning a Senate seat. James Craig: Craig endorsed Trump way back in September and is positioning himself as the strongest Trump ally in the race. He’s made almost no public appearances in his campaign, but has instead been a regular guest on Steve Bannon’s podcast and other far-right shows as he tries to curry Trump’s favor. He’s quick to criticize Rogers and Meijer for their previous lack of support for Trump. Sandy Pensler: Pensler entered this race with a video that included a heavy dose of far-right messaging that was a clear signal to Trump that he is willing to fall in line. This is in contrast to 2018, when he said Trump spoke at a “fourth-grade level.” What do all of these opponents have in common? They are all willing to say and do anything to get elected – even if it is obviously hypocritical. At the end of the day, it shows each of their characters. But while they sprint to the far right to try to win Trump’s endorsement, we’re focused on a different audience—everyday Michigan voters. We’ve got a lot of work to do to make sure all four Republicans are held accountable to their extremist records, and introduce Elissa to all 10 million people in Michigan. That’s why we’re asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you for your support. Team Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My family, my teachers, my Marines, and you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I never thought that hundreds of thousands of people from all over the country would support me.
#

Peter — hey.
I’ve got about 15 minutes between calls and meetings right now. Might not sound like much, but to me it’s a gift.
I wanted to take a few of those minutes to let you know how critical your support is to my campaign, and to ask you to make a contribution if you can.
So look: I was never supposed to be here. Statistically, a Latino kid with a single mother like me was never supposed to get into college.
But when I told my family I was going to Harvard, they didn’t laugh at me — they supported me. I had teachers who did everything they could to get me there. And I made it. I got in.
A couple years later I joined the Marines to serve my country. When I got sent to Iraq, it was hard to think further ahead than even a few hours at a time. I lost a lot of friends. But thanks to the guys I served with, I made it home.
I struggled with PTSD after that. Some really dark times. And I realized that I needed to find a new way to serve. But back when I was just that poor kid sleeping on the floor in our apartment, I never thought I’d run for Congress — let alone win.
I never would’ve thought that I’d run for Senate either, or that I’d have hundreds of thousands of people support me. That close to 150,000 of them would donate to my campaign. It’s humbling, and I’m very grateful.
And I never thought I’d need to ask someone like you to do more than that. But if we’re going to win in Arizona, if we’re going to defeat Kari Lake and take this seat back from Kyrsten Sinema, that’s what I have to do.
I’ve got to ask you to join them and make your first donation to my campaign.
Whether it was my family, my teachers, my Marines, or supporters like you, I’ve never done anything on my own. I’ve always had help. And I know enough to know when to ask for it. So please:
[**Can you add your donation of $3 to the thousands of others who have chipped in so far? Whatever success we have this November is going to come from the support of people like you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=1&akid=1690%2E734936%2ElbrSAZ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-jan24.sBVyEj&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=20&akid=1690%2E734936%2ElbrSAZ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-jan24.Z_9ALj&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=21&akid=1690%2E734936%2ElbrSAZ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-jan24.J-vKsf&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=22&akid=1690%2E734936%2ElbrSAZ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-jan24.DfsFQf&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=23&akid=1690%2E734936%2ElbrSAZ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-jan24.7U1Rob&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=24&akid=1690%2E734936%2ElbrSAZ)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-jan24.7CeOzz&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=25&akid=1690%2E734936%2ElbrSAZ)**
---
****
Thanks. Really.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: State Democrats announce 2024 battleground investments while Republicans attack abortion access … and everything else you need to know in the states.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, January 14th, 2024 | | |
---
| |
---|---
| [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGYXQVGX5KfUB2QipDlOQqUHEqNdbcrmWW1P0PvLKqEX36kFh37GyVJzeAXDSdOnpzbyMBzdqQV1G5y8GrhPyNEjQVEnHK8iZ4mIoRup7BP6jYKRjsAvcpwGQCIN5afO9LBf_HmG9TAFmixYrIFvEApUxG5e9T7lZLtYQxe4xTChGEkdtY-e4cvzm5NsjK-j4OuvFBIfhL29D5GHrZXwF7aa9RIpmKMSq-JqZ1d4GXog759oBYYcKUJibhJqHHvShWfHuk2X4UudTfjNyRozCI4zy2nwk8Jdh8Hkd0x7KkNMD5TirdQeQddveXD-M3Wlyi3J6q_XtL0xMvUq4lX0G0OmYblLVc94Yr363Rna9ms82rGqSglqE7V4h_TZM69FTuidt2WHYcIQbefYZ8HoyVxI_vMNt72TPHN4n9kqPzQTSacBETGi69vyewwLvyNCCcgVB4YWgECDqCirF2g-gedlYbXoEcSuNNk3InWyuw4BFHMV2C08EV7FXYk9pjV_suLMbDe6tvrNg_fLPXk50vTsMHcBU27tRN5tnlmYkSZCfQ/42z/zB6EDOMMQkGbEzb4oIGNyw/h0/pZ0Mo9SfB1XXpIWsDu0M4YuHEWnrScaA7jT2Q8qdr6Q)
---
1️⃣ **_Florida:_ House Republican files bill to ban abortion**
In Florida, a House Republican filed a bill that could lead to an extreme ban on virtually all abortions in the state. [The bill specifically criminalizes doctors and threatens them with third-degree felonies and time in prison – essentially restricting all access to abortion → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/A7GQnnr_XzUYyessq5BiRBvSoYY0NxZiuGEayOXeiqcsCVhLpVqKVd37xIm7YOrp0NHmerIo10jL6khA89SqKTNnCaZJmIsxpb3n5FjqWTT3upoQt0pI0DifApi0dMGa_sasjJj5JIw2RkiI4zteCiCBtWNW66UmWbB9TSfE3bJY-cYFns8WXwal9t43Af0NE8hF2NNtGZ-dwnm93b2qO2qvnI8xlLm5UkF1SLtG3_d-ePMieBPu8zIQPI-YWeHuTakLN_Fw2YaBZg4qfFbALQ5R2WG0cRW3tzfZNCYvFT09UJn1egVgz8QyDg1HOSThRdM8SjEnWg02l-TPjzjsnoIJYHsPJ8RTuTWK-rGWssoyfkaycsIioK7OcA-oAzkUPSR80BTxtx8nSxuUTMOtO5YkeQQxmQueuZHIJUVz4NQ6B4-1T0GZrme6cljIDgQyEZ0v9TVjKs0qcf7-BBRPz8RklG2tzzlOZ5AbOu8fKmPJO7DgPi2kwI1HpDvWw4WAyiogfnuQb4hqufE9rRuyejoeTXEDbttNq4v0d6fciRHg5NNeny_Llc6OBaULwvKcK_Gi08vVwa-3UOjkExQ0Fks5ja52LyQKhce2dFJTolEprpeSZzTmWjSt4RFo5JG7sccvVrF98sVra_4WdPuaAYDsejUW05sMi9Cry9xkqL1zYBDUaZR-LUrkWvvLI4kIo9IcdiP-_2aLC8TGYRF9AcutFDGNSelgjj6nLc6jtyNnApTnD2SIGw8C9P-yfTQq/42z/zB6EDOMMQkGbEzb4oIGNyw/h1/iIbKuwoHXWt6RKmWo0wa73nwQ6fNRoilFCyyneuuuh4)

2️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Speaker Don Scott becomes the first Black speaker of the House **
In Virginia, Speaker Don Scott made history as he was sworn in as the first Black speaker of the Virginia House of Delegates. [**Democrats won full control of the Virginia legislature in November, marking one of our most important victories of 2023 →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEK_It6EH_8VwiNW7tp4p-ZlB51iHofQCWvD9JltjEu8MX3wqEseQhGD9EeKPBdo0ZsBRj3AjWQMtXsGIUrKFKCIBpKNqUQKDjQxKvnklpotofjYxVphQfA4F6j0Jc7JzzMc0gf_p4a1tp5NBqoUAfyKjqI_GUbnNb9Zun6GxweBS3AuyzYUWqHZ-cp4tBM4GTtKJvzxP4ZvwkwbaOCOZ7DFChDq731rle-y-14ZWJY56lvSQyKHHbAJt8lXrYDbsQDcjJtHHTNb4VRXoRAnBZ_opvors5qFyrHNkjMBkrQA5wzKK8fldZTn_pJ7oG8wlOTAZEi6jh73w4coSLkV5A-sy7Xw4tf2GF5zCoU1E_dWxk8d8L-QpCNjeWwi8omfxaSpZ7BybQuEnqDr7SHOszs0fxFv8vuwEHKoxrihr8Q-lK8GVzwCWhY-pf7qIrT7jfYb37bmQ-0oR77JQcclMhZmI3q1HEwnl7gBJM597fKNH1O0fk2H-_R6OdVEW04C8kXljW4WuWZuFEqtdc_QzjGjc2kxR7DXPFLVSvV_XpZadOSYEyOTstlF1Wr8lbT96FCV0CXAhNAJCabAGEVU1bYFRK0sDzyuRmDiAxfFU0KJ2wvYkrmRypkjTi-5B1ZPk4DdObXINsUyeAoQx1l7wQ75Sysx5b3kkNbmgY0RSCbc8a82XIHm25FQRjZNOFHyYAWgZHuNdsQLw2jxJ6Hc8Bc/42z/zB6EDOMMQkGbEzb4oIGNyw/h2/oUE5qdZgK1ojyAC1FEFFzQb1CQgprT0tIQF0cIX6mDY)
3️⃣ **_Tennessee:_ GOP attacks LGBTQ+ representation on school campuses **
In Tennessee, a Republican filed a bill attacking ‘political’ flags on campus and specifically attacking the LGBTQ+ pride flag – a symbol of inclusion and visibility. [**The lawmaker claims the flag is ‘indoctrination’ in an overt attempt to exclude LGBTQ+ youth →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE5NaHxrWba8fN-ZOaMLV8PoE_2CtnYpnLazlj5fLwWeDn4GZkKeneM1WrPTMVCaBQgm9vSz55uSfW4NeSOE-ezjUYoOIAZB1EMNC_zrgF_Ll81gLJUdF_nev6NAfy190-XnJnN6xQdV6nnP-NiXKn1nKdaTDpu3RFwm7fUexbbAA8waFqcAV3rAj4tK7OxXmbCWMon5nrpPNKfegYxh5rj2bB3mIC2KxmwgFmT25ohw12UjMAtrlg75FM2I6mHi49JkpRLOBAinQUMRx2oY9Sf9hTkQbpZJJ3QzR7bnPUyIzx2fc72Sls0POmmVKythT-EFydTNQy9KJPB40gKMMxGQwMIcuA_IldK6MSe22-aEBV-4vWyNHioNwNdn77-k7kbK6sV_KftHjpqDI75BfVbxO04NY8AQVl6deLeNAUkUg0q_7Hi73FdXYzCTABKaEDqmGYNnYBER-hrypoNK9gEfRGuSJUV2ZfuK2Lf29_BlyoE2_OZ5NJL0GW-eNT07OXCksUzZt1PLlNytYwFrpi_lCoEeZWAixYMmUx40WrRM7URBgtPbFNEop-_0oX7gGIvFX70slh2-JD_EU0Y932GvqszzCnWIS3TFeuJicj_TaXBfd96XPtMncJAFpI48x8DFM6souTuqiD9j_h90J-_qT3wCLWsPNFmxy0CgUNn9MdY5CmX_26GwZvTJpECb5VTJzx2EFy2diSu8cMIGM8RxAUfr1VCooW58PQ5TaI4MrAlDPS1FyYxNOrJmqqP5JQ/42z/zB6EDOMMQkGbEzb4oIGNyw/h3/T6HivliW0YsgmgUUIbFqReWKrK7jIKjL9Mf4wayixIY)
4️⃣ **_Read:_ The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee’s Official 2024 Roadmap **
2024 promises to be the year of the states, and thanks to supporters like you, we are in a great position to build on the momentum of our historic wins in 2022 and 2023. body:
You NEED to see this
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20645%2E4449941%2Eg1uWll)
---
**Look, we found this vital warning from Pete Buttigieg and we knew you needed to see it:**
* * *
| [_2X-MATCH ACTIVATED_ : Chip in $7 now to help fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College and support our work »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36027?t=7&akid=20645%2E4449941%2Eg1uWll)
---
* * *
When we emailed you yesterday, we thought Democrats would jump at the chance to abolish the Electoral College... **_but hardly anyone donated!_**

We’re **way** behind pace to make our $9,900 ad payment. _If we don’t make up the difference soon, we could be forced to pull down our ads._
[**Listen, that’s why it’s crucial that we raise the final $8,941 to fully fund our Electoral College ads and support our work before midnight tomorrow. Please, chip in $7 (2X-MATCHED) now »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36027?t=8&akid=20645%2E4449941%2Eg1uWll)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[2X-MATCH $7 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36028?t=9&akid=20645%2E4449941%2Eg1uWll)

We need your help,

fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=20645%2E4449941%2Eg1uWll). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=20645%2E4449941%2Eg1uWll).**

FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives. Please, consider making a . name: Ted Cruz
subject: FWD: re: this year’s unprecedented stakes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | Hey Fellow Conservative, just following up on my team’s urgent message below. As they mentioned, my seat in the U.S. Senate will be the Democrats’ #1 target this year, and keeping Texas red starts with YOU. Please use this secure link to chip in $25 (or more, if you can) to STOP out-of-state Democrats from flipping Texas blue: **[https://secure.winred.com/ted-cruz/january-mid-month-deadline](http://trk.tedcruz.)** Thanks for your help at this vitally important moment! -Ted Cruz Sent from my iPhone
---
|
---
From: Team Cruz To: All Supporters Date: Saturday, January 13, 2024Subject: re: this year’s unprecedented stakes
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz._7TezkzaaAR4vOzg)
---
Fellow Conservative, As you know, we have a vitally important election year ahead of us, and the future of our nation is at stake. _National Democrats think they have a real chance to FLIP TEXAS BLUE for the first time in decades, and they’re making Senator Cruz their #1 target. _ We need your help to stop them, Fellow Conservative. Will you please send in a $25 donation (or more) to stand with us today?
---
[**KEEPING TEXAS RED STARTS WITH YOU** **DONATE NOW >>>** ](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Our January financial deadline is tomorrow at midnight, and it may be the most significant monthly deadline we’ve ever faced. **Out-of-state Democrats are gearing up to pour up to $100 MILLION into Texas to attack us non-stop.** Your contribution will help us fight back with TV and digital ads that answer their lies with the truth – and fuel our grassroots efforts to get conservatives to the polls. If we wait until this fall to ramp up these crucial campaign operations, it will be TOO LATE. We need your help to prepare for the battle right now! **[Thanks in advance for pitching in $25 or more to help us hit our fundraising goal before tomorrow’s deadline.](http://trk.tedcruz.-EyryQq2KQ)** Your support has never been more needed or more appreciated! -Team Cruz
---
[**KEEPING TEXAS RED STARTS WITH YOU** **DONATE NOW >>>** ](http://trk.tedcruz.)
