Your support has never been more needed or more appreciated! -Team Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. id:2024-01-10-18:42:19:347t |

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a501933085547af9d0350b782dbc9fc&_e=pvDYm0GBaEzhQhmWPeZAjwyajmFAgCkdoqR5yAFrZFxlsvb3y6k8loGeBrQN4eTDzSsBqnUzVyGs5PLHJOl26LanYxhWej_GtegX35j0TvcCXsW2tIZSRbGL8zv1YBgpJyz9SLbc05am0Fj7TiFN5mtHu7WvKi1q6EfTVUNWt2ndBzt873ogX4eYsBq8sci13UQrO_jCfkP8vK-5_HmBq3-rWZDXrTwfMcR-j67P9_IaoMjyDpmUHBz_gXBYa2ZpFwGizZ4cJ9sHohEsXF3Y-LuFY2kMEw2sny5OSZGhlSFXQRsioistiz7ap_IjfyBAwEqsRrwHJvil8B5N8AdiI__5mxbnjJIhEz8XixEUFOjJbNRV_OZRHjwhVtkUjPdQplE9s_l6iYQBDvoo__DE1g%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a501933085547af9d0350b782dbc9fc&_e=pvDYm0GBaEzhQhmWPeZAjwyajmFAgCkdoqR5yAFrZFxlsvb3y6k8loGeBrQN4eTDzSsBqnUzVyGs5PLHJOl26LanYxhWej_GtegX35j0TvcCXsW2tIZSRbGL8zv1YBgpJyz9SLbc05am0Fj7TiFN5mtHu7WvKi1q6EfTVUNWt2ndBzt873ogX4eYsBq8sci13UQrO_jCfkP8vK-5_HmBq3-rWZDXrTwfMcR-j67P9_LR2cMJ-eGk_2l-eFr_lv0SUonnRcs27NjIWL1rHLtSTwS5YZKb7ppn1hnk8mzkB-gcl7FqBqUjdQoxUrXA9A1twPLHVhCemV32OpqeY_VVdDWVoiOTBEj-_ryZ3Ho-xrtw-Lh78GLR8VRtbEiliCVseQFlPYlxgDa4RTn9M1zIlQ%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a501933085547af9d0350b782dbc9fc&_e=pvDYm0GBaEzhQhmWPeZAjwyajmFAgCkdoqR5yAFrZFxlsvb3y6k8loGeBrQN4eTDzSsBqnUzVyGs5PLHJOl26LanYxhWej_GtegX35j0TvcCXsW2tIZSRbGL8zv1YBgpJyz9SLbc05am0Fj7TiFN5mtHu7WvKi1q6EfTVUNWt2ndBzt873ogX4eYsBq8sci13UQrO_jCfkP8vK-5_HmBq3-rWZDXrTwfMcR-j67P9_LIhDny0n5BMd-RvW-6rdln0sO0TRlFtCrQyhoZPdAhB6sv1Hz6zQQ9zHua4Pt6qQhiHxRIYQUBpds3AQAQ2QIo4rTjtQIrMhFsoqpmkIvurBRJOzau8QBrFiY-V23nx5-Bl5Ih4fNi0yq5H05pUFUTcP6RyhhH91DnmRYRaYIRiw%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Defend the Constitution

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Endorse a U.S. Navy SEAL for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=cf268705e893402cbe8cac8cbcc92b10&_t=awoOd1tnDxoifEebX4P5C3rJ1Aty7baokSNyFNzkkPnQNQeIEPcQa0eY0KFCXQlhBgtXaLVcRSyHdlevpJeWhQBFW84AMAv7ryhORVw9lPI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=cf268705e893402cbe8cac8cbcc92b10&_t=awoOd1tnDxoifEebX4P5C3rJ1Aty7baokSNyFNzkkPnQNQeIEPcQa0eY0KFCXQlhBgtXaLVcRSyHdlevpJeWhQBFW84AMAv7ryhORVw9lPI%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cf268705e893402cbe8cac8cbcc92b10&_e=68vXbGDfGqFVg_HQqCOytJAiSVDpV0A5wy7ywseRBNRluUyes0g58MGI4bvyT2OGSEq5VtcsFbfOm_4PrllrS2AvFQjtKi0oiMayvYRLvotgMrKqBHgEZgf9TUa4U4cBeSTI0n3CdLCziQMD0DVcxNcfA8Es8mWgIHXkEnLHctrPBB1bd3iudzZXKL-XfrEmgxtMDFLl8Iqdwek9FA2m2I7rSy1IwTHlqNPoUehKL6lywWKn4XovREX0Zg-Kh3tQPBHobxHMs___1Q29MmauC5DqPoGtum9N8Q-WK-tXiAMELZTzFkfLLLW5WXyifL16iyfnPW2EJGU0wOVThBXAkkn-EUMh0YohnZo4sWljnUfM4ZWx3SOZGIwhhOi3UtMTiBZPlNekPksGsaI5hjKylIaSLn5W_GA0-mnKVzKBKJU%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

Our movement had the most wins of any organization nationwide in 2023. With your help, we can do even better in 2024 and send more Emerge women to Congress than ever before to flip the House of Representatives, hold the Senate, and re-elect President Biden and Vice President Harris.
There's just one problem: **Our continued success relies on hitting every single fundraising goal. **But tomorrow is our first deadline of the year, and we're still _**32% shy** of our $12,000 mid-month goal_.
**So when we checked, we were so disappointed to see your January contribution status still says _ "PENDING" _... We know our bold Emerge alums have what it takes to win nationwide, but the 2024 election cycle is shaping up to be the most expensive in American history. Well-funded GOP candidates are running in battleground districts, and our ability to recruit and train Democratic women candidates to run against them rides on having the crucial resources.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We're exposing the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Friend, you don't have to put up with the lies any longer. We have the truth on our side, and you can see it all right here.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbdaa3b689189664316fdf3f352ef37a723af8e43886c4e1690b2cf65e5c30847c577750d7a4249d0ebb3fbc862e9788382ec1e830601742)
---
Hey Friend, I believe in running my campaign for President on honesty, integrity, and transparency. It's been made clear that Nikki Haley doesn't. Here is the truth about Nikki Haley: **[https://RonDeSantis.com/the-truth-about-nikki](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbdaa3b689189664f018411b4e3fd634480f5ef4a407511539f009dafdeeae48985ff48121b95aaebaed852deac29ef2f3eba02f0dae7bd3 "https://RonDeSantis.com/the-truth-about-nikki")**
---
| | [See the Truth](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbdaa3b689189664316fdf3f352ef37a723af8e43886c4e1690b2cf65e5c30847c577750d7a4249d0ebb3fbc862e9788382ec1e830601742)
---
Please consider ******[**chipping in any amount**](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbdaa3b689189664316fdf3f352ef37a723af8e43886c4e1690b2cf65e5c30847c577750d7a4249d0ebb3fbc862e9788382ec1e830601742)**** **you can to spread the truth to the nation. It's time for America to wake up to the deceit and fight back with the truth. I promise the way I lead will always make you proud. Yours in Freedom,
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbdaa3b689189664316fdf3f352ef37a723af8e43886c4e1690b2cf65e5c30847c577750d7a4249d0ebb3fbc862e9788382ec1e830601742)
---

Ron DeSantis

---
| | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbdaa3b689189664316fdf3f352ef37a723af8e43886c4e1690b2cf65e5c30847c577750d7a4249d0ebb3fbc862e9788382ec1e830601742)
---
| |
**🚨 ATTENTION 🚨** Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click **[here.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbdaa3b6891896644547896977d6cd42220b4bc6ebd4ae6993d7342a75ba153b56f388352dc23cedccd786cd721f6bd80cee6104db8e19a1 "here.")**

---

**Volunteer!**
We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!
---
| | [Sign up here!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbdaa3b689189664187580d4ae2269aafa294e5a2ba62627f31b7350ac9aeeadde210e5aa1c9c7f9613cfec6710a21420a43f8569218f61a)
---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbdaa3b689189664316fdf3f352ef37a723af8e43886c4e1690b2cf65e5c30847c577750d7a4249d0ebb3fbc862e9788382ec1e830601742)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbdaa3b689189664316fdf3f352ef37a723af8e43886c4e1690b2cf65e5c30847c577750d7a4249d0ebb3fbc862e9788382ec1e830601742)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: We’re throwing out the rulebook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
For decades, massive corporations have turned the struggles of real everyday people into their own personal profit. I’m running to break that cycle.
#
Peter,
For decades, massive corporations have turned the struggles of real everyday people into their own personal profit. Whether it’s wasting trillions of dollars on forever wars or price-gouging medication millions of Americans need for survival — they’ve waged economic warfare on our country.
**And thanks to an army of lobbyists and millions in corporate PAC donations, the politicians who are supposed to protect us let them get away with it.**
These politicians will take money and buy stock from Big Pharma, fossil fuels, defense contractors, and so many other industries that have spent years tearing up our country. And once they’re elected, that’s who they’ll work for in Congress.
We’ve watched it happen over and over. Instead of fighting for us, corrupt DC politicians auction their votes off to the highest bidder while the people and communities they’re supposed to represent get left behind.

subject: 👋 To all of Ilhan Omar's supporters, please read →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
For a campaign like ours, there are no small contributions
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=856%2E791427%2E_6H_NS)

👋 To all of Ilhan Omar's supporters — please don't click away or scroll past this 1-minute read. Not yet.
We know it's a holiday weekend, so we'll be very direct: **[Can you make your first $3 contribution to stand with our re-election campaign today?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan24.NN5r_X&refcode=em240113-1-t1&t=2&akid=856%2E791427%2E_6H_NS)**

Here's why:
As you probably already know, Ilhan doesn't fund her campaigns the same way a lot of her colleagues in Congress do. She doesn't take dark money from shady super PACs, big checks from corporate lobbyists, or trade favors with billionaires.
**That's because she has _us_ — a grassroots movement of lots and lots of people chipping in what they can.**

Over 95% of donations to our campaign are under $100. Our average contribution in 2023 was $23.92. And when we ask first-time donors to chip in, we usually ask for just $3.
All that matters is that you are choosing to be a part of this movement — of something larger than all of us.

**For a campaign like ours, there are no small contributions. Every vote counts, every door-knock counts, and every dollar counts. So please:**
**[Can you chip in to stand with Ilhan this weekend? Anything you can add — whether it's $3, $10, less or more — will go directly toward building the kind of campaign we need to win.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan24.NN5r_X&refcode=em240113-1-t1&t=3&akid=856%2E791427%2E_6H_NS)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77067993/449272189/18334046?refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240114_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3Mjc0ZDI2LWYxYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WuPLytyymFE2aiFEgehUGVIlC6Ro4o-RVgmp-Disj3g=)
Peter,
I was recently visiting with my 95-year old father (his name is Ed, and he lives in sunny Boca Raton, so he is known as BocaEddy) and he reminded me about a photo that — well I just _had_ to share it with you.
Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77067994/449272190/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240114_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3Mjc0ZDI2LWYxYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WuPLytyymFE2aiFEgehUGVIlC6Ro4o-RVgmp-Disj3g=)
I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity to tell you a little about how I approach my faith.
Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my cause.
[_**Before I go any further, and while I still have your attention, I have to ask — will you click this link and pitch in a few dollars to split between Upset the Setup my campaign? If you are not ready yet or need more convincing, please read on. I have lots to share and more to say. I think you’ll like it.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77067995/449272191/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240114_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3Mjc0ZDI2LWYxYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WuPLytyymFE2aiFEgehUGVIlC6Ro4o-RVgmp-Disj3g=)

I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman, and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company.
We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school.
This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.)
While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day.
**In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God.**
These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office.
And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours.
That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the cause of our democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day.
[_**If these priorities resonate with you, I’m asking for your help to continue that work by chipping in $3 to split between Upset the Setup and my campaign.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77068002/449272198/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240114_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3Mjc0ZDI2LWYxYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WuPLytyymFE2aiFEgehUGVIlC6Ro4o-RVgmp-Disj3g=)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I really value you reading these emails
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I know these emails can be pesky.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1852%2E35263%2E9Zc_Tg)
Hi Peter, I can’t thank you enough for reading these emails, and I know that my team and I have sent a lot of them since we announced my reelection campaign. Please allow me to share why: **Your early support for my campaign this year will make a huge difference in the long run.** As potential Republican opponents get ready to jump into this race, they’re going to assess the strength of our team and the amount of support we’re receiving. And one of the most powerful ways we can show off a groundswell of support is through this email program. When folks pitch in a few bucks, sign our petitions, or even just open emails like this one, you’re making a statement that you stand with this campaign and have my back. While my potential opponents can bankroll their entire campaigns from their own deep pockets, I count on donations from these emails to keep our fundraising on track. I know these asks can be pesky, but they make a big difference in the long run, which is why I’m reaching out: **[Can you show your support for my reelection campaign by pitching in before tomorrow’s mid-month deadline?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HgOSTk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240114_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1852%2E35263%2E9Zc_Tg)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-jan24.EnWOzU&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240114_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1852%2E35263%2E9Zc_Tg)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e62b1af010a344d181cc222e9f931f83&_e=GL-_ZXeDWU5WTpKpVHAD6OI83XyW5sqAFH2c5NxKf6cp2HaVlcrTUl6HvDOIpj1MnMZHfXWZDAP5BmgkdwgB7aHvIMY23LjJntfHFJUuJEtg41UwSZw_tHQaG8ha9XcphcI1qzGWzUREwf7lDpN8e7wV7zzsEAWwd-xlo6WeVKk86LQwQ8ht-vtWfq-sHvJCz9-TNH-YS42fH8VhT1F90nPvmwyLuZamrnZKmDlrnZCwNXXhEO8cBCYblHAlM0iGfYMErLGFXUN8H2TbphXU2fvSMsiwYgUy5LUyb1a5ySPm2l3J5P-Mf5BQzM_Qnw86vFHj7M7KFXCGFcTN0sAwN3ujSFa6W74XuxmA8nC_L1CS1hgp-xPn2Ww8xPWd32DbB_xizPr-BeexK6OvgqoCqA%3D%3D)

| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e62b1af010a344d181cc222e9f931f83&_e=GL-_ZXeDWU5WTpKpVHAD6OI83XyW5sqAFH2c5NxKf6cp2HaVlcrTUl6HvDOIpj1MnMZHfXWZDAP5BmgkdwgB7aHvIMY23LjJntfHFJUuJEtg41UwSZw_tHQaG8ha9XcphcI1qzGWzUREwf7lDpN8e7wV7zzsEAWwd-xlo6WeVKk86LQwQ8ht-vtWfq-sHvJCz9-TNH-YS42fH8VhT1F90nPvmwyLuZamrnZKmDlrnZA5PzioTgw4i7UFpbeDYYd4jee19ZlTII2gA3oxGl88Hvg54wnBdRd8c_drgaG_72Lv3NHSTELexkBw6Z-BHgh1wnT2lZwsI018GF1gt7Yfh8GSZTa4mfkcDyJjDUO1vq5C8BFmkWMvRvQ7hActaHUaA7uuq2h3f1Z21MXxPy3HNw%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e62b1af010a344d181cc222e9f931f83&_e=GL-_ZXeDWU5WTpKpVHAD6OI83XyW5sqAFH2c5NxKf6cp2HaVlcrTUl6HvDOIpj1MnMZHfXWZDAP5BmgkdwgB7aHvIMY23LjJntfHFJUuJEtg41UwSZw_tHQaG8ha9XcphcI1qzGWzUREwf7lDpN8e7wV7zzsEAWwd-xlo6WeVKk86LQwQ8ht-vtWfq-sHvJCz9-TNH-YS42fH8VhT1F90nPvmwyLuZamrnZKmDlrnZDdaj4o7WAH5sBQOdh2gxkXokxCzjDUKunk2fdNmxG8tjqg_5lmelDX2vRUDxpxa3pVF5x9ZiC_bgLIyoXwcfxvk5Rrn7P1YTZqGtGIKFlBiPmG92XRv3TRSdEBe4zkxlTig2CRmd_-denm-tY0pLtQRjytADbbHgIEbtSut8-Dpg%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e62b1af010a344d181cc222e9f931f83&_e=GL-_ZXeDWU5WTpKpVHAD6OI83XyW5sqAFH2c5NxKf6cp2HaVlcrTUl6HvDOIpj1MnMZHfXWZDAP5BmgkdwgB7aHvIMY23LjJntfHFJUuJEtg41UwSZw_tHQaG8ha9XcphcI1qzGWzUREwf7lDpN8e7wV7zzsEAWwd-xlo6WeVKk86LQwQ8ht-vtWfq-sHvJCz9-TNH-YS42fH8VhT1F90nPvmwyLuZamrnZKmDlrnZCzpVW2Decf98htSkHfz9gQModMOk_jR4sxVuwU1hQzg1-Z7JHSVT-Pr2LxSr8dpX6XphIfK7BqIdZ4TbLisHSBga763KTm4R4Ka1zoZBKIDLw2fcTMRMAqh8Vn0IGn2AvIz6u8cbiz2P0KbcoVZk2odv_pvUNGHniZj517RtMvoQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e62b1af010a344d181cc222e9f931f83&_e=GL-_ZXeDWU5WTpKpVHAD6OI83XyW5sqAFH2c5NxKf6cp2HaVlcrTUl6HvDOIpj1MnMZHfXWZDAP5BmgkdwgB7aHvIMY23LjJntfHFJUuJEtg41UwSZw_tHQaG8ha9XcphcI1qzGWzUREwf7lDpN8e7wV7zzsEAWwd-xlo6WeVKk86LQwQ8ht-vtWfq-sHvJCz9-TNH-YS42fH8VhT1F90nPvmwyLuZamrnZKmDlrnZB7yqCKpFbqKH_gNDKkRGyQ0zyVDxp_QfLqsqf9KTttElLyRp-1Ldp2ge_exo6Fb8e29LbjJbvIsw-7WvY_7iEa8F_DKgdKlkoGTiTQCwR5C56PYxWBZBkkBURo3kf9C6pOJWwMnbf1mTi7K3OX-Hd46JvHPZ3v6vBB_TfppByxew%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

**MY VISION**

My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE 9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150 Irvine, CA 92618 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails ****_ |

subject: Someone is running against Lizzie in the Democratic Primary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
With about seven weeks to go until the Texas primary, I need to reiterate this: Lizzie has an opponent.
We know Lizzie is the right person for this job, and we are going to spend the roughly 50 days left before the primary talking to voters about why. We’re going to work as hard as we always have to make sure voters know about all of the good work she’s doing in Congress—including her leadership on issues like reproductive rights and her efforts to elect more Democrats up and down the ballot—but people need to know she has an opponent.
You know what that means by now: talking to voters in person, putting mail in their mailboxes, placing ads where people will see them, and putting up signs.
You also know all of that takes money.
We’re nearly halfway through the month, which means there are only a couple more weeks before the first fundraising deadline of the year. Any amount you can contribute will help us make a strong push between now and Primary Day in March. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240114?refcode=lpfe240114]
Talk soon,
Collin

It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kD9PwzAQRz_NZWtkX1zbDB4oUZZKlZiA8fyPGpzUihOqfnuUqrD-7unp6WgsOcWbAXUAxHPyFRChewbEozi8n-Tx7djvTh9F7Xq5F9ftii-AuNxK-EcfljaMlPK2qr7xBp1G55pguGJ7FJpr1pwNl56YlSoyGSOLHjvr9pY0KS9tp2yTDDIUjHPBJUPx1EbtY-cC8UAUbWAg2DVNrb9MlP3XMq9jad1lbLI5L0up96QBcKj0E2gMc3LUTqvLYa33wA0GHB7RG7ja6uZUlnSZKuCwTo_FBuiG-1O63utvH9XpVTaz8eWack5VKhDs88_5GwAA__9PLGei)

name: Harry Dunn
subject: January 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74678b30-8f0b-4d94-b864-210f6cc2a8f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d1d4de8-ac99-4570-9a0b-db6212fdfd57/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is going to be a long email about our January 6th trauma. [**If you’re not ready to talk about it or don’t have time to read the whole email, I understand. But if you could still chip in a split donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me jumpstart this race, I’d appreciate it >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0d219ab-1733-4d3d-95c3-ed1c42290f60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) If you’re still reading this, I’m assuming you’re ready. Let’s talk about our trauma. _You and me._ Ask yourself, what has our nation been arguing about for the last 3 years? What conversation has been dominating the media, the government, occupying our courts, and our daily conversations? And even separating friends and families? **January 6, 2021.** The ripples from that day still threaten our democracy. The lives of election workers – the backbone of our electoral systems – are being threatened online via hundreds of messages on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram by those who would disrupt our elections: **_“Watch your back.” “I know where you sleep.” “Be afraid.”_** Because I speak out about these challenges to our democracy, I get the same threatening messages. “We know where you live.” _Yet MAGA representatives in Congress continue to claim our elections are being rigged._ The only difference between your January 6th trauma and mine is where we were when we experienced it. I was at the Capitol immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, fear, blood, death, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, bigotry, and heroism. Capitol and Washington Police officers fought for our lives, the lives of fellow police officers, and the nation's elected leaders – it didn’t matter if they were a Republican, Democrat or an Independent. They were the men and women we sent to Washington to govern our nation. **It was our duty to protect them. And our democracy.** While Donald Trump, then our nation’s Commander in Chief, did nothing to help us for three hours after inciting the violence himself – we were beaten bloody. And some of us died. Even though my experience looks different from yours, _I am first an American citizen. A girl dad. A football lover. A voter. This is my country – _our country_._ That day was a stain on our nation. And we need to fight like hell to make sure we NEVER repeat a day like that. I’ll continue to use my voice to protect this country. I’ll stand up to the lies, hate, and bigotry. I will always stand my ground to make sure democracy exists. [**So I’m asking you to stand with me. We will get through this trauma – we will get through this nightmare – but only if we stand together. Can I count on you to contribute a split donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign today?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a4f46c0-767f-4df3-a790-5817a2a10eaa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc281a203-3573-47a6-bd62-0800bfffddb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Together, Harry💙
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter) | [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---

name: TRUMP COURT UPDATE
subject: BOMBSHELL ALLEGATION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=eba71a41d2954d34b58533b846512634&_e=RRNp3jEXiiw2Jidx_zhjdfGsgJMmcpP49z4SeLJrtl_dq8VqOEnhYJ3mGSgcWaQubz7FZ4JJVuVmTJSYIHNBqOSuJxr0lSn-M5i0_7_8Q6Vr305ov5XBYPq9EngxcVHoZI4B-L9oTfs5O8v44fY2lfFob8Ckymtr7OQCOJAa4LvF0gls-v1PQq_R-4DJrR6odA7Xlilezo56pQK06gZabSDzm1HbCZyeq8CyA64dy8oqYdpiweWhngvfAf0-zL8-5psj1h3TbHfPJ_w5tlvvc6sUOLU-7jPbKRqQGDFM75KldTtvS3wLg9xYpI-BtzMIewX3aI_dnCA-uXKPVUHF1fGvWVgN37TmCpH4Js50nOESfUXXD4gJhAumbXbKEo9ExYA2y1mlpT2D4jfInT-K9yPmv3gqM76OBVbgYfQ4jL8%3D)
---
**_Defense Secretary Austin needs to resign effective IMMEDIATELY._**
The American public deserves more from our public servants, especially from the man in charge of the world’s most powerful military.

These are dangerous times. We cannot afford to have the Pentagon adrift. Our men and women in uniform deserve leadership. If Secretary Austin cannot do the job, he should step aside and focus on his health. If he sacrificed national security for his vanity, he should resign in disgrace. Either way, it’s time for him to go.

And where was Joe Biden? Asleep at the switch of course. The President is so checked out he had no idea his Secretary of Defense was in the hospital. It’s disgraceful.

**_The engine is running but no one is behind the wheel. We should all be terrified of what’s to come if Biden and his corrupt administration of incompetent cronies get another four years in office._** | [**WATCH MY TAKE HERE**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=eba71a41d2954d34b58533b846512634&_e=RRNp3jEXiiw2Jidx_zhjdfGsgJMmcpP49z4SeLJrtl_dq8VqOEnhYJ3mGSgcWaQubz7FZ4JJVuVmTJSYIHNBqOSuJxr0lSn-M5i0_7_8Q6Vr305ov5XBYPq9EngxcVHoZI4B-L9oTfs5O8v44fY2lfFob8Ckymtr7OQCOJAa4LvF0gls-v1PQq_R-4DJrR6odA7Xlilezo56pQK06gZabSDzm1HbCZyeq8CyA64dy8pg-KlXd1GL6o1cZv7yJeiPO-JslwYPFcs277XnvIuxHniaac7RLMpCn0v3wNmRZZJHnvIZdtheBCe-xNCyhKsLhWkcgZyjdsSa9iUo6CwmADjh37_vcOAmpLbYtp-6nInVe01fx9F_elV2fhhpywK9q08Bs9yAbf68CEMc1RXsi9cnbl8iPsvExfpR5wcxFEQ%3D)
---

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=eba71a41d2954d34b58533b846512634&_e=RRNp3jEXiiw2Jidx_zhjdfGsgJMmcpP49z4SeLJrtl_dq8VqOEnhYJ3mGSgcWaQubz7FZ4JJVuVmTJSYIHNBqOSuJxr0lSn-M5i0_7_8Q6Vr305ov5XBYPq9EngxcVHoZI4B-L9oTfs5O8v44fY2lfFob8Ckymtr7OQCOJAa4LvF0gls-v1PQq_R-4DJrR6odA7Xlilezo56pQK06gZabSDzm1HbCZyeq8CyA64dy8oqYdpiweWhngvfAf0-zL8-5psj1h3TbHfPJ_w5tlvvc4JSXVtHdVyilgmXgbj3bM9lCgoRkjt-y_kUCbTCDFrWZBC2_kYcQM5EBUngKrfznjlcrcaImu40S0EGtZ6NQVJRaZaHLOI2Qu738-0OzqP-SeHRGSbG3Odzkg-CyNIlgZ8xQebiM5Edpgtypmq1-Qk%3D)
[**RESIGN ASAP**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=eba71a41d2954d34b58533b846512634&_e=RRNp3jEXiiw2Jidx_zhjdfGsgJMmcpP49z4SeLJrtl_dq8VqOEnhYJ3mGSgcWaQubz7FZ4JJVuVmTJSYIHNBqOSuJxr0lSn-M5i0_7_8Q6Vr305ov5XBYPq9EngxcVHoZI4B-L9oTfs5O8v44fY2lfFob8Ckymtr7OQCOJAa4LvF0gls-v1PQq_R-4DJrR6odA7Xlilezo56pQK06gZabSDzm1HbCZyeq8CyA64dy8oqYdpiweWhngvfAf0-zL8-5psj1h3TbHfPJ_w5tlvvc3SOma2bPHb40Gxz1Z4WGrzzR9Buq_WpxQx8ZjtC-3S2CxBY5vCrrBh5U30AhSHrbm0gxyMAMGwqBHxiSXMwe3IsPU7R_6O7yt2lz05zHSNXQOYa0k1pbmL5plBIugXXPtLACg0RiTA3M85lU8sKRZc%3D)
---
We’re facing unprecedented, extraordinarily chaotic times. We need sane, active leadership. But the Biden Administration is AWOL.

This is why I’m backing a Red Wave in 2024 with Trump at the helm. We need peace through strength. Not weakness, dithering, and dishonesty. **[Counting on you to join me in this fight for transparency and stronger leadership.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=eba71a41d2954d34b58533b846512634&_e=RRNp3jEXiiw2Jidx_zhjdfGsgJMmcpP49z4SeLJrtl_dq8VqOEnhYJ3mGSgcWaQubz7FZ4JJVuVmTJSYIHNBqOSuJxr0lSn-M5i0_7_8Q6Vr305ov5XBYPq9EngxcVHoZI4B-L9oTfs5O8v44fY2lfFob8Ckymtr7OQCOJAa4LvF0gls-v1PQq_R-4DJrR6odA7Xlilezo56pQK06gZabSDzm1HbCZyeq8CyA64dy8oqYdpiweWhngvfAf0-zL8-5psj1h3TbHfPJ_w5tlvvc6H5ICisTzryuPXF2HKx2rOWJhxpXQj-9Fa7uc2tRjFPjDNfu95d5xyV7QoC9l7kuxJJUANPBMVTL66xCWhbfKk7FzKUXYjKlrumtBCLpDdztoMlpFyDhCj1EENpv-iwGjntwr-8bguRt52JhR4_fr4%3D)**
[**SUPPORT A RED WAVE IN ‘24**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=eba71a41d2954d34b58533b846512634&_e=RRNp3jEXiiw2Jidx_zhjdfGsgJMmcpP49z4SeLJrtl_dq8VqOEnhYJ3mGSgcWaQubz7FZ4JJVuVmTJSYIHNBqOSuJxr0lSn-M5i0_7_8Q6Vr305ov5XBYPq9EngxcVHoZI4B-L9oTfs5O8v44fY2lfFob8Ckymtr7OQCOJAa4LvF0gls-v1PQq_R-4DJrR6odA7Xlilezo56pQK06gZabSDzm1HbCZyeq8CyA64dy8pg-KlXd1GL6o1cZv7yJeiPO-JslwYPFcs277XnvIuxHiFZUZJNG7CFNNGcqaDKipHWyyAumAx7c730BhzGPvYU6n11FCAO4vxO6WUDZJJy7XwV-ijgUBfrexdu7XHs1t6MKIyLvOo2BgjdccLIgFxDPr4rw1f3NJCHngF_k0KtBQgtyxN3Iqg0a7gqBNGsk08%3D)

name: John Fetterman (sent from my iPhone)
subject: hey, quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hey Derek, its John here, sending you this quick message from my phone while on the go.
we are getting to work in the Senate on the stuff that matters most to PA + working families everywhere: better wages, better healthcare, + an economy that works for everybody.
I’ll keep this ask short + sweet: i’m humbly asking for your support so we can keep up the work. I only got here in the 1st place with the support of this team 🙏🙏 and I know w/your help we will b able to continue powering this movement
**[If you’re able to, can you step up 2 the plate and chip in a donation of any amount this weekend? It will mean so much to me + the whole Fetterman team. Heres the link:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240114-1?refcode=em20240114-1-8750&refcode2=8750_434096_Yd7-ik&akid=8750%2E434096%2EYd7-ik)**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240114-1?refcode=em20240114-1-8750](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240114-1?refcode=em20240114-1-8750&refcode2=8750_434096_Yd7-ik&akid=8750%2E434096%2EYd7-ik)**
Derek, seriously THANK YOU!
❤️❤️❤️John
Sent from my iPhone

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

I only got here in the 1st place with the support of this team 🙏🙏 and I know w/your help we will b able to continue powering this movement Derek, seriously THANK YOU! ❤️❤️❤️John Sent from my iPhone Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Peter Ambler, Giffords.org
subject: One of my last asks as Executive Director
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Much like Gabby and her recovery, the work we’ve done here at GIFFORDS over the past eleven years has defied the odds.
#

Hi friends, it’s Peter Ambler. I wanted to reach out to you personally with an important update.
**After co-founding GIFFORDS eleven years ago, and serving seven years as Executive Director, I’ll be stepping down this month.**
[**Before I start a new chapter, I’m respectfully asking you for one of the last times as Executive Director to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before our first mid-month fundraising deadline of the year on Tuesday.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=1&akid=7389%2E3935704%2E0S1phi)
I started working for Gabby in the House of Representatives just days before the shooting in Tucson. In the days and weeks that followed, it was often me in the office receiving many of the well-wishes from people like you.
I continued to work for Gabby in Congress until she stepped down, and then helped her found GIFFORDS.
Much like Gabby and her recovery, the work we’ve done here at GIFFORDS over the past eleven years has defied the odds.
So many people told us that we wouldn’t be able to change anyone’s mind on gun safety. So many people looked us in our faces and told us that the politics would be too difficult. So many people said that the NRA was too powerful for us to challenge.
Yet here we are today. GIFFORDS has helped pass over 620 laws in states nationwide. Last year, we helped pass the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act—the most significant gun safety legislation in 30 years. Instead of shying away from talking about gun safety, candidates now run (and win!) their races with gun violence prevention as a kitchen table issue. Right now, the NRA is the weakest it has ever been, with membership at record lows and Wayne LaPierre resigning in disgrace.
None of this could have been possible without the work we have all done together. None of it could have been possible without you.
[**So will you please make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your support before Tuesday’s mid-month fundraising deadline is more important than ever.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=2&akid=7389%2E3935704%2E0S1phi)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan24.FODcFH&amount=3&t=21&akid=7389%2E3935704%2E0S1phi)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-jan24.jVGlch&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=22&akid=7389%2E3935704%2E0S1phi)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jan24.E8Is3B&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=23&akid=7389%2E3935704%2E0S1phi)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jan24.XLE5TP&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=24&akid=7389%2E3935704%2E0S1phi)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jan24.3iptbJ&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=25&akid=7389%2E3935704%2E0S1phi)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan24.FODcFH&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=26&akid=7389%2E3935704%2E0S1phi)**
---
****
We'll be announcing my successor shortly, so stay tuned for exciting news about the next chapter of our organization. It’s been an honor to be on this journey towards a future free from gun violence with you. Thanks for all that you do to support GIFFORDS and our mission to save lives.
All the best,
Peter Ambler
GIFFORDS Executive Director + Co-Founder
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240114-1-30&refcode2=7389.3935704.0S1phi&t=27&akid=7389%2E3935704%2E0S1phi)
---

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=7389%2E3935704%2E0S1phi) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Finance Team @ Schiff HQ
subject: We’re a bit frazzled
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We have a finance meeting with Adam tomorrow morning, and we’d love to come to that meeting with good news.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5064%2E5257348%2Edr7FTX)
Hey Derek — We know it’s a Sunday morning, but we’re hard at work doing our part to send Adam to the U.S. Senate.
Which is why we’re a bit frazzled right now... we took a look at our online fundraising progress this month, and we’re not where we need to be.
**At this point in January, we should be close to 50% of the way to our monthly online goal — but we’re only at _26%_ right now.**
We have a finance meeting with Adam tomorrow morning, and we’d love to come to that meeting with good news.
And if we don’t catch up, Adam will have to make some tough choices about our upcoming ad spending.
**[Derek, can you _please_ help us catch up on our goal by tomorrow morning? Any amount you chip in will help us get back on track.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240114_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5064%2E5257348%2Edr7FTX)**

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

Let’s get this straight: Donald Trump and the rest of these extreme MAGA candidates don’t have any plans to help everyday Americans, Peter. They only care about one thing: Themselves. Our campaigns couldn’t be more different. Every day between now and November is a chance to organize, mobilize, and power the movement that will defend the White House from MAGA extremism. Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77076437/449293399/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240114_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzMwZTM0Zi1mY2IyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQbemlXBsxYryuQDehouTevZGaV6kOCIewSRW31Hz6M=) Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain.

I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips.

**I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77076438/449293400/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240114_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzMwZTM0Zi1mY2IyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQbemlXBsxYryuQDehouTevZGaV6kOCIewSRW31Hz6M=) My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family.

Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.

You see, the New York City government shoveled over _$100 million in government aid_ to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. _They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street._

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: **Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families.**

When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it.

I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress.

Right now, the shadow of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families _– and they’re raising millions to pull it off._

But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. [**Can I count on you to join our coalition today by chipping in $3 toward tomorrow's $10,000 mid-month goal? If thousands of people like you each chip in what they can afford, I know we can take on their dark money and reclaim our House Majority. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77076439/449293401/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240114_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzMwZTM0Zi1mY2IyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQbemlXBsxYryuQDehouTevZGaV6kOCIewSRW31Hz6M=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77076448/449293409/-866719404?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20240114_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzMwZTM0Zi1mY2IyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQbemlXBsxYryuQDehouTevZGaV6kOCIewSRW31Hz6M=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. clean_body: | = Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ = Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain. I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips. I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx. = My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family. Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families. You see, the New York City government shoveled over $100 million in government aid to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street. But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families. When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it. I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress. Right now, the shadow of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families – and they’re raising millions to pull it off. But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=. Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

Because we’re in this together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We truly appreciate anything you can give today. Team Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

Nothing matters more than coming together **right now** to support Ron DeSantis. We're fresh off of another debate victory, people are lining up in Iowa to caucus for us, and the nation is crying out for a President we can trust to lead this country again. **There has never been a more critical moment in the race than this.** Ron DeSantis wanted to talk to you himself ahead of the big day. **[Watch his message now before voting in Iowa kicks off!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=de6a680f3a954ac4a92d7323158089d8&_e=rjozEOCFDvEJfvG5Z3Ytcllu9Kv0GZjtHYoOPsLIEP5RdqRD-hvvkY9y2N1ecKeecwflXuNkoX-BZkzj9M8pqIQHcDXqqTrKUQbu_H5N7nc3qoIbJ0jxeH6RvvtcE08p19aLHN1lE4ejcrH5FGPiT2Iq5TFFeF3STvqEgzjAQGWg5xiOKzgIPgRv_bIO6ervIdGzGQBiFCg01myvDoaRQbCtdBLbIbrLPoiV4xg-nwgyXgRQYUKIJOtcTaN4sDHb-0LuRRLCfrXutycM7g7YvV760JwL_ZBgWJkyT_OQvT3CUpLBLfeBL2527kXBLpUBEHoEg5vJArfaODK42TP-dh4eutdIrTa_yt2Sp9VTjuuko-B8tHDKPqXUxd9b9zsvHmJUI6e373rLI6LJNE6PYQzKkEX9cfazKKKB-LgbenG0EusGTIRc257JW1ThPcG3)** \- Team DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=de6a680f3a954ac4a92d7323158089d8&_e=rjozEOCFDvEJfvG5Z3Ytcllu9Kv0GZjtHYoOPsLIEP5RdqRD-hvvkY9y2N1ecKeecwflXuNkoX-BZkzj9M8pqIQHcDXqqTrKUQbu_H5N7nc3qoIbJ0jxeH6RvvtcE08p19aLHN1lE4ejcrH5FGPiT2Iq5TFFeF3STvqEgzjAQGWg5xiOKzgIPgRv_bIO6ervIdGzGQBiFCg01myvDoaRQbCtdBLbIbrLPoiV4xg-nwgyXgRQYUKIJOtcTaN4sDHb-0LuRRLCfrXutycM7g7YvV760JwL_ZBgWJkyT_OQvT3x_CLjEXk8oNqOdB-MqregETXFL0rlkEpq0Qt8m1-2OoCY2B50UwcpIuZi_8-sn913Tr2d4wMbEx3wLDu6Td7CZn2nJy3VpebkkqirAHBAYr9CsyhDiSOK6PzB8D1w6bQMSV5NOcsLyyVwSGXA_jaj)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=de6a680f3a954ac4a92d7323158089d8&_e=rjozEOCFDvEJfvG5Z3Ytcllu9Kv0GZjtHYoOPsLIEP5RdqRD-hvvkY9y2N1ecKeecwflXuNkoX-BZkzj9M8pqIQHcDXqqTrKUQbu_H5N7nc3qoIbJ0jxeH6RvvtcE08p19aLHN1lE4ejcrH5FGPiT2Iq5TFFeF3STvqEgzjAQGWg5xiOKzgIPgRv_bIO6ervIdGzGQBiFCg01myvDoaRQbCtdBLbIbrLPoiV4xg-nwgyXgRQYUKIJOtcTaN4sDHb-0LuRRLCfrXutycM7g7YvV760JwL_ZBgWJkyT_OQvT347gyZ5YC7fjze8bY098ZKocqyP6zLk7BBeVGuOAvUpK9Z2UZc06YaXoohku6p6M2YAQS5iRTUshXVC_oeqtj_up-bP7BAV-TDnz6ww-TB8PV52HyI60JufsoWTX4KWttTJ0g1xUHFCSar-38yrji3)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). * I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Sydney Nelson
subject: duck, duck, duck…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35144%2E120265%2EaLQwMq ]Qasim for Congress

Our opponent has been refusing to debate Qasim, despite debating
challengers in past elections.

Voters deserve to know who they’re voting for, and Bill Foster is
stripping them of that opportunity.

What’s worse: Foster originally agreed to debates – including one this
past Monday – and has then declined to attend or rescheduled at the very
last second.

Qasim isn’t afraid to defend his record, and he’s not afraid for voters to
know his values and where he stands on the issues that matter. Bill
Foster’s constant ducking of debates is disrespectful to voters and the
community he claims to represent in IL-11.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5138?t=1002&akid=35144%2E120265%2EaLQwMq ]Can you rush a contribution to Qasim’s campaign right now so we can
prove that voters are hungry for real representation and leadership in
this district?

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5139?t=1003&akid=35144%2E120265%2EaLQwMq ]DONATE $10

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5138?t=1004&akid=35144%2E120265%2EaLQwMq ]DONATE $25

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5140?t=1005&akid=35144%2E120265%2EaLQwMq ]DONATE $50

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5141?t=1006&akid=35144%2E120265%2EaLQwMq ]DONATE $100

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5142?t=1007&akid=35144%2E120265%2EaLQwMq ]DONATE $250

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5143?t=1008&akid=35144%2E120265%2EaLQwMq ]DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT

Debates are also an incredibly important way for Qasim to connect with
voters. They ensure voters hear about his story, issues, and plans for
when he gets to Congress. If we don’t have that platform, we have to find
alternative ways to talk to voters – and that takes resources.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5138?t=1009&akid=35144%2E120265%2EaLQwMq ]With less than 10 weeks left until Election Day, can you make a
contribution right now to help us double down on our voter contact efforts
and continue to hold Bill Foster accountable?

Thanks for everything,

Sydney Nelson
Communications Director

At Courier Newsroom, we defend democracy by stopping right-wing lies and conspiracy theories from spreading online. We do that by making high-quality, local reporting freely available to the communities who need it most.
**_All_ of our stories are free to read online. No paywalls, no subscription fees — just reliable, high-quality journalism. And that's what makes us unique, Peter. But to power this work, we rely on support from folks like you.**

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: Do you understand the power your $3 holds?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Team,
In just a minute, we are going to ask you to contribute $3 — or whatever you can afford — to our movement, but first, we are going to share a few facts with you:
If everyone reading this email chipped in $3 today, we could:
1. Continue to support changemaking Senators like Tammy Baldwin and Jon Tester in vulnerable races across the country to maintain the Democratic Senate majority.
2. Help shift the needle on critical House races to bring a Democratic majority back to the People’s House.
3. Fight to unseat extremist Republicans like Ted Cruz who pose a threat to our fundamental democratic freedoms and elect Colin Allred who will fight for American families.
4. Have the financial resources to continue building our pro-democracy movement in a time of growing MAGA extremism.
5. Breeze past our January fundraising goals.

**That's the power of your $3.**
But the problem is not everyone donates. And we get it, it’s not always easy to give.
And that's why it’s especially important that YOU chip in if you can afford it. Because our movement is powered by folks like you, $3 at a time. And your $3 today will put us one step closer to protecting our democracy.
We know it sounds like a lot of weight to carry, but the only way we can succeed in creating change is if we work together.
That’s why we have to ask:

clean_body: Team, In just a minute, we are going to ask you to contribute $3 — or whatever you can afford — to our movement, but first, we are going to share a few facts with you: If everyone reading this email chipped in $3 today, we could: 1. Continue to support changemaking Senators like Tammy Baldwin and Jon Tester in vulnerable races across the country to maintain the Democratic Senate majority. 2. Help shift the needle on critical House races to bring a Democratic majority back to the People’s House. 3. Fight to unseat extremist Republicans like Ted Cruz who pose a threat to our fundamental democratic freedoms and elect Colin Allred who will fight for American families. 4. Have the financial resources to continue building our pro-democracy movement in a time of growing MAGA extremism. 5. Breeze past our January fundraising goals. That's the power of your $3. But the problem is not everyone donates. And we get it, it’s not always easy to give. And that's why it’s especially important that YOU chip in if you can afford it. Because our movement is powered by folks like you, $3 at a time. And your $3 today will put us one step closer to protecting our democracy. We know it sounds like a lot of weight to carry, but the only way we can succeed in creating change is if we work together. That’s why we have to ask: If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for giving your $3 today if you can afford it and for being a part of this team. The Long Run PAC

name: Nikki Haley
subject: The message I shared
body:
After the debate it’s clear: This is now a two person race between me and Donald Trump. | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=5cc8d6f9f4f1416bb61b66c683805b69&_t=jDglZJ0Y0kW60e80qiY874Q2WhBMEibnOv1r9r3uTPk5KDX9n2Qb_0KuH4OPXuT6V4JGWqfoNPkSdOPF4p6JSjYsCKBYwjKpgdKEaDExG0I%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=5cc8d6f9f4f1416bb61b66c683805b69&_t=jDglZJ0Y0kW60e80qiY874Q2WhBMEibnOv1r9r3uTPk5KDX9n2Qb_0KuH4OPXuT6V4JGWqfoNPkSdOPF4p6JSjYsCKBYwjKpgdKEaDExG0I%3D)

Friend,

After the debate it’s clear: **This is now a two person race between me and Donald Trump.**

Every American needs to know it's never been more urgent than it is now to get things right in this election.

Winning the primary is the first step in this race.

But we have to be looking at the bigger picture here. This is about electing a candidate who can **DEFEAT** Joe Biden.

If you look at the polls, I defeat Joe Biden by 17 points. That's a mandate to fix our out-of-control spending, to get our kids reading, to secure our border with no excuses, to bring law and order back to this country.
_**[Will you join me so we can WIN this fight to save our future?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5cc8d6f9f4f1416bb61b66c683805b69&_e=ukfAxRfvX0LqOddl_SL_fdvHqv4OEfx2UmExCVwljct9hnq8NQJbt0tCTiiB3A0WsWgcTdz8r5vas4i7RWWTT0GDK-Nx6Ni0oDyrmQ0R8LdSUmulCsy1sbBi1vPv-X1-YdSYaYnJphZEfRpq2BqbkDLcfjmVKqcRR9nESKZ91fozIj1n5kkY5D93Suooopyt9QS8tSDvjEz2VnR45JV7ODkmyuq7SvdFogJV-DnDe9G0_6-054wmSEZ1cRgv5WrRl2UnSdBBNqqK_XltjLAGItLp1I7vwqQawfKPy5pHWw3WGXLim4aABz_zicNJmxyGKoz0RTfEaY-nC940tZhvI5oPjqbLv_vpeZnooptn8U2FxQvKQDm478_pYl81bM7n)**_

_**I 'm tired of losing and you should be, too.**_ It's time for a new generation to step up, lead us into the future, and save the country we all love from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism.
