name: Team AOC
subject: Making up the difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Earlier this week, we emailed you to let you know that our fundraising started out slower than expected this month. As a grassroots campaign, we track these things closely because we rely on contributions of $5 - $14.
In order to make up the difference from this slow start, we’re setting a goal to raise $120,000 by midnight tomorrow.
[Please make a $5 donation today to help us close this gap before January's midpoint. If enough folks contribute in response to this email, we’ll be able to reach this critical goal.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240114._P6PNK&refcode=em20240114-5632-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=1&akid=5632%2E2526796%2EEHn6m2)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240114._P6PNK&refcode=em20240114-5632-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=2&akid=5632%2E2526796%2EEHn6m2)**
Alexandria doesn’t curry favors from billionaires or host fancy cocktail fundraisers asking for big checks. She’s focused on legislating and advocating for progress.
We organize 365 days a year, on and off cycle, because we know that’s what’s required to compete with special interests and win the progressive reforms we need.
[That’s why hitting each and every one of our fundraising goals this year is so important. Can you make a $5 contribution right now, of any amount, to help support AOC and our movement? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240114._P6PNK&refcode=em20240114-5632-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=3&akid=5632%2E2526796%2EEHn6m2)
Whether you can afford to donate today or not: thank you so much for being a part of this movement for racial, economic, environmental, and social justice for all.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240114?refcode=em20240114-5632-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=4&refcode2=5632_2526796_EHn6m2&akid=5632%2E2526796%2EEHn6m2)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240114-5632-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=5&akid=5632%2E2526796%2EEHn6m2)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=5632%2E2526796%2EEHn6m2) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=5632%2E2526796%2EEHn6m2) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=5632%2E2526796%2EEHn6m2)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Team Nikki
subject: re: preparing for the months ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Hi folks — Hope your year is off to a great start! To say Nikki was busy during her first year in Washington would be an understatement. She co-sponsored over 298 bills, helped pass legislation to create safety nets for young and beginning farmers, brought over $300 million in funding back to communities across Central and Southern Illinois, and more. And now that the holiday season is behind us, Nikki’s back in Washington working hard to expand access to affordable high-quality healthcare, create good-paying union jobs, and stand up against the far-right’s attempts to attack our democracy. Despite Nikki’s efforts to make progress for working families, farmers, and veterans, National Republicans have made it clear that they’ll spare no expense to flip her seat and expand their House majority. It’s important that we prepare for the attacks that will come our way in the months ahead so Nikki can keep fighting for progress — but we can’t do it without your help. **[Can we count on you to be one of the 500 grassroots supporters to pitch in toward our first fundraising goal of 2024 before the deadline expires tomorrow at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77081124/449303513/1042890097?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240114_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWQwNjQ5OS0wMmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QzrHFRNMkNsdMWTxR6QUa1_VDKb-kDIxf2adGRWYeDs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77081127/449303524/1042890097?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240114_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWQwNjQ5OS0wMmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QzrHFRNMkNsdMWTxR6QUa1_VDKb-kDIxf2adGRWYeDs=) ** | | **[CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77081130/449303526/-1000696272?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240114_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWQwNjQ5OS0wMmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QzrHFRNMkNsdMWTxR6QUa1_VDKb-kDIxf2adGRWYeDs=)**

clean_body: | Hi folks — Hope your year is off to a great start! To say Nikki was busy during her first year in Washington would be an understatement. She co-sponsored over 298 bills, helped pass legislation to create safety nets for young and beginning farmers, brought over $300 million in funding back to communities across Central and Southern Illinois, and more. And now that the holiday season is behind us, Nikki’s back in Washington working hard to expand access to affordable high-quality healthcare, create good-paying union jobs, and stand up against the far-right’s attempts to attack our democracy. Despite Nikki’s efforts to make progress for working families, farmers, and veterans, National Republicans have made it clear that they’ll spare no expense to flip her seat and expand their House majority. It’s important that we prepare for the attacks that will come our way in the months ahead so Nikki can keep fighting for progress — but we can’t do it without your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = ** = | = = | = = Thanks for your support. — Team Nikki = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

**Folks, I just spoke with our fundraising team, and they mentioned that our average donation in 2023 was just $11.81.**

That fact represents so much more than a number on a spreadsheet, it represents the foundation of this people-powered movement; **people.**

❌ Our efforts aren’t backed by billionaires buying influence.
❌ We don’t take a penny of dark money corporate PAC funding.
🪙 And __**over 96%**__ of our donations came from people chipping in $100 or less.

**That is astonishing!** – when so many politicians (our MAGA opponents included) sell out to the highest bidder in order to win, it becomes increasingly rare that a movement of, by, and for the people actually stands by that principle.

name: VoteVets
subject: Before our mid-month deadline, give us a minute to explain:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Derek, it’s the team at VoteVets.
In just a minute, we’re going to ask you to make your first donation to VoteVets. Please, if you have the time, let us explain why that donation is so important.
Tomorrow is our mid-month deadline. And as our first deadline of the year, it’s an important benchmark to our overall goals in 2024. You see, what we’re able to accomplish this year depends on what we are able to raise.
If we’re strong, we can support a ton of candidates. If we’ve got the resources, we can flip races around the country and put the GOP on their heels. We will be relentless, just like we’ve been in every cycle.
But if we’re not raising what we need to, we can’t advocate for candidates who can flip seats and take back the House. We might not even be able to defend seats that are critical to our majority in the Senate. And GOP groups — they’ll fill that void with their own attack ads.
It could be a disaster. Really.
That’s why we send out these emails. They’re one of the biggest single sources of funding we have. We know you can’t donate to every single one we send, but if you understand how important your support is we are hoping you’ll chip in to this one before our mid-month deadline.
**[So please, make a donation of $5 and help us hit the ground running. You’ll be one of our Founding Donors in 2024, one of the essential pieces in our fight against Trump.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan24.1LNhS-&refcode=em240114-1-30&t=1&akid=23541%2E3013755%2ExqJDpy)

body:
First big deadline of 2024 coming up

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77082174/449305703/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmQ0Y2U2Yi0wNGIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dz1VooF2wdVzxwr-XF65FwI3h3DdVCmgRl5VIlyMQ5w=&emci=c9467b1b-f3b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=dfd4ce6b-04b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, we’ve got our first big deadline of 2024 coming up tomorrow at midnight, and [**_I’ve got to ask for your help. Please, if you’re with me already, pitch in just $10 to help us hit our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77082175/449305704/710125701?refcode=20240114.1_KO_1S&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmQ0Y2U2Yi0wNGIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dz1VooF2wdVzxwr-XF65FwI3h3DdVCmgRl5VIlyMQ5w=)**_

As you might have seen, the Iowa Caucus – the first contest of the Republican presidential primary – is tomorrow, and all signs point to Donald Trump running away with the Republican nomination. If you’ve been paying attention to politics and the extreme MAGA takeover of the GOP for the last eight years, that probably won’t surprise you.

**_I hope it disappoints you. I hope it scares you.**_

**Because here’s the reality:** Our nation is at a crossroads in 2024. This is the last year that Donald Trump can feasibly run for office, and if he wins, he could do irreparable harm to our country.

Trump has talked about forcing all government employees to go through a loyalty test – not to America, _**but to Trump._** He’s promised to rig the economy in favor of the ultra-wealthy and corporations. He’s vowed to support a national abortion ban, eliminate all checks on the power of the President, and become a dictator on day one. **He’s even talked about using the military against Democratic cities.**

It should scare you that the GOP has lined up behind Donald Trump.

And that’s why I’m coming to you for help.

We can’t defeat Donald Trump in 2024 without the support of every single Democrat, independent, or sane Republican. In 2020, we barely stopped Trump, winning in Georgia by just 0.23% of the votes cast – **that’s next to nothing, and it could be _even closer this time around._**

[**_So again, I’m asking for your support. With Donald Trump poised to win the Iowa Caucus tomorrow, we need to get ready for a long, challenging 2024. Please, if you’re with us, rush a donation so we can be ready to stop Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77082176/449305705/710125701?refcode=20240114.1_KO_1S&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmQ0Y2U2Yi0wNGIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dz1VooF2wdVzxwr-XF65FwI3h3DdVCmgRl5VIlyMQ5w=)**_

Thank you,
Kevin

Kevin Olasanoye
Executive Director
Democratic Party of Georgia

body:
We’re launching our first 2024 fundraising goal to raise $3,725 before Tuesday, January 16, and we need your help to kick off our fundraising efforts.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240114-3393-footer&t=1&akid=3393%2E420207%2Ey1Hk9H)
Peter, these first few weeks of January have been hard on our fundraising — and we get it.
Whether it’s dry January, holiday season burnout, or just a slow start to the year, the most important step towards building back our momentum is making a plan for progress.
**That’s why we’re launching our first 2024 fundraising goal to raise $3,725 before Tuesday, January 16 — and we need your help.** Reaching this goal will allow us to accurately plan for our campaign’s future while also protecting our hard-earned, progressive victories!
[**Will you make a contribution to our first mid-month fundraising goal of 2024 and help us put our campaign back on track to ensure Pramila continues to fight for us in Congress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240114.R9CG9i&refcode=em20240114-3393&t=2&akid=3393%2E420207%2Ey1Hk9H)

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36448%2E3422442%2Ex63XQb)
Derek, we won't BS you: this is urgent:
Ballots are going out to California voters in less than a month, and we need the resources to reach as many voters as possible over these next few weeks.
→**If Katie falls into third place, she won’t advance to the general election, and we’ll lose her voice in Washington for good**. Imagine Congress without Katie’s Whiteboard, or without her holding corporate CEOs and Big Pharma lobbyists accountable. We can’t let that happen.
**Katie is the only candidate in this race who doesn’t accept contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. We’re relying on supporters like you pitching in what you can.**
**So what do you say****, Derek?**
**[With just 51 days until the critical Primary Election on March 5, will you make your first $5 contribution to ensure we keep Katie in Congress, fighting for all of us?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240114-1?refcode=em20240114-36448&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36448_3422442_x63XQb&akid=36448%2E3422442%2Ex63XQb)**
**Thank you for considering making a contribution, and thanks for being a part of Team Porter.**
-KPHQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em&t=2&refcode2=36448_3422442_x63XQb&akid=36448%2E3422442%2Ex63XQb)**

body:
Protect Free Speech!

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=69d27d5fea534ed98646c2e222770bf4&_e=LUtfaHvC9ELtuoMbcd5oJUZuH8w7XJbMRuiVGVz_2JVr-6TPKH9AtI3eZNsdLJM7pRUKjGFzkdiqt28GG67iiWMrt99-2pWLCx4NqonVSR5AWBZFnUD7Cp64BqKAVJXfI8X-HJxVsZhApTthezGeeNQrbAx82nd46klBf7iSJMts0K3c00ZSLx46lMJf67i_vjUxAy2SR5YMQHea4e2F0y3GWSveZ_t7suUUtgN_qpb63dvfDcaX2xyHUkgvbKAPpvYV1GuCHGMQuTUqM5uHf9Urzaz9dC8opz6z2F9Oci1FlsD6y8MVBpsfAmWKXoFleeuJ9MmGYWeK_1YG4QZmh3XpwEcvOw6-LbCuI5Xnr2qng-mHg4zuqMstlYElirwP559cYLKxAGWxulYrY8FnSQ%3D%3D)

The Left is panicking.

They went after Free Speech by trying to cancel Elon Musk and his platform, X, and I don’t think they expected us to fight back like we have.

[**I put my money where my mouth is and am willing to stand up against cancel culture and protect Free Speech, are you?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=69d27d5fea534ed98646c2e222770bf4&_e=LUtfaHvC9ELtuoMbcd5oJUZuH8w7XJbMRuiVGVz_2JVr-6TPKH9AtI3eZNsdLJM7pRUKjGFzkdiqt28GG67iiWMrt99-2pWLCx4NqonVSR5AWBZFnUD7Cp64BqKAVJXfI8X-HJxVsZhApTthezGeeNQrbAx82nd46klBf7iSJMts0K3c00ZSLx46lMJf67i_vjUxAy2SR5YMQHea4e2F0y3GWSveZ_t7suUUtgN_qpZSlCm4QVnv9RNTELn7N41XFl9QZHFBhkWEmMv6JDe4w-V0J5Vmoc2XYTDtXGvCsxP2WLYbYCxXQqwPYdtc2gD8mYK_j_IEH36E3iLAxZKxJRzgvD0SP0joIqHlb7QLHF789T7ccWUVl35-0ewXWpFiPFHAy5vL4imdDY5loIP8dg%3D%3D)

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Friend... We're almost there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ccec9ee47bc3e16c8b3257184fdc43ff8edbf318f3874beb059e1cd49ad725a5ef772e943cdbd52fadd84ad1fb3a76a655c83118f69942cb257fadceb96a8b18bf931c74bb21620df74c1dafceac6c55

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=81c6d0d45b003092cc725fb0e905c2bdc50de353ac0af8e303c77c9f9db8d401bfdd893e4140fcbee1cbc6c503b9ea8cf02ded22c35cd1f3

Hey Friend,

We've been in touch with you a lot this week because our campaign has reached its most critical point yet. The Iowa Caucuses are being held TOMORROW, and votes will officially be cast for Ron DeSantis for President.

When we say the nation will be watching... we mean every American who is ready to decide on the nominee they believe in... will be tuning in to see the results of this contest.

Now is the time for our strongest show of support yet.

We are reaching out tonight ONE MORE TIME before the big day to ask you to do everything you can to drive us forward. Your support could take so many forms:

-
Call a grandparent to tell them about Ron DeSantis and his vision for our nation.
-
Text a friend and ask them if they're ready to vote.
-
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=81c6d0d45b003092cc725fb0e905c2bdc50de353ac0af8e303c77c9f9db8d401bfdd893e4140fcbee1cbc6c503b9ea8cf02ded22c35cd1f3
Send in a donation so we can stay out campaigning all day tomorrow to get out the vote and encourage Iowans to caucus.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=81c6d0d45b003092d109710ef21254463bee8f64a0d3c765cf5f6fc31fc0ddec0cc26ab9aa730904cf18dd8a2d9c9199983d76b5e8889cef
Chip in $15 before midnight

While we are counting on you to help us do everything it'll take to get our supporters out to caucus, we also want to take a moment to thank you for being part of our team. Every day that we have fought for Ron DeSantis together... has led to this moment. We wouldn't be here without you.

We have a lot to get done in these last 24 hours ahead of the caucuses, but if you help us prepare, we'll be right on track to proving that Team DeSantis is a FORCE—backed by the strongest showing of grassroots support across the field. We cannot wait to see what we accomplish tomorrow.

This is only the beginning, but it's the beginning of something historic: our Great American Comeback. The Iowa Caucuses are our FIRST chance to prove that we are well on our way. You can send in a donation before midnight here!
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=81c6d0d45b003092cc725fb0e905c2bdc50de353ac0af8e303c77c9f9db8d401bfdd893e4140fcbee1cbc6c503b9ea8cf02ded22c35cd1f3
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=81c6d0d45b003092197b39f27ca38a1110b0618d50d1b35fcaa8bbb7804c8bf3f2f14f14df40f1f306b76ce94a64aaada30f8586abcfe456

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=81c6d0d45b003092cc725fb0e905c2bdc50de353ac0af8e303c77c9f9db8d401bfdd893e4140fcbee1cbc6c503b9ea8cf02ded22c35cd1f3

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=81c6d0d45b003092bbddcf95727fab633db8670c27e5d41f6a333418b339e1df28b1f9a3e1ff7b715d335c2e66d6929930f28255d403283c
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=81c6d0d45b003092c1fd1df1e6a465185f79b1fbf0a9d7602f39e7aa915df65379e128928e60dd9caa1e872b12d408b83033348da238302a
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=81c6d0d45b003092cc725fb0e905c2bdc50de353ac0af8e303c77c9f9db8d401bfdd893e4140fcbee1cbc6c503b9ea8cf02ded22c35cd1f3

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=81c6d0d45b003092cc725fb0e905c2bdc50de353ac0af8e303c77c9f9db8d401bfdd893e4140fcbee1cbc6c503b9ea8cf02ded22c35cd1f3

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Hey Friend, We've been in touch with you a lot this week because our campaign has reached its most critical point yet. The Iowa Caucuses are being held TOMORROW, and votes will officially be cast for Ron DeSantis for President. When we say the nation will be watching... we mean every American who is ready to decide on the nominee they believe in... will be tuning in to see the results of this contest. Now is the time for our strongest show of support yet. We are reaching out tonight ONE MORE TIME before the big day to ask you to do everything you can to drive us forward. Your support could take so many forms: - Call a grandparent to tell them about Ron DeSantis and his vision for our nation. - Text a friend and ask them if they're ready to vote. - Send in a donation so we can stay out campaigning all day tomorrow to get out the vote and encourage Iowans to caucus. Chip in $15 before midnight While we are counting on you to help us do everything it'll take to get our supporters out to caucus, we also want to take a moment to thank you for being part of our team. Every day that we have fought for Ron DeSantis together... has led to this moment. We wouldn't be here without you. We have a lot to get done in these last 24 hours ahead of the caucuses, but if you help us prepare, we'll be right on track to proving that Team DeSantis is a FORCE—backed by the strongest showing of grassroots support across the field. We cannot wait to see what we accomplish tomorrow. This is only the beginning, but it's the beginning of something historic: our Great American Comeback. The Iowa Caucuses are our FIRST chance to prove that we are well on our way. You can send in a donation before midnight here! In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ddbcddddc7804e4e83893cf29d50ecc5&_e=v-tIRrjZrKW5LPalt6mQPg3f4uyxoD4eXf7qLI1_YhiQHJmqw-8OEnFNT5AIvw2916tnj6sxVp0W1ffVlihNm24eRJas3j4OJJPDGA7i6rIBCvsWyOQKhjfkO1ImV6vsHNoupjf27w4998cAn-Fkdp70WXqgpq294bMv7EVGFYV2der247KOYv3ioVBu03AAQexiVT43s3bo-T2E8NuaKhGfIiL9YSZgNy4VmeYutAWvEHMcsg2eY94CoYAtvMXKFQSnkbJfvCV8Quj5thimvGJIee2uV7Ie0OTV_Vhvzg944e2Ys8UrH8TBYLKm_9grIZClAq-nvUaSOq-2VpRdB6F0oEaYjc1NOnweMdXTJHO3v0FYWjR_rc5HT8tlL1-b2eT8OW_sIxsupH6Ysmkab4nZt4I4umtZOU2u0poaxUU%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ddbcddddc7804e4e83893cf29d50ecc5&_e=v-tIRrjZrKW5LPalt6mQPg3f4uyxoD4eXf7qLI1_YhiQHJmqw-8OEnFNT5AIvw2916tnj6sxVp0W1ffVlihNm24eRJas3j4OJJPDGA7i6rIBCvsWyOQKhjfkO1ImV6vsHNoupjf27w4998cAn-Fkdp70WXqgpq294bMv7EVGFYV2der247KOYv3ioVBu03AAQexiVT43s3bo-T2E8NuaKhGfIiL9YSZgNy4VmeYutAWvEHMcsg2eY94CoYAtvMXKFQSnkbJfvCV8Quj5thimvKJn9e7zWNOiv0zfAA8DKHgkCqBybtnWwyfh2brWS5yGgiZGgerW2UdaZCDuXFolZQqdzIUf4HnwUOIpg9vnbcqe1JA16wqMDZi-19nAJt0DV06-3GkCq6llWYzQSI7TIeEaji-3ZQTaHHNns3vtlm8%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ddbcddddc7804e4e83893cf29d50ecc5&_e=v-tIRrjZrKW5LPalt6mQPg3f4uyxoD4eXf7qLI1_YhiQHJmqw-8OEnFNT5AIvw2916tnj6sxVp0W1ffVlihNm24eRJas3j4OJJPDGA7i6rIBCvsWyOQKhjfkO1ImV6vsHNoupjf27w4998cAn-Fkdp70WXqgpq294bMv7EVGFYV2der247KOYv3ioVBu03AAQexiVT43s3bo-T2E8NuaKhGfIiL9YSZgNy4VmeYutAWvEHMcsg2eY94CoYAtvMXKFQSnkbJfvCV8Quj5thimvEa_3AkZFrxnayG3zfN-m37HnhbnTsdkt7CGV-q6MYVKT2xzQDoq6coikXo7W5NFWsosFkXgF8JNeqcxGR1r8I21DXrcFKr8sFSFKaAkDSlWdPymoQ0NFKsUnwfaWeLvXYTo0BORAGmwNaTdx5flOzA%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Biden bypassed Congress to send Israel $150 million in weapons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We may have entered a new year, but the slaughter and starvation of
Palestinians in Gaza did not end in 2023, and according to Israeli Prime
Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, it will go on “for many more months.”

This comes at the very same time that President Biden simultaneously said
he wants Israel to “scale down” its military attacks on Gaza, while his
administration bypassed Congress for a second time to send Israel nearly
$150 million more in bombs and weapons to continue waging violence against
a civilian population.

The hypocrisy is astounding. The President of the United States is not
making genuine calls for peace and human rights when his administration is
paying for the weapons Israel is using to target refugee camps, hospitals,
residential buildings, and places of worship. In the words of Ilhan Omar,
it is morally indefensible.

What’s even worse is that last week, Israeli officials hit back at Biden’s
comments and made it clear that their intent is to clear Gaza of its
Palestinian inhabitants so that Israelis may live there — that’s ethnic
cleansing, plain and simple.

Progressive leaders like Ilhan, Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman,
and Summer Lee were the very first members of Congress to call for a
ceasefire, and they’re continuing to hold our government’s feet to the
fire as long as the Biden Administration funds the atrocities we’re
witnessing.

It’s just one of many reasons we can’t afford to lose their seats in the
U.S. House this year, and why we need your help right now:

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, We may have entered a new year, but the slaughter and starvation of Palestinians in Gaza did not end in 2023, and according to Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, it will go on “for many more months.” This comes at the very same time that President Biden simultaneously said he wants Israel to “scale down” its military attacks on Gaza, while his administration bypassed Congress for a second time to send Israel nearly $150 million more in bombs and weapons to continue waging violence against a civilian population. The hypocrisy is astounding. The President of the United States is not making genuine calls for peace and human rights when his administration is paying for the weapons Israel is using to target refugee camps, hospitals, residential buildings, and places of worship. In the words of Ilhan Omar, it is morally indefensible. What’s even worse is that last week, Israeli officials hit back at Biden’s comments and made it clear that their intent is to clear Gaza of its Palestinian inhabitants so that Israelis may live there — that’s ethnic cleansing, plain and simple. Progressive leaders like Ilhan, Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman, and Summer Lee were the very first members of Congress to call for a ceasefire, and they’re continuing to hold our government’s feet to the fire as long as the Biden Administration funds the atrocities we’re witnessing. **Jim Jordan**
U.S. Congressman [OH-04]

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

name: Colorado Alert
subject: re: Lauren Boebert's news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
We wanted to make sure you saw this latest news:

Lauren Boebert officially announced she will be running in a different district this cycle — hundreds of miles from where she currently represents.

We’ll call this for what it is: Desperate. Recent polls showed that her constituents disapproved of her extremism and were ready to vote her out.

She knew she was going to lose, so she chose to run on the opposite side of Colorado to salvage her power.

We need more leaders who care about delivering for the people of Colorado — not fueling their own ambitions. Boebert is not that person.

In fact, she’s *doubling down* on her MAGA extremism: In one of Lauren Boebert’s first interviews since her announcement, she specifically singled out and attacked Jason.

We know that Boebert is only going to get more desperate from here. We need to respond to her latest attacks and show that we have a strong movement to reelect Jason and stand up to her brand of extremism in Colorado.

Tomorrow is our first mid-month deadline of the new year. Will you rush in $10 to help Jason stand up against extremism and bring a new generation of leadership to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2024?amount=10]

clean_body: Jason Crow For Congress [] We wanted to make sure you saw this latest news: Lauren Boebert officially announced she will be running in a different district this cycle — hundreds of miles from where she currently represents. We’ll call this for what it is: Desperate. Recent polls showed that her constituents disapproved of her extremism and were ready to vote her out. She knew she was going to lose, so she chose to run on the opposite side of Colorado to salvage her power. We need more leaders who care about delivering for the people of Colorado — not fueling their own ambitions. Boebert is not that person. In fact, she’s doubling down on her MAGA extremism: In one of Lauren Boebert’s first interviews since her announcement, she specifically singled out and attacked Jason. We know that Boebert is only going to get more desperate from here. We need to respond to her latest attacks and show that we have a strong movement to reelect Jason and stand up to her brand of extremism in Colorado. Tomorrow is our first mid-month deadline of the new year. Will you rush in $10 to help Jason stand up against extremism and bring a new generation of leadership to Congress? body:
Jan. 6 is not a day to agonize. It is a day to remember, organize and move forward.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77084813/449314034/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmNiOWNmMy0wY2IzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bUNSc7pwNp7f9etrN6GuwpTUrlrWs3SsabIsvFLQHXQ=&emci=0347922e-70b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=92cb9cf3-0cb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9494239)
---

| | [**Did you catch my Op-ed on HeraldNet?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77084814/449314035/828934961?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmNiOWNmMy0wY2IzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bUNSc7pwNp7f9etrN6GuwpTUrlrWs3SsabIsvFLQHXQ=&emci=0347922e-70b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=92cb9cf3-0cb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9494239) I shared my reflections on the January 6 insurrection and what work still needs to be done to hold domestic terrorists accountable and to ensure that we are protecting our democracy. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77084815/449314036/828934961?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmNiOWNmMy0wY2IzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bUNSc7pwNp7f9etrN6GuwpTUrlrWs3SsabIsvFLQHXQ=&emci=0347922e-70b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=92cb9cf3-0cb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9494239) Here's what I shared with them: _On Jan. 6, 2021, I was in my office in Congress' Rayburn House Office Building as violent domestic terrorists stormed the U.S. Capitol building across the street. Like you, I could only watch in disgust as these terrorists attacked law enforcement, vandalized the Capitol, and threatened the exercise of our democracy and the peaceful transfer of power._ _Democracy bent but did not break on Jan. 6. I never doubted the outcome of that day: Congress would affirm the election of President Biden and Vice President Harris._ _Three years later, progress has been made to hold accountable those responsible for the attack, protect our democracy and restore trust in government. In December 2022, the bipartisan January 6th Committee completed its thorough investigation and filed a report that establishes a clear historical record and contains several legislative recommendations to prevent another deadly attack. In December 2022, Congress enacted the bipartisan Electoral Count Reform Act to close loopholes in how presidential elections are conducted. And since Jan. 6, more than 1,230 people have been charged with federal crimes and more than 450 people have been convicted and sent to jail or prison for their role in the attack._ _However, Congress must do more to improve elections and strengthen democracy. The American people overwhelmingly support legislation such as the Freedom to Vote Act and the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act that clean up elections, protect the right to vote and guarantee every American's voice is heard at the ballot box. I am also working with Rep. Marc Veasey, D-Texas, to pass the America Votes Act, a commonsense bill modeled on a successful Washington state law that allows voters to affirm their identity by submitting a similar written statement along with their mail-in ballot._ _Jan. 6 is not a day to agonize. It is a day to remember, organize and move forward. On the third anniversary of the attack, join me in remembering the five officers who lost their lives defending our democracy and the Capitol. Join me in honoring the more than 140 officers who were physically injured and the many more who still bear the burden of that horrible day. And join me in organizing for voting rights to move our country forward and prevent another Jan. 6 from ever happening again._ More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Jan. 6 is not a day to agonize. It is a day to remember, organize and move forward. | | | | I shared my reflections on the January 6 insurrection and what work still needs to be done to hold domestic terrorists accountable and to ensure that we are protecting our democracy. Here's what I shared with them: On Jan. 6, 2021, I was in my office in Congress' Rayburn House Office Building as violent domestic terrorists stormed the U.S. Capitol building across the street. Like you, I could only watch in disgust as these terrorists attacked law enforcement, vandalized the Capitol, and threatened the exercise of our democracy and the peaceful transfer of power. Democracy bent but did not break on Jan. 6. I never doubted the outcome of that day: Congress would affirm the election of President Biden and Vice President Harris. Three years later, progress has been made to hold accountable those responsible for the attack, protect our democracy and restore trust in government. In December 2022, the bipartisan January 6th Committee completed its thorough investigation and filed a report that establishes a clear historical record and contains several legislative recommendations to prevent another deadly attack. In December 2022, Congress enacted the bipartisan Electoral Count Reform Act to close loopholes in how presidential elections are conducted. And since Jan. 6, more than 1,230 people have been charged with federal crimes and more than 450 people have been convicted and sent to jail or prison for their role in the attack. However, Congress must do more to improve elections and strengthen democracy. The American people overwhelmingly support legislation such as the Freedom to Vote Act and the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act that clean up elections, protect the right to vote and guarantee every American's voice is heard at the ballot box. I am also working with Rep. Marc Veasey, D-Texas, to pass the America Votes Act, a commonsense bill modeled on a successful Washington state law that allows voters to affirm their identity by submitting a similar written statement along with their mail-in ballot. Jan. 6 is not a day to agonize. It is a day to remember, organize and move forward. On the third anniversary of the attack, join me in remembering the five officers who lost their lives defending our democracy and the Capitol. Join me in honoring the more than 140 officers who were physically injured and the many more who still bear the burden of that horrible day. And join me in organizing for voting rights to move our country forward and prevent another Jan. 6 from ever happening again. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen PO Box 326 Everett, WA 98206 United States Email is an important way for Rick Larsen to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Update from Bob Lorinser for Congress
Thanks to your support and generosity, Bob is well on his way to securing the Democratic nomination this August. Momentum is with us, but we cannot take anything for granted, and our work is unfinished.

Friend
In 2023, Bob Lorinser made significant strides in his outreach and fundraising efforts . With an audience that surpasses half a million people every month, Bob has garnered support from constituents across all 36 counties in the district and nationwide.
The campaign's grassroots fundraising has been particularly successful, with two solid quarters of fundraising that have outpaced incumbent Rep. Jack Bergman and the entire field with small individual contributions under $200, the most important category that highlights solid grassroots support.
Whether it's $5, $50, or $500, your donations are making a difference in our effort to unseat a GOP extremist.
JOIN OUR FIGHT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
'Newsweek' recently featured Bob's outspoken advocacy for universal healthcare, and he's receiving national recognition.
Candidates are often timid about issue-based campaigning, but Bob has made it a cornerstone of his platform to demonstrate leadership by courageously providing tangible solutions to issues that impact hardworking people.
Name recognition as a two-cycle strategy candidate will be critically important to defeating the GOP in November.
It's happening, Friend! Thank you for standing with us in this fight.
Andrew

name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: Three years ago, I defended the U.S. Capitol from violent insurrectionists. Now, I'm the Democrat running for Congress in MD-03 and I hope you’ll become a Founding Donor of my campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey team , it's Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee.
I've got an important announcement: I'm hoping to make my return to DC – but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional district in the U.S. House.
I’m counting on your support to get there. Can you rush $10 or more to me and Seth Moulton become a Founding Donor of my campaign? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Here’s the thing team, I never thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!)
But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself.
So when I put on my Capitol police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol, it felt right.
But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol.
I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists.
I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn.
Please, can you chip in $10 or $25 to my team and Seth Moulton to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? I seriously appreciate any help you can give today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Let's do it,
Harry Dunn
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

subject: Please, is there anything we can say?

body:
We can’t afford to let Mitch McConnell retake the Senate — not with Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid under attack.

| Peter,

**Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make a donation to defend Pennsylvania’s Senate seat?**

What if we said that, with an open seat in West Virginia, Mitch McConnell only needs ONE more seat to flip the Senate red next year?

What if we said Pennsylvania will be one of the most competitive and expensive battleground races in the country?

How about if we reminded you that Bob’s mega-millionaire opponent has the resources to self-fund his campaign?

[_**Please, will you split a donation between our campaign and Fight For Progress to ensure that we have what it takes to win?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77085581/449316745/-887798292?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2NTQ3NzYzLTBmYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vvWFVSaorgvswKKF344yUeyFFo508gQ2zc_KP3rbOlI=)

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Alpha Kappa Alpha
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ahead of Alpha Kappa Alpha Founders’ Day tomorrow, I wanted to reach out with a quick note...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77085893/449317717/476240478?refcode=em_eng_2024.01.14_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTBjNTRjOTgtMGZiMy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P-q1khvk8_5p8vVLZQpf26Zxmd7LBcubpntgMg28Dt4=)
Friend – I’m proud to wear many hats: Mom, wife, State Representative, small business owner, and more.

But today, I wanted to reach out about one of my favorite “hats” that I wear, an incredibly important piece of my identity: My membership in the Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority, Inc. sisterhood.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77085894/449317718/476240478?refcode=em_eng_2024.01.14_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTBjNTRjOTgtMGZiMy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P-q1khvk8_5p8vVLZQpf26Zxmd7LBcubpntgMg28Dt4=)**
Being a member of Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority, Inc. is important to me because throughout my life, I have relentlessly pursued academic excellence and offered unselfish service to others.

**My work pays tribute to the hours of uncompensated and under-compensated labor Black women have endured in our pursuit to both survive and uplift our race.** I am a proud member of AKA because I want to take his voyage through life with like-minded women who are driven to lead.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77085895/449317719/476240478?refcode=em_eng_2024.01.14_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTBjNTRjOTgtMGZiMy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P-q1khvk8_5p8vVLZQpf26Zxmd7LBcubpntgMg28Dt4=)**
**Alpha Kappa Alpha women serve unselfishly and uphold the highest standards of culture and merit.** My goal is to leave a lasting legacy for my daughters and young women everywhere, and I want my service to be a reminder that we are capable and worthy of nothing but the best!

So to the 350,000+ members of Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority: Happy Founders Day!

_Janelle_
---

**Janelle Bynum is running to represent Oregon's Fifth Congressional District. With a reputation as a tireless champion for real progress, Janelle has worked in the State Legislature to safeguard our rights, lower costs, and create pathways to success for the next generation.

Oregon's 5th District is one of the most competitive – and most flippable – seats in the country. Janelle has what it takes to win, but she can't do it without you. Will you make a grassroots donation today? ** | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77085897/449317720/-438343666?refcode=em_eng_2024.01.14_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTBjNTRjOTgtMGZiMy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P-q1khvk8_5p8vVLZQpf26Zxmd7LBcubpntgMg28Dt4=)

clean_body: We have our work cut out for us — but Tina knows we can count on this grassroots team to step up, chip in, volunteer, and do what it takes to win. | Team — Last week, in an interview with Breitbart, Donald Trump said, “I’m going to make... a heavy play for a state that hasn’t been won in years,Minnesota.” This is bad news, and Tina is not going to let Donald Trump barnstorm our state without responding. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Trump is feeling empowered — and the polls are backing him up. All signs point to Trump winning at the Iowa caucuses tomorrow, setting him up on the likely path toward the GOP nomination for the White House. And with a narrow Democratic Senate majority too, Mitch McConnell and his dark money donors will leave no stone unturned in their efforts to flip control of the Senate from blue to red. We have our work cut out for us — but Tina knows we can count on this grassroots team to step up, chip in, volunteer, and do what it takes to win. That’s why we’re asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for stepping up! — Team Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Survey Team via Fairness Project
subject: POP QUIZ: How Well Do You Know Ballot Measures?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project
body:
https://www.thefairnessproject.org/ [https://www.thefairnessproject.org/]
Friend, we’re gearing up for the 2024 election to launch, support, and win nationwide ballot measure campaigns. As a part of our team, we all know how critical direct democracy efforts like ballot measures are to breaking through partisan gridlock in Congress and passing life-changing policies right at the ballot box.

But we wanted to know, how well does our team know the steps it takes to get a ballot measure passed?

Pop Quiz! The Lifecycle of a Ballot MeasureQuestion 1: How many states can enact constitutional amendments through a ballot measure? [https://secure.everyaction.com/eQnlo3wG-EiiOblS_c9nZw2]
A. 50
B. 26
C. 18
D. 10

Question 2: What’s the biggest hurdle for a ballot measure to qualify for the ballot? [https://secure.everyaction.com/UGj6OFRQ0UuAUi-d95MOMA2]
A. Collecting enough signatures
B. Submit filing paperwork on time
C. Decide on how the ballot measure will be phrased
D. Choosing a catchy campaign name
E. All of the above (except D)

Question 3: How can a ballot measure gain enough community support to pass? [https://secure.everyaction.com/4YXipNyqrUW5M5rtyZkjDQ2]
A. Grassroots organizing
B. TV ads and mailers
C. Yard signs
D. Choosing a catchy campaign name
E. Community events
E. All of the above

Take our quiz and test your knowledge of the lifecycle of a ballot measure today!

— Survey Team via Fairness Project
https://www.facebook.com/projectfairness/ [https://www.facebook.com/projectfairness/] https://www.instagram.com/fairness.project/ [https://www.instagram.com/fairness.project/] https://twitter.com/FairnessProject [https://twitter.com/FairnessProject]Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.

Dear Friend Welcome to the heart of Carolyn Rush's Congressional Campaign! We're thrilled to have you on board as a valued member of our campaign community, and we're excited to work together to bring positive change to our district. As a member of our campaign email blast group, you'll be the first to receive updates, exclusive content, and opportunities to get involved in the campaign. Your support is crucial, and we're grateful to have passionate individuals like you standing with us. Here's what you can expect as a member of our campaign community:
1. Campaign Updates: Stay informed about Caorlyn Rush's latest activities, events, and milestones in real-time.
2. Exclusive Content: Enjoy behind-the-scenes looks, personal messages from [Candidate's Name], and special content created just for our campaign community.
3. Opportunities to Engage: Be part of the action! We'll share opportunities for you to volunteer, attend events, and actively contribute to the campaign's success.
4. Community Discussions: Connect with fellow supporters, share your thoughts, and participate in discussions about the issues that matter most to our community.

To ensure you receive all our updates, please add our email address to your contacts and keep an eye on your inbox for exciting announcements. Thank you for joining us on this journey. Together, we can make a difference and build a brighter future for New Jersey's 2nd. [Donation Link](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsZ7yn9XYR0z33rx2hCsxounsIy2fjMAKdEhs8tXFuFsXaZP0mNqjuFtBZdas6JEss&e=d0f02055da916613bd618f1970a64278&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1&n=1&v=10) If you have any questions or ideas, feel free to reply to this email or reach out to our campaign team at [info@carolynrushforcongress.com](mailto:info@carolynrushforcongress.com) Let's make history together! Warm regards,

name: Team Evers
subject: Tony vs. gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
| Derek, did you see Tony’s message about why Wisconsin deserves better than gerrymandered electoral maps where politicians get to pick their voters?

**[Add your name here to stand with Tony in favor of fair, non-partisan maps, and read below to find out more about recent news that could end gerrymandering:](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2223?source=EM_NBI_TE_20231207_PT_TrumpDemocracy.1.1_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_TrumpDemocracy&t=5&akid=6578%2E1827488%2EBdmx9U)**

**_\----Begin Forwarded Message----_**

Derek,

For more than a decade, the Republican-controlled Legislature has used its power to gerrymander districts so egregiously that Republicans locked in their majority. Even when Democrats got over 50% of the vote statewide, Republicans nearly achieved a supermajority capable of overriding my vetoes.

Legislative maps should not be based on partisan political games, which is why I agree with the Supreme Court's recent determination that the current maps are unconstitutional.

[Add your name if you agree that Wisconsin deserves fair, non-partisan election maps that allow people to pick their own leaders!](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2223?source=EM_NBI_TE_20231207_PT_TrumpDemocracy.1.1_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_TrumpDemocracy&t=6&akid=6578%2E1827488%2EBdmx9U)

| ****[SUPPORT FAIR MAPS](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2223?source=EM_NBI_TE_20231207_PT_TrumpDemocracy.1.1_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_TrumpDemocracy&t=7&akid=6578%2E1827488%2EBdmx9U)****
---

Gerrymandering allows politicians, not voters, to determine who has the majority, and that's just wrong.

Voters need to be in charge, and I won't stop fighting until power is returned to the people.

[Sign here if you agree that Wisconsin deserves fair, non-partisan maps.](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2223?source=EM_NBI_TE_20231207_PT_TrumpDemocracy.1.1_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_TrumpDemocracy&t=8&akid=6578%2E1827488%2EBdmx9U)

Onward,

Tony
| [Support Tony](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/3?t=4&akid=6578%2E1827488%2EBdmx9U)
---
Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin.
---

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1703%2E552475%2Eysq1l0)
Hi Peter,
We’re only halfway through the first month of 2024, and our Senate race is already heating up. We’ll give you an update on the state of our race in just a moment, but first, we need your support. [**Will you chip in your first $5 to keep PA blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240114-1&refcode2=1703_552475_ysq1l0&akid=1703%2E552475%2Eysq1l0)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240114-1-el&refcode2=1703_552475_ysq1l0&akid=1703%2E552475%2Eysq1l0) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240114-1-el&refcode2=1703_552475_ysq1l0&akid=1703%2E552475%2Eysq1l0) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240114-1-el&refcode2=1703_552475_ysq1l0&akid=1703%2E552475%2Eysq1l0) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240114-1-el&refcode2=1703_552475_ysq1l0&akid=1703%2E552475%2Eysq1l0) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240114-1-el&refcode2=1703_552475_ysq1l0&akid=1703%2E552475%2Eysq1l0) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240114-1&refcode2=1703_552475_ysq1l0&akid=1703%2E552475%2Eysq1l0)
---
Here are 3 things you need to know about our race:
1. **A super PAC supporting Bob’s opponent just announced that it raised nearly $18 million.** This is a record in the year before an election, and we know they’ll have tens of millions more by the summer.
2. **Not only that, but this super PAC is reportedly being funded by right-wing billionaires.** It’s clear that David McCormick has no shortage of deep-pocketed friends waiting in the wings to fund his operation.
3. **This is all on top of David McCormick’s ability to self-fund his campaign.** He already wrote his campaign a $1 million check, and we know this is just the beginning.

**Peter, this is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate race our Commonwealth has ever seen, so we need to ask:**[**Will you chip in $5 or more today to help us fight back against the wall of GOP dark money headed our way?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240114-1&refcode2=1703_552475_ysq1l0&akid=1703%2E552475%2Eysq1l0)
Thank you for being with us,
Team Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1703%2E552475%2Eysq1l0)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1703%2E552475%2Eysq1l0)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/RTNTnyh3ez34dGAJ1A7-4A~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnhr3nP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDExNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9vbmV5ZWFyc3dvcm5pbl9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYXhVb3pUV2dYZVpSc29WaEVPb0dvQWNEZ1omcmVmY29kZTI9MmF4VW96VFdnWGVaUnNvVmhFT29Hb0FjRGdaJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJheFVvelRXZ1hlWlJzb1ZoRU9vR29BY0RnWlcDc3BjQgplouc4pGUk2R85UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

**A year ago this week, I was officially sworn into the United States Congress.** As a working class, Afro-Latino member of Gen Z, I defied the odds to be elected to an institution that is designed to keep people like me from having a seat at the table. Now, it’s safe to say that we made it. I’m determined to build on the progress we’ve made for Orlando, for working families, and for my generation – whose future is at stake. **But no one expected me to be here, and I’m constantly facing attacks from GOP leaders and those who hate to see young, working, everyday people having a voice in Congress. If I’m going to keep making real progress in Congress and STAY here, I need our team firing on all cylinders in 2024 – that means I need YOU with me, Peter.** [**_I’m going keep doing my part in Washington, but powering our fight from where you are is how you can do YOUR part – for ALL of us in this movement. Can I count on you to stand with me by chipping in $27 now? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/RTNTnyh3ez34dGAJ1A7-4A~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnhr3nP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDExNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9vbmV5ZWFyc3dvcm5pbl9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYXhVb3pUV2dYZVpSc29WaEVPb0dvQWNEZ1omcmVmY29kZTI9MmF4VW96VFdnWGVaUnNvVmhFT29Hb0FjRGdaJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJheFVvelRXZ1hlWlJzb1ZoRU9vR29BY0RnWlcDc3BjQgplouc4pGUk2R85UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) **I ran for Congress because it’s clear that we can’t rely on the same old institutions to fix the same old problems.** That’s why I’ve been fighting for bold change, fighting for transformative legislation on everything from housing to economic justice to gun safety. But if I’m going to _keep_ fighting in Congress through the far right’s continuous attacks, we need to show them that our movement is NOT to be messed with. **And that means proving that our grassroots army is only getting stronger by the day. But the only way we’ll prove that is if we still have dollars coming in the door.** That’s how we got here, and that’s how we’ll stay here, so I need you with me all the way. [**_Peter, can I count on you to chip in $27 to keep our movement as strong as possible in 2024? I’m only $4,829 short of our weekly fundraising goal! >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/RTNTnyh3ez34dGAJ1A7-4A~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnhr3nP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDExNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9vbmV5ZWFyc3dvcm5pbl9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYXhVb3pUV2dYZVpSc29WaEVPb0dvQWNEZ1omcmVmY29kZTI9MmF4VW96VFdnWGVaUnNvVmhFT29Hb0FjRGdaJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJheFVvelRXZ1hlWlJzb1ZoRU9vR29BY0RnWlcDc3BjQgplouc4pGUk2R85UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/ZC0DadFlEAJuSlqhA0fAtA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnhr3nP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDExNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9vbmV5ZWFyc3dvcm5pbl9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MTAmY2RtYz0yYXhVb3pUV2dYZVpSc29WaEVPb0dvQWNEZ1omcmVmY29kZTI9MmF4VW96VFdnWGVaUnNvVmhFT29Hb0FjRGdaJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJheFVvelRXZ1hlWlJzb1ZoRU9vR29BY0RnWlcDc3BjQgplouc4pGUk2R85UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

clean_body: | ~~ A year ago this week, I was officially sworn into the United States Congress. As a working class, Afro-Latino member of Gen Z, I defied the odds to be elected to an institution that is designed to keep people like me from having a seat at the table. Now, it’s safe to say that we made it. I’m determined to build on the progress we’ve made for Orlando, for working families, and for my generation – whose future is at stake. But no one expected me to be here, and I’m constantly facing attacks from GOP leaders and those who hate to see young, working, everyday people having a voice in Congress. If I’m going to keep making real progress in Congress and STAY here, I need our team firing on all cylinders in 2024 – that means I need YOU with me, Peter. ~~ I ran for Congress because it’s clear that we can’t rely on the same old institutions to fix the same old problems. That’s why I’ve been fighting for bold change, fighting for transformative legislation on everything from housing to economic justice to gun safety. But if I’m going to keep fighting in Congress through the far right’s continuous attacks, we need to show them that our movement is NOT to be messed with. And that means proving that our grassroots army is only getting stronger by the day. But the only way we’ll prove that is if we still have dollars coming in the door. That’s how we got here, and that’s how we’ll stay here, so I need you with me all the way. ~~ | | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ ~ It’s time to get to work, Representative Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. subject: They’re absolutely terrified about what he’ll do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
This may be our last chance| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=68c66cfde1c248ffac7632ae5d0169fb&_e=l7zbiuEKmLIqi93Wj2dHJSYbTR0e1qsdJuB5y_w-GX-UQoHK5oM53osnHMHnXkI82WZHP4gzdHathabZ0HXPDCwBRsgmdhpbLDVCQ1xdUV7bDlk_VjDdVvgeaEWpPDVW4skIQeM9jgYxg97w11LDM47LoekwJiu6u0789GyEhx5lw1ABsIrLXSnrCzExReO5qYcSeXpO4Ue6HhrRQLkZk713vCXr0ATdtjl0P7_yR5fGreJYe6bO3SqLYlNgEsTV1zFWji5kFnhpgpDKSOmfewgjPu2kGxo6S67WYyU995aatRU-vtagV3qJf2NEMwPsIl_YyhOrHdSIQIO1hmlp5Kh-LuPJhXh3ZwfZgxw64Sqb2Xz4lLx8co1N5lVC5LsFfsuI9Upad5BKmYokAv637pT95wRYAtcYLc0aIfEQmPo%3D)
---
Friend, Next year, we have the chance to not only **FLIP** the Senate to Republicans, but to make sure Democrats can’t flip it back for **YEARS** to come. And we know the one state that will ensure that it happens. **[**MICHIGAN.**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=68c66cfde1c248ffac7632ae5d0169fb&_e=l7zbiuEKmLIqi93Wj2dHJSYbTR0e1qsdJuB5y_w-GX-UQoHK5oM53osnHMHnXkI82WZHP4gzdHathabZ0HXPDCwBRsgmdhpbLDVCQ1xdUV7bDlk_VjDdVvgeaEWpPDVW4skIQeM9jgYxg97w11LDM47LoekwJiu6u0789GyEhx5lw1ABsIrLXSnrCzExReO5qYcSeXpO4Ue6HhrRQLkZk713vCXr0ATdtjl0P7_yR5fGreJYe6bO3SqLYlNgEsTVQ30c-CHtQpfwj7yU3cTuGGBymvpoeoWSt5xmrkN4IuJJK2b15AWJijoQc6al7vFoe1cEQp442qqRmXXBM9yRIxUJIyTfYGaQtOtbA3BNv30TZA_9NgQ47pdPz3Y42NIugy2yfdnWimV0Yu6ey3Li50jMRkOgoZKiYvbW48aB_Oc%3D)** The Great Lakes State is the key to ensuring a **TOTAL** Republican victory in 2024. In every single Presidential election since 2008, the party that wins Michigan has won not only the Senate, but also the Presidency. That’s why it’s absolutely crucial that Republicans win Michigan next year – and we know the candidate who’s going to deliver. Mike Rogers is a former FBI Special Agent, Army veteran, and former Chair of the House Intelligence Committee. Mike’s rock-solid integrity and lifetime of serving our country make him the strongest candidate not only to flip this seat, but to represent our conservative values in Washington, D.C. The left-wing Democrats are **TERRIFIED** of what Mike plans to do when he gets elected. That’s why they’re planning to spend **MILLIONS and MILLIONS** of dollars to stop him! Mike’s no stranger to close elections – he won his first race for Congress by just over 100 votes – and he’s ready to earn **EVERY SINGLE VOTE** that he can this time around. Friend, Mike Rogers is depending on Patriotic Americans like us to help him get elected and flip the Senate **FOR GOOD.** That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. Anything you can give, **[**even just $5, $10, or $20**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=68c66cfde1c248ffac7632ae5d0169fb&_e=l7zbiuEKmLIqi93Wj2dHJSYbTR0e1qsdJuB5y_w-GX-UQoHK5oM53osnHMHnXkI82WZHP4gzdHathabZ0HXPDCwBRsgmdhpbLDVCQ1xdUV7bDlk_VjDdVvgeaEWpPDVW4skIQeM9jgYxg97w11LDM47LoekwJiu6u0789GyEhx5lw1ABsIrLXSnrCzExReO5qYcSeXpO4Ue6HhrRQLkZk713vCXr0ATdtjl0P7_yR5fGreJYe6bO3SqLYlNgEsTVblErIUZIdHgObmAjYXLLDLb5-LZyb4Dr9wjqNEZrCT4auAC074Vc5xUnvx-7B29hZHZXniAxOIQiwzItK1GJZ8Lzwj65Az_diJBEbDH4FUtsJyApRVhiFgF7pY0YTmeEI2S5-wCB1C6f2MCFzODq7aLGHky1SLUKqclccinuHlQ%3D)** will go a **LONG WAY** toward not only flipping the Senate, but ensuring that the Senate stays in Republican hands for several years to come! Thanks for your support. Sincerely, Team Rogers

Anything you can give, will go a LONG WAY toward not only flipping the Senate, but ensuring that the Senate stays in Republican hands for several years to come! Thanks for your support. Sincerely, Team Rogers Paid for by Rogers for Senate.
