name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Pukita=2C=20GFI=20Ohio?=
subject: URGENT! Ohio Liberator List!
body:
URGENT! Ohio Liberator List! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4fed68cde3&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
Happy New Year!

I’m sorry we haven’t communicated in quite a while. It’s been a busy few months for “self-governance” in Ohio. Issue 1 in August, another Issue 1 in November, and now a primary election just around the corner, which is the reason for this communication.

Many volunteers across Ohio are working to fix what we believe is wrong with the way we’re governed at the local, state, and national levels. But it all starts locally, because as the saying goes, “All politics is local.”

We have an opportunity with Ohio’s March 19th primary election to wrest control of both Ohio’s House of Representatives & the Ohio Republican Party from insider, corrupt, career politicians. But it won’t be easy, and we need your help. Please consider doing everything you can to lend a hand.

---
| | |
**THE OHIO “LIBERATOR LIST”

[www.liberatorlist.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=696ae81051&e=5c740fa3e2)**

---
|
Myriad people involved in grassroots political activism across Ohio have built this list to make all Ohioans aware of candidates who aren't establishment & tend to be small-government, freedom-loving, America-loving, regular people. These candidate have stood up and are willing to contribute their time, talent, and/or treasure to run for office in hopes of fixing our badly broken communities, state & nation. They face an uphill battle against insider, establishment, money, a legacy corporate media that disrespects them, and the headwind of cancel culture degrading word-of-mouth support. You can see the list [HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e6326ca453&e=5c740fa3e2) or by clicking on the image below. We pray this list will help in this battle against these obstacles. Please share it with everyone you can!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9513597183&e=5c740fa3e2)

This list is not an endorsement of these candidates. We urge you to do your own homework & research these people. Where we can, we've linked to their web presence so you can click their names & start your exploration. Worst case, if you're pressed for time or can't drum up what's needed to do a deeper dive, we believe you can trust these candidates to do a good job of representing you. We believe they are the best candidates of those from whom you will be asked to choose on March 19, 2024, in Ohio's primary election.

---
| |
**HELP US PROMOTE THE "LIBERATOR LIST"**

---
|
If you like this idea please become part of our promotional army across Ohio to help us promote the "Liberator List". As we did with both Issue 1 ballot initiatives, we are promoting the “Liberator List” with magnetic car door signs, magnetic bumper stickers, and re-stickable bumper stickers.

The new twist here is we’ve made these generic so they can be used over and over for every election. The signs & stickers won’t change but the web page will! Invest in signs or stickers once & promote our movement many times!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a8a7985e98&e=5c740fa3e2)
_Car Door Magnets (9" x 12")_

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9e5f9d6508&e=5c740fa3e2)
_Bumper Sticker (9" x 3") either magnetic or re-stickable_

Order yours by going **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=584d0f3796&e=5c740fa3e2)** or clicking on the images above. You will pay when you receive your order. There's no payment needed up-front.

Please don’t delay. Early voting starts February 21st!

Remember, we're just getting started. This effort will continue for every election!

Thank you!

---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|

October 15, 2023 - Critical Volunteer Needs!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c1a03ac55b&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f54f1df235&e=5c740fa3e2)

Marsha Blackburn has a MASSIVE campaign war chest of over $6 million. **The hard truth is that our campaign isn’t keeping pace.** I’m convinced that this grassroots team _can_ take her on, but that means it’s even MORE important that we don’t fall short of our goals. Our January mid-month goal is $100,000. Right now, it doesn’t look like we’ll get there before midnight tomorrow. **_[Overcoming Marsha’s advantage won’t be easy — that’s why we’re so concerned about meeting each one of our fundraising targets. clean_body: Marsha’s war chest is filled by corporate PAC $$$ | I’m in a bit of a bind, Peter. Marsha Blackburn has a MASSIVE campaign war chest of over $6 million. The hard truth is that our campaign isn’t keeping pace. I’m convinced that this grassroots team can take her on, but that means it’s even MORE important that we don’t fall short of our goals. Our January mid-month goal is $100,000. Right now, it doesn’t look like we’ll get there before midnight tomorrow. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = My opponent takes massive checks from corporate PACs. I rely on small-dollar contributions from hardworking folks and don’t take a CENT from corporate PACs. That’s how her campaign coffers are so full... and it’s just the start of the differences between us. Unlike Marsha Blackburn, I will stand tall to DEFEND our democracy and our fundamental rights — not destroy them. I will LISTEN to my constituents — not ignore them. And I’ll fight for the PEOPLE — not special interests or an elite donor class. Peter, my approach to campaigning makes it a little harder to fundraise, but I know it’s the right way to win this race and represent Tennessee. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I appreciate it, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

body:

#

Peter, we won’t waste any time getting into it today.

So we are asking you, humbly, to chip in your first $3 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign and become a FOUNDING DONOR for 2024.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240114-2-30&t=1&akid=1716%2E734936%2E1SsuXc)

Team Gallego

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: MAGA Extremists want to pass a national abortion ban...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=929%2E52803%2E_QWNeq)

| | What the anti-choice GOP is doing all across the country to limit and outlaw abortion access is chilling, Peter. It’s disheartening to see that in 2024, we’re still forced to fight tooth and nail for every inch in the battle for bodily autonomy. It’s become outright dangerous to simply be a woman in places like Texas and Florida, and national Republicans are gearing up for a nationwide ban if they win big this year. _So let’s get one thing clear:**Abortion is health care, period.**_ **Peter, I’ll never stop fighting to protect and expand access to safe and legal abortion, but I need your help amplifying that message.[Would you please consider donating to my campaign so I can push for a federal law to protect reproductive freedom on the Senate floor?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9520?t=10&amount=25&akid=929%2E52803%2E_QWNeq)** | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9520?t=11&amount=25&akid=929%2E52803%2E_QWNeq)
---
The right to access an abortion is vastly supported by a majority of Americans, and as we’ve seen across the country, when abortion is on the ballot people come out in droves to the polls to protect it.
_We saw that when Ohioans voted overwhelmingly in support of enshrining abortion rights into the state constitution._
_We saw it when voters in Virginia stood up to Glenn Youngkin and denied him the legislative majorities he would have needed to further restrict abortion in Virginia._
_We saw it when Kentuckians rejected the far-right, anti-choice gubernatorial candidate and re-elected Democratic Governor Andy Beshear._
It’s critical we don’t let up in this fight, because lives are very literally on the line.
**[Can I count on your support to chip in $25 toward my campaign for the U.S. Senate so that I can fight for reproductive rights on the national level? We need more pro-choice advocates in the Senate willing to go to the mat for abortion access, and I’m ready to do exactly that.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9520?t=12&amount=25&akid=929%2E52803%2E_QWNeq)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

clean_body: | | | What the anti-choice GOP is doing all across the country to limit and outlaw abortion access is chilling, Peter. It’s disheartening to see that in 2024, we’re still forced to fight tooth and nail for every inch in the battle for bodily autonomy. It’s become outright dangerous to simply be a woman in places like Texas and Florida, and national Republicans are gearing up for a nationwide ban if they win big this year. So let’s get one thing clear:Abortion is health care, period. Peter, I’ll never stop fighting to protect and expand access to safe and legal abortion, but I need your help amplifying that message. | | | The right to access an abortion is vastly supported by a majority of Americans, and as we’ve seen across the country, when abortion is on the ballot people come out in droves to the polls to protect it. We saw that when Ohioans voted overwhelmingly in support of enshrining abortion rights into the state constitution. We saw it when voters in Virginia stood up to Glenn Youngkin and denied him the legislative majorities he would have needed to further restrict abortion in Virginia. We saw it when Kentuckians rejected the far-right, anti-choice gubernatorial candidate and re-elected Democratic Governor Andy Beshear. It’s critical we don’t let up in this fight, because lives are very literally on the line. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Angela Alsobrooks | | | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. subject: got 30 seconds, Peter?

body:
I’ll make this quick:

| Hey Peter, it’s Ritchie.

All I need is 30 seconds of your time! _Here’s why:_

**1.** It’s a new year, but the _same_ GOP. Congress returned to session on Monday, and they’re _already_ back to playing partisan games and sowing division.

**2.** Unless we build _massive_ grassroots support _now,_ _this_ will be our continued reality into 2024 and beyond: we’ll have a party in charge that refuses to put people over politics.

**3.** My team sets fundraising benchmarks to keep us on track to win in November — _but we’re still $1,233 short of tomorrow’s must-hit goal._

I won’t take any more of your time, Peter, but I’m really hoping I can count on you to step up: **[Will you help this people-powered movement meet our first goal of 2024 — _our election year!_ — by chipping in $3 today? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77088867/449328169/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240114_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGZjZGJjMS0xYmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wZODN1o2Ru5K5PflGzJlUO61UhNo7pzen9d8AALKTas=)** | [$1,233 LEFT TO GOAL: CHIP IN $3 TO RE-ELECT RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77088868/449328170/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240114_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGZjZGJjMS0xYmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wZODN1o2Ru5K5PflGzJlUO61UhNo7pzen9d8AALKTas=)

Adam’s record of service and leadership speaks for itself.

He’s delivered for Californians time and again — lowering prescription
drug costs, securing funding for more affordable housing, and bringing new
jobs to our state.

And as the LA Times wrote in their endorsement:

“Schiff stands out for his extraordinary leadership over the last several
years in helping to protect the nation’s institutions, the rule of law and
American democracy itself from former President Trump.”

“It’s no surprise that Schiff is so often tapped to take the lead in these
high-profile efforts.”

“Colleagues describe him as an incredibly intelligent and uniquely skilled
communicator who can get to the core of an issue — a talent essential to
mustering the support of fellow legislators and the public at large.”

“[H]as the respect of lawmakers on both sides of the aisle.”

Now more than ever, we need leaders like Adam who know how to take on the
big fights and get things done.

body:
wouldn't you agree?

Hey, Peter,

I know it is only a few weeks into the New Year, but I am certain about one thing that **CANNOT** play out in 2024. Sherrod Brown cannot **WIN!!!**

It’s only January, but some things don’t take long to **KNOW.** A 2024 with Sherrod Brown WINNING RE-ELECTION in Ohio is something that doesn’t take long to figure out is a **VERY BAD IDEA!**

**[We are calling on Conservatives in Ohio to join our movement to save Ohio and this nation from Democrat Destruction. Matt is the only candidate that WILL DEFEAT Brown head-to-head. There is no other choice.](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=931152bb7fdc423a8db8927464d4c61c&_e=ReXa-6Ry7_2IpnOgQ9Xba54-R6vz7IaO1sh0lNPoU2GaE2VsVaYBknmrw06E13MXnogWlkmzsqKcp9KG_DJNLwWe1Jfqtf4BAkk4z_cNGrFCX36mKoTEx5c4T7y2egvt9NT8kK6cZvqMw1kdG3f63ij7rztDxOY343-aIKVb-Zata2gsovNzIc_gi1I7Mf7QawI6QS1GMFj_RF1x-H2ffD6q8XBYtxA2LQrqrxScQpNhZfGBk74lWaNgtw-SmbGE4c0zETrxtQPriVhJBusd3dK3KTYmjheQhDWe5NW3vTqV0AbXGvVnGv5thfxg5bsb)**

Sherrod Brown will only act as one of Biden’s puppets, which we have seen time and again. That is not what is needed for Ohio in 2024. The Biden Administration has done enough, and we can’t have his puppets **lingering** in our great state!
| [ **FIRE SHERROD BROWN** ](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=931152bb7fdc423a8db8927464d4c61c&_e=ReXa-6Ry7_2IpnOgQ9Xba54-R6vz7IaO1sh0lNPoU2GaE2VsVaYBknmrw06E13MXnogWlkmzsqKcp9KG_DJNLwWe1Jfqtf4BAkk4z_cNGrFCX36mKoTEx5c4T7y2egvt9NT8kK6cZvqMw1kdG3f63ij7rztDxOY343-aIKVb-ZZAroAvRdrjdwI3S5mbBD9tqhY7R1seB-TyCnmShQFXnu2Hw7SgYiafVPPq5kA3z7MPsY0s8TIsm4QCJ34Y5HF_3jeYVITRIMnnvUm1sdNBlxDrgc9XqIpHUFwF3TaPycBUe2_YJuQ6QUKFgoAK3TV9)

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8d83e0d64c6646debd3a69833afbffe3&_e=nDf-UKfdRix0tFJvT2_d1Lz1GvF2XuQTbIXSXp8aNVthk9MKEsGQbzsnTnU5oXXmlHCUS6Gfw_NRvfYJSQkmSMzKqXUSqY1oroTpB4VMyaSni7PyLztqvkDf8SZP8plEJ3e1bQvjhbMo1Rx00L1EG7NyPCVMz59KlCe_ocv825bLgqdGi4a-Sx_XYDvYW7c1aI3xDBZEc6mPi4_MRtpIAm5ZgGXCm1aoUseT_e2fFt-20mDkAU-VfMaLZ_5ctKF2i-5ksZSJsfLIky4kLFY8-2-8_F53m-EwTd6G_hxMuV0R8QyPPLI3r-rtTxZp44UKQyZ8RQZkohMRR4NiGMdD0r7bZpaC44Rj4MLNv_JibTspyBb-f18VX7bLrzpVLqIg-hQJUrd1HtxAfQS2mKxJekdyYuBZN3mFrEmLU42q1dU7cgvhHX8hrrpM_z6ZoSCC)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8d83e0d64c6646debd3a69833afbffe3&_e=nDf-UKfdRix0tFJvT2_d1Lz1GvF2XuQTbIXSXp8aNVthk9MKEsGQbzsnTnU5oXXmlHCUS6Gfw_NRvfYJSQkmSMzKqXUSqY1oroTpB4VMyaSni7PyLztqvkDf8SZP8plEJ3e1bQvjhbMo1Rx00L1EG7NyPCVMz59KlCe_ocv825bLgqdGi4a-Sx_XYDvYW7c1aI3xDBZEc6mPi4_MRtpIAm5ZgGXCm1aoUseT_e2fFt-20mDkAU-VfMaLZ_5ctKF2i-5ksZSJsfLIky4kLFY8-2-8_F53m-EwTd6G_hxMuV0V4BFBP_1mpGFzNghWOHgG6EqP9u6pO0PqCIzMiY2e1ziIb7HwmxoX4jnt0sCiWgO4eys6V6WQRd3RwJYBNPjoGdwPMc2kq0-DcpxY8X2l8llhd-46LIZqNBkEhwCWOt4JKxZyq9b73P6SF8l6fb_Y)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Peter — Republicans spent $77 million to win Wisconsin’s last Senate election, and are gearing up to spend even more to defeat Tammy. Eric Hovde, the megamillionaire California bank owner who Republicans confirmed will run against Tammy, is preparing to spend at least $20 million of his own personal fortune on this race. But Tammy’s not just relying on megamillionaires with seven-figure checks to win this race. Instead, tens of thousands of grassroots supporters who pitch in what they can, when they can will make all the difference for our campaign. **[So today, we’re asking you to chip in $1 (no, we’re not kidding!) to help reelect Tammy. subject: What’s the best way to support Mondaire?

body:
Mondaire is relying on the power of his grassroots supporters stepping up when they can to get him across the finish line.
Team—Election Day is _less than 10 months away_ , and we need to make every single month count if we’re going to flip NY-17 blue and retake our House majority in November.

The best way to support Mondaire is by becoming a monthly donor. Whether it’s $5 or $100, contributing whatever you’re able to each month allows us to plan ahead, ensuring a steady and reliable source of funding that we count on. [**Join 174 Mondaire supporters ahead of Tuesday’s mid-month fundraising deadline and become a monthly donor today to help sustain the campaign through November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77089112/449329135/-1119912810?refcode=em24_240114_MM2_fndd_gq_act___TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240114_MM2_fndd_gq_act___TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=f66b1ef1-1fb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjZiMWVmMS0xZmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k50AYWzVf5RE8MXRMNkZt8ivRxd5_PK1AwWdCD9oHP8=)

Here’s the thing: Mondaire doesn’t rely on corporate PACs to fuel his campaign. He relies on the power of his grassroots supporters stepping up when they can to get him across the finish line.

While Mondaire wouldn’t have it any other way, it does mean we have to be more strategic and remain three steps ahead of Mondaire’s opponent Mike Lawler—who rakes in fortunes from the fossil fuel industry and shady far-right PACs.

**Becoming a monthly donor keeps our campaign ahead of the curve.** When we know how much is coming in every month, we can plan ahead and mobilize more volunteers, run more ads, and get Mondaire’s message out to every corner of the district for the next 10 months. It ensures we have what it takes to fight back against the millions in outside spending that will be poured into our race.

The 174 regular folks like you who make monthly donations to Mondaire’s campaign are an important part of our team. We’ve set a goal of growing that number to 200 in January to help us start the election year on a strong, sustainable path to victory.

**[So, will you make a monthly recurring contribution before our first mid-month fundraiser of 2024? Team Mondaire

| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. clean_body: Mondaire is relying on the power of his grassroots supporters stepping up when they can to get him across the finish line. Team—Election Day is less than 10 months away , and we need to make every single month count if we’re going to flip NY-17 blue and retake our House majority in November. The best way to support Mondaire is by becoming a monthly donor. Whether it’s $5 or $100, contributing whatever you’re able to each month allows us to plan ahead, ensuring a steady and reliable source of funding that we count on. = = = Here’s the thing: Mondaire doesn’t rely on corporate PACs to fuel his campaign. He relies on the power of his grassroots supporters stepping up when they can to get him across the finish line. While Mondaire wouldn’t have it any other way, it does mean we have to be more strategic and remain three steps ahead of Mondaire’s opponent Mike Lawler—who rakes in fortunes from the fossil fuel industry and shady far-right PACs. Becoming a monthly donor keeps our campaign ahead of the curve. When we know how much is coming in every month, we can plan ahead and mobilize more volunteers, run more ads, and get Mondaire’s message out to every corner of the district for the next 10 months. It ensures we have what it takes to fight back against the millions in outside spending that will be poured into our race. The 174 regular folks like you who make monthly donations to Mondaire’s campaign are an important part of our team. We’ve set a goal of growing that number to 200 in January to help us start the election year on a strong, sustainable path to victory. = = = Thank you so much, Team Mondaire | Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

name: Jon Hamm
subject: A note about Josh Hawley on the anniversary of January 6th
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)
---
Hi, it’s Jon Hamm.

I’m a born-and-raised Missourian who watched with horror when Josh Hawley raised his fist at insurrectionists outside the U.S. Capitol on January 6th, then ran out the back door when they stormed the building later that day.

I’ve seen communities across my home state torn apart because of cowardly politicians like him — and I’m not willing to sit on the sidelines in this election. So before I ask you to [**split a donation of $10 or whatever you can today between my friend Lucas Kunce’s campaign to replace Josh Hawley and Fight for Reform to elect pro-democracy Democrats**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36017?t=7&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)**, please let me tell you why:** | [SUPPORT LUCAS KUNCE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36017?t=8&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)
---
Most of my family is from a town in Missouri called Ste. Genevieve, about 60 miles south of St. Louis. I’ve watched their community go downhill for years.

While corrupt politicians shipped jobs overseas and voted to give handouts to Wall Street and their corporate allies, everyday people just trying to survive in the place they call home ran out of money and opportunities.

**Our leaders abandoned them — and Josh Hawley is the perfect example.**

Instead of fighting for what would make the communities in my home state stronger, Josh Hawley has been busy engaging in the out-of-touch culture wars that only divide us — all so he can get more and more power for himself.

That’s what we saw on January 6th, 2021. Hawley raised his fist at rioters outside the Capitol because he thought it would make himself look strong. But when sh*t got real, he ran out the back door like a coward — away from the same people he was claiming to support just hours earlier.

What’s even more ridiculous? Since that day, Hawley has desperately tried to convince all of us that he’s the authority on what it means to be a man in this country. He even published a whole book about it earlier this year:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36017?t=9&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)
Well... when I think about manhood, I think about courage. And that’s not something you can write a book about.

Missouri is the Show Me State. Courage is something you have to show us.

**That’s why I’m supporting Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.** As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marines to serve the community that took care of him growing up, Lucas has already shown us that he knows the true meaning of courage.

Lucas knows courage is about standing up to the powerful and working to rebuild our state. And he knows real leaders fight to empower everyday people and secure our future for generations to come — not for their own power or profit.
**So, if you want to be told about manhood, some guy wrote a book about it.** [**But if you want someone to show you real courage, please join me in supporting Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate by splitting a donation of $10 between his campaign and Fight for Reform today.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36017?t=10&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Lucas Kunce will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36018?t=11&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36019?t=12&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36020?t=13&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36021?t=14&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36017?t=15&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)
**Lucas worked hard over the last year to put Missouri’s Senate race on the map.** From calling out Josh Hawley’s blatant corruption to building a coalition of working people, pro-democracy organizations, and local leaders across Missouri — he is Democrats’ best chance to defeat a GOP incumbent and flip a U.S. Senate seat this election cycle.

He’s building a truly grassroots campaign, without a cent from corporate PACs, to defeat Hawley and take back power for everyday working Missourians — just like my friends and family in Ste. Genevieve.

**It has never been more important to elect a warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate.** [**So please, will you join me in supporting Lucas Kunce by splitting a donation of $10 between his grassroots campaign and Fight for Reform today?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36017?t=16&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)
[SUPPORT LUCAS KUNCE AND FIGHT FOR REFORM »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36017?t=17&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA)
---
Thanks for standing with me,

Jon Hamm
Lucas Kunce is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. Lucas Kunce is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources.
---
| | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035.
Authorized by Lucas Kunce for Senate.
Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors.
Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible.
fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=20644%2E4449941%2E8D5mCA).**

But when sht got real, he ran out the back door like a coward — away from the same people he was claiming to support just hours earlier. What’s even more ridiculous? Since that day, Hawley has desperately tried to convince all of us that he’s the authority on what it means to be a man in this country. He even published a whole book about it earlier this year: Well... when I think about manhood, I think about courage. And that’s not something you can write a book about. Missouri is the Show Me State. Courage is something you have to show us. That’s why I’m supporting Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marines to serve the community that took care of him growing up, Lucas has already shown us that he knows the true meaning of courage. Lucas knows courage is about standing up to the powerful and working to rebuild our state. And he knows real leaders fight to empower everyday people and secure our future for generations to come — not for their own power or profit. So, if you want to be told about manhood, some guy wrote a book about it. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Lucas Kunce will go through immediately: Lucas worked hard over the last year to put Missouri’s Senate race on the map. From calling out Josh Hawley’s blatant corruption to building a coalition of working people, pro-democracy organizations, and local leaders across Missouri — he is Democrats’ best chance to defeat a GOP incumbent and flip a U.S. Senate seat this election cycle. He’s building a truly grassroots campaign, without a cent from corporate PACs, to defeat Hawley and take back power for everyday working Missourians — just like my friends and family in Ste. Genevieve. It has never been more important to elect a warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate. Thanks for standing with me, Jon Hamm Lucas Kunce is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. Lucas Kunce is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources. | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035. Authorized by Lucas Kunce for Senate. Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible. fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives. Please, consider making a . name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Medicare and Social Security have never faced such grave danger
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77089824/449331334/296097457?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240114_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGVmYjBiZS0yMmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiPKudNGK1QcGnDZNoSQAzmtiKEUCVESIulnYA3f8wE=) Peter, It feels like Medicare and Social Security have never faced such grave danger. **First,** Republicans elected Mike Johnson as House Speaker. Most of us, especially in the Senate, knew little about him. But we quickly learned that MAGA Mike has previously supported making dramatic cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security — programs that millions of Americans rely on. **Then,** shortly after being elected Speaker, Johnson proposed the creation of a “fiscal commission” for these programs — or what _Social Security Works_ refers to as “a death panel designed to cut Medicare and Social Security behind closed doors.” **Now,** with less than ten months until the 2024 election, we must prepare to defend _every single_ Democratic Senate seat, because if Senate Republicans win back the majority in 2024, Mitch McConnell will put Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid up first on the chopping block — and he’ll be right in lockstep with Speaker Johnson. **Peter, I will never let down in the fight to defend the programs that millions of Americans rely on for affordable health care and a life of dignity, but I can’t do it alone.** [**With our first mid-month deadline of the year just two days away, your support will help us show MAGA Republicans that we won’t back down while they shamelessly attack working families. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I’m a mom of 6 kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77090127/449332391/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwM2UxMi0yN2IzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pctx4EuwQKYegXpB2E2xYkyRP9dnhtvIQeER2Auebes=) I’ve worn a lot of different hats throughout my life: advocate for children, state senator and now candidate for Congress. **But the best job I have is being a mom. My husband Joseph and I are the proud parents of six wonderful children.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77090128/449332392/1532741920?refcode=email_011424_Mom-of-6&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwM2UxMi0yN2IzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pctx4EuwQKYegXpB2E2xYkyRP9dnhtvIQeER2Auebes=) What I want for my family, what I spend my life fighting for, is what I want for every family: the Michigan Dream. I want all of our kids to be able to receive a quality education, grow up and get a good job, own a home, and not worry about how they’re going to pay the bills. Raising kids today isn’t easy – childcare is impossible to find and the costs of everyday items like groceries and housing are too expensive. For too many families across our state, the Michigan Dream is falling out of reach. **I’m running for Congress because, frankly, we need more level-headed people in Congress who focus on what families face every day. We need leaders who will work together to get real things done – and trust me, running a household with 6 kids, you learn a lot about negotiation, compromise, and toughness. I am ready to get things done.** But first, I need your support. This race for Congress will be one of the most competitive in the country, and we have less than 10 months left until Election Day. I’m counting on supporters like you to chip in so we can hire staff, run ads and talk to voters across Michigan’s 8th District. [_**So if you believe we need someone who gets it – a working mom – in Congress, will you chip in to my campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77090129/449332393/1532741920?refcode=email_011424_Mom-of-6&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwM2UxMi0yN2IzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pctx4EuwQKYegXpB2E2xYkyRP9dnhtvIQeER2Auebes=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77090130/449332394/1433120897?refcode=email_011424_Mom-of-6&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwM2UxMi0yN2IzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pctx4EuwQKYegXpB2E2xYkyRP9dnhtvIQeER2Auebes=)

name: Bob Casey
subject: I’m going to be up against a wall of Republican money in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1704%2E552475%2EZzDK2h)
Peter, I’m going to be up against a wall of Republican money in Pennsylvania.
My opponent is the wealthiest self-funder running for Senate anywhere in the country. He already put $1 million of his personal fortune into the race, and a super PAC supporting his campaign just announced raising nearly $18 million — that’s an astonishing amount.
On top of that, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are all in on flipping this seat.
When you’ve got this kind of money coming in against you, you need to build a team of supporters to help you fight back. I know for a fact that folks like you who chip in $5, $10, or $15 will make the difference in this Senate race.
[**Pennsylvania could decide our Senate majority. Can you give $5, $10, or $15 to help our campaign fight back against the millions that are going to come my way?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240114-2&refcode2=1704_552475_ZzDK2h&akid=1704%2E552475%2EZzDK2h)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240114-2-el&refcode2=1704_552475_ZzDK2h&akid=1704%2E552475%2EZzDK2h) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240114-2-el&refcode2=1704_552475_ZzDK2h&akid=1704%2E552475%2EZzDK2h) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240114-2-el&refcode2=1704_552475_ZzDK2h&akid=1704%2E552475%2EZzDK2h) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240114-2-el&refcode2=1704_552475_ZzDK2h&akid=1704%2E552475%2EZzDK2h) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240114-2-el&refcode2=1704_552475_ZzDK2h&akid=1704%2E552475%2EZzDK2h) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240114-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240114-2&refcode2=1704_552475_ZzDK2h&akid=1704%2E552475%2EZzDK2h)

Hey, Jane here.

I know it’s Sunday, and I’d usually say let’s take it easy, but not today.

My team tells me we're just shy of our mid-January fundraising goal, and the deadline is tonight.

Missing our goal could impact the level of support we can provide to our climate champions and diminish our impact against the corrupting influence of fossil fuel companies on our political system. We need to make sure our voices for climate action in 2024 are heard in ballot boxes nationwide.

Your support has always been a cornerstone of our work. If you can spare it, a $25 contribution or any amount you're comfortable with would be incredibly helpful today. Here's a direct link for a mid-month donation before tonight's deadline: **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email?amount=25&refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77090877/449334877/2105508926?amount=25&refcode=ea.3b4e5bf1-2cb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.3b4e5bf1-2cb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiNGU1YmYxLTJjYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NEwUpVmYOPnXAIcSqs-_4pf1yh9q2ZatrQk7X-tFiSM=)_**

Jane Fonda

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Clarence Thomas is the worst
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend –

A groundbreaking report by _ProPublica_ revealed:

**Far-right Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas suggested to a Republican member of Congress that he might resign if Congress didn’t increase Supreme Court justices’ salaries.**

After that conversation in 2000, Republican mega donors lavished Clarence Thomas with **_“a stream of gifts from friends and acquaintances that appears to be unparalleled in the modern history of the Supreme Court,”_** from luxury vacations to tuition payments.

After Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump conspired to stack the Court with three far-right justices, the result for our country has been disastrous.

From abortion bans and the end of affirmative action, to environmental degradation, repealing gun safety measures, blocking student loan relief, and more, the Supreme Court is the most extreme it has been in generations, and far from the fair, just, impartial judicial body the framers intended it to be.

**That’s why I’ve led the efforts to pass legislation to expand the Supreme Court and institute term limits and a code of ethics, so that the open corruption we’ve suffered from does not continue.**

[That’s what I’ll fight for in the U.S. Senate, where California’s next Senator will be responsible for casting votes to confirm or deny Supreme Court justices. If you can split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign of $10 or more ahead of my mid-month deadline to help in this fight, I’m personally asking you to chip in right now.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59701?t=6&akid=12445%2E878179%2EKMdDaq) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59702?t=7&akid=12445%2E878179%2EKMdDaq)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59703?t=8&akid=12445%2E878179%2EKMdDaq)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59704?t=9&akid=12445%2E878179%2EKMdDaq)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59705?t=10&akid=12445%2E878179%2EKMdDaq)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59701?t=11&akid=12445%2E878179%2EKMdDaq)
The work to strengthen our democracy and ensure that our children and grandchildren grow up in a world that has more rights and freedoms than today is a moral imperative — and I won’t rest until that’s what we’ve achieved.

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12445%2E878179%2EKMdDaq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12445%2E878179%2EKMdDaq).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12445%2E878179%2EKMdDaq) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=12445%2E878179%2EKMdDaq). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12445%2E878179%2EKMdDaq)

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=673dcb88afe34ca480d2699e3cda1f7e&_e=8WnY-cOTrARekvwgs9tWfiFwdn2Qy5rnkGB7xJl0pUrG30hqDmF7ydrN3n5lZd6s9w7AcZpa4eCBRvNlWttS24DRMZMYZsojUu2zi4zh60Sn4Wnd_Yxvfo4JGq34bIFbHb73VxzRxzlS6P7HpvmBiwJyv9yyFFAncySA-syv7AJ-tMVIuBSz_6nbT5KnlaPt7QV4EnafiTKxDz2XZUTpY5ODWzzF8s5Q3wJ1cDtuYakPNRakSCKv7AYi5FYCXk0B1u5nUmmyD9IVa9i6i9-3db3XKv5BdGBZANhExGYpjWPv8XVfgi57miKtSHksKe42bbS-pB_xlGoyke4HBmHF9tTKjEHLLOn0euJGQ-_BNLJl59PqbgVN9IIDXO1xz613-oyPFiBOf4nLvH0AV0GAeA%3D%3D)

Our founder, Dr. Annie Andrews, said it best, “Sarah Klee Hood’s journey from serving our country in the Air Force to fighting for environmental sustainability, all while raising a family and managing the everyday struggles that come with it, embodies the spirit of Their Future PAC”. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Notes from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Glimpses of each week on the road to the White House

|
---
| | |
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=notes_1_14_24_email_4_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
* * *
# Notes from the Campaign Trail
Edition #4 from Digital Messaging Director, Jonathan Hiller
* * *
* * *
Peter —
I never thought I’d re-enter presidential politics. I was a filmmaker with Hillary Clinton’s campaign in 2016 and followed her around the country for a year, creating short documentaries and digital ads. As the campaign progressed and I observed the egregious way in which the DNC treated Bernie Sanders, I couldn’t stomach it anymore. I resigned in disgust. I could no longer be part of the Machine—the democracy-devouring duopoly. I saw Trump’s election as a perfectly reasonable response of an American electorate completely fed up with a gridlocked, corrupt system. Trump promised to break things—and people wanted them broken. I did not support Trump, but I spent the following years seeking to understand the people who voted for him.
I produced a documentary about water rights, but at its core, the film was about the plight of the small town. In our reckless pursuit of globalism, we’ve seemed to have forgotten our ties to our communities and the heartfelt people in them. I was at an impasse, politically. I waded into the paradox of agreeing with some policies on both sides and was excoriated by my groupthink-oriented friends. No political party is a totalizing discourse, I knew, but I felt alone. So, I registered as an Independent and, for the most part, kept my mouth shut.
When my friend Charles Eisenstein joined Bobby’s campaign, I started paying attention to national politics again. How could Charles, with his brilliant mind and spirit, want to participate in a broken political system? I reached out.
“What is going on here? Who is Bobby Kennedy?”
“Look into him...”
So, I did. I went down a rabbit hole. What I found was fascinating: an environmental lawyer and avid civil rights advocate; a man in recovery from addiction (I’m 17 years sober myself); a person who speaks openly about his relationship with the divine. And, most importantly, a leader offering a cogent audit of the ails of our fragile democracy—more so than anyone I’ve ever heard from running for president. I was filled with a sense of hope that had been dormant for years.
“How can I help?” I said to Charles.
I now find myself as Director of Digital Messaging for Bobby’s campaign, guiding our video production, email communications, social media, and texting program. I feel humbled and fortunate to serve every day. Collaborating with integrity also includes healthy conflict, and we don’t all agree on everything. I find it refreshing that Bobby himself encourages this kind of dialogue, and I feel privileged to work for a political candidate with whom I disagree on some issues, but feel the emotional permission to voice my concerns when called. I cannot stress enough how _different_ this feels. >From Bobby’s heartfelt expressions of _I’m grateful for you_ to this team’s willingness to jump into any problem with joy and resolve, we are a family putting in one thousand percent every day to help elect a person we know will bring an end to the corruption—the sort that prevents the people of this country from getting what they need to not only survive, but to thrive.
What that looks like to me is a reflection of the entrepreneurial spirit this country was founded upon. We are radical innovators. We are rebels. We think and act independently of the status quo. This originative spirit should be rewarded by a system built to encourage this kind of dialogue, not weigh it down with red tape. And for those of us who want to work to live, rather than live to work, we should be able to thrive working one job with honesty and integrity.
A humble request: If this story stirs in you the idea of hope, [please consider clicking a few buttons and sending $5 our way](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=notes_1_14_24_email_4_1_nd&n=2). We are eternally grateful for your support; because, as our leader says, _this is about you_. We are all working tirelessly on your behalf—on this country’s behalf—to help deliver you a president who will not break things, but fix them.
| |
---
---
Warmly,
Jonathan Hiller
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=notes_1_14_24_email_4_1_nd&n=3)
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=notes_1_14_24_email_4_1_nd&n=4) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZdMp9-e17RgxqtIk69rUIjeOqT1-oa6z7jeUAIaHEF2m&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=notes_1_14_24_email_4_1_nd&n=5) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=notes_1_14_24_email_4_1_nd&n=6) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=notes_1_14_24_email_4_1_nd&n=7) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSHecUzjTC_26r6_PMq84pDYNHmKWp713umpU1ZYCPsJg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=notes_1_14_24_email_4_1_nd&n=8)

Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House!

body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ac8a025d2bad4444819f54026cecd60c&_e=_IgPES4uavyTUOIKb2T1VbWbs96iJeWf38srqgSTKMlQxiQ7vxmRJErACGekDN8BDtP8PDb4JjEVmaZhnoYu0UMfUREZNr1urld-_Rr10nsPaOc4sKUs_wfdWPQv1d5-kL6WTOU1Bwx8OyLAlQ2T1br9NrPhMZ-FG4ec4CjH3fsplEI4JpOTk6KMXFQVHRvk-CbNQ96RVlHnMpNKiH7mIv2lQdyDly24HANn7qkowj2OV_FgDWFJX4DuKG48MkeBFFXmeRcoU9K4rLED0BfiFxXSAy54iySt2DfxxbkbLdXibc2d1dmgZ033PpGCvby9fJb-RgrmoF5JF0WRc7Q39HYWfNDDEMlm3fagckZD106VN2iaLgRWJWQ8t9jrX7PE)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ac8a025d2bad4444819f54026cecd60c&_e=_IgPES4uavyTUOIKb2T1VbWbs96iJeWf38srqgSTKMlQxiQ7vxmRJErACGekDN8BDtP8PDb4JjEVmaZhnoYu0UMfUREZNr1urld-_Rr10nsPaOc4sKUs_wfdWPQv1d5-kL6WTOU1Bwx8OyLAlQ2T1br9NrPhMZ-FG4ec4CjH3fsplEI4JpOTk6KMXFQVHRvk-CbNQ96RVlHnMpNKiH7mIv2lQdyDly24HANn7qkowj3iSJhaNZbU63pdm7QUfOr42UVKpEvcPbEzXtkCkIxdL7rXwZLhvNmsCCNY3sIpiw9O4XysSSw9HSP-2qS2RHCzb4uKjI80Z1T-dLHhkk9zj5rr3lgJC-a2mBEmnk2eqZ9sYdwacuFWAt7XqrSb3vmQ)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ac8a025d2bad4444819f54026cecd60c&_e=_IgPES4uavyTUOIKb2T1VbWbs96iJeWf38srqgSTKMlQxiQ7vxmRJErACGekDN8BDtP8PDb4JjEVmaZhnoYu0UMfUREZNr1urld-_Rr10nsPaOc4sKUs_wfdWPQv1d5-kL6WTOU1Bwx8OyLAlQ2T1br9NrPhMZ-FG4ec4CjH3fsplEI4JpOTk6KMXFQVHRvk-CbNQ96RVlHnMpNKiH7mIv2lQdyDly24HANn7qkowj0VlcWywvASV88GkNieoG8ChcF7ZJfkZbCW2vKZuzPcCxf76u0iuB-okDnGn9hlWnA_0BMymsGpVnFBoh00AZS11Bq43xgvMbU_s6vwk51X6gC9Dg0oj4dRF4wUU84Ues4WB6mB8w429GY67uCUUBrc)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ac8a025d2bad4444819f54026cecd60c&_e=_IgPES4uavyTUOIKb2T1VbWbs96iJeWf38srqgSTKMlQxiQ7vxmRJErACGekDN8BDtP8PDb4JjEVmaZhnoYu0UMfUREZNr1urld-_Rr10nsPaOc4sKUs_wfdWPQv1d5-kL6WTOU1Bwx8OyLAlQ2T1br9NrPhMZ-FG4ec4CjH3fsplEI4JpOTk6KMXFQVHRvk-CbNQ96RVlHnMpNKiH7mIv2lQdyDly24HANn7qkowj0G7Fu3Lk8KCh4pK_6G9f2Qz8aa8RD-8R1jdTJCKvkaDGXZsiIkeV4ew6KaMx1FJ7gYkFrehVJYrhAYgqCEW06trHyS-vcWGmD_IeEQDmPsaVoB8i70gnCOOQOTaVe1tU37VubYZkLFS-O_TgAFDfAM)
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ac8a025d2bad4444819f54026cecd60c&_e=_IgPES4uavyTUOIKb2T1VbWbs96iJeWf38srqgSTKMlQxiQ7vxmRJErACGekDN8BDtP8PDb4JjEVmaZhnoYu0UMfUREZNr1urld-_Rr10nsPaOc4sKUs_wfdWPQv1d5-kL6WTOU1Bwx8OyLAlQ2T1br9NrPhMZ-FG4ec4CjH3fsplEI4JpOTk6KMXFQVHRvk-CbNQ96RVlHnMpNKiH7mIv2lQdyDly24HANn7qkowj2qTOcES94yhXVqWjpJ3-wO0nMYwmMdFi51tuoSqsvd8beZwxJEutxL774xDotp4wCZbPZV3JQmBKYWraUB_2tnM0rdIz569ov7PK_mO955kDKxo7Cg2LT20dVoa2jlL_zbOE8k6ISeNxkGwGcaOAMh)

_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

name: Team Kunce
subject: Stretching your donation in Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Every $1 here in Missouri can go nearly five times as far compared to states like Texas and Florida.
#
Peter,
When you add a donation toward our campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce, you’re not just helping us build a record-breaking grassroots movement here in Missouri — **you’re investing in the most competitive, affordable race to flip a U.S. Senate seat in the entire country.**
1. **Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable.** In 2018, he won his Senate seat with only 51% of the vote. After he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6, he became the least popular GOP U.S. Senator up for re-election this year — with even lower approval ratings than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott.
2. **Missourians have a history of taking back their power at the ballot box.** Since his last election, voters have broken with Hawley to approve measures that raised the minimum wage, expanded Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, and legalized weed with huge margins of victory.
3. **Every $1 in Missouri can go nearly five times as far compared to states like Texas and Florida.** Because of our state’s small media markets, we’ll be able to reach Missourians with Lucas’ message early and often for a fraction of what it would cost in those other big states.

**[ELECT LUCAS KUNCE: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42620?refcode=em20240114-4604&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4604%2E614464%2EVRmYHE)**
Lucas Kunce is working hard to build the record-breaking, worker-led coalition that can take advantage of this opportunity to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and stand up to the GOP insiders propping up Hawley’s campaign.
**But he needs your help to do it, Peter.**

clean_body: Every $1 here in Missouri can go nearly five times as far compared to states like Texas and Florida. Peter, When you add a donation toward our campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce, you’re not just helping us build a record-breaking grassroots movement here in Missouri — you’re investing in the most competitive, affordable race to flip a U.S. Senate seat in the entire country. 1. Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable. In 2018, he won his Senate seat with only 51% of the vote. After he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6, he became the least popular GOP U.S. Senator up for re-election this year — with even lower approval ratings than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott. 2. Missourians have a history of taking back their power at the ballot box. Since his last election, voters have broken with Hawley to approve measures that raised the minimum wage, expanded Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, and legalized weed with huge margins of victory. 3. Every $1 in Missouri can go nearly five times as far compared to states like Texas and Florida. Because of our state’s small media markets, we’ll be able to reach Missourians with Lucas’ message early and often for a fraction of what it would cost in those other big states. Lucas Kunce is working hard to build the record-breaking, worker-led coalition that can take advantage of this opportunity to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and stand up to the GOP insiders propping up Hawley’s campaign. But he needs your help to do it, Peter. name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: 🚨 First GOP Super PAC spending in MI
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1025%2E135344%2EtWIqXp)

Friends -
Big news just broke in the Michigan Senate race: an outside spending group is launching a nearly seven-figure advertising campaign supporting one of my Republican opponents, Mike Rogers.
He doesn't even have his own ads running at the moment - instead, he’s relying on an outside group, funded by anonymous donors, to do the talking for him.
It’s a purchase of $974,000 for TV commercials, 7 months before his crowded primary in August, and 10 months ahead of the general election. GOP candidates have leaned more heavily on super PACs in recent years because they aren’t raising as many small dollar donations, and they prefer anonymous money.
We knew this kind of spending would eventually be a big part of this race, and now it has begun.
So what does this mean for us?
It's an unfortunate advantage for our opponent in a race that is likely to be a close one. He will have huge sums of money spent on his behalf to introduce him to Michiganders before anyone else in the race goes on the air.
Elissa is no stranger to these outside spending campaigns. She's faced millions and millions of dollars of ads spent against her in her tough congressional races from these groups and won each time.
She won because people like you answered the call to help her win her House races. Now she needs us all if she's going to get to the Senate and keep it out of Republican control.
